name: Spar Kart
summary: Spar Kart is a free-to-play racing fighting game that combines casual racing gameplay with competitive fighting game mechanics. The game offers a unique blend of casual fun with friends and intricate combat that's both accessible to newcomers and deep enough for competitive players.

name: Kiipluu
summary:
Kiipluu is a hardcore stealth adventure set in a brutal Neolithic world.

Every encounter is a tense survival puzzle. Study patrol routes, use tall grass, shadows, sound, and terrain to stay hidden. Set traps, strike from ambush, or slip past unseen. Being discovered can quickly become fatal.

When stealth fails, combat is fast, brutal, and unforgiving. Weapons are primitive. Injuries matter. There are no easy victories.

Along the way, Kiipluu is haunted by dreamlike spirit journeys and visions of his father, a legendary hunter whose shadow looms over every choice. Your decisions shape who survives, who is lost, and what kind of person Kiipluu becomes.

This is a story of fear, survival, and growing up in a world that wants you dead.

name: Party Pop Bubblyz
summary:
Jump into the Ultimate Penguin Party!
Break the ice and have fun at the Park! Join the 20-player party to be the star!
Explosive Fun in Just 10 Minutes

name: World of Tanks Blitz: Reforged
summary: World of Tanks Blitz: Reforged is a massive technical overhaul of Wargaming’s hit MMO action game. Rebuilt from the ground up on Unreal Engine 5, it introduces next-gen graphics, dynamic lighting, and advanced physics. Experience intense 7v7 tank combat with stunning PBR textures and enhanced environments, while maintaining full cross-platform progression in the most visually advanced version of Blitz to date.

name: Cozy Marbles
summary: Cozy Marbles is a comfy game about building marble runs on a sunny afternoon. Using a huge range of bits and pieces, fit together the marble course you’ve always wanted to build and play with. Unwind to a lo-fi ASMR soundscape and roll with the nostalgia.

name: Myth of Valderit
summary:
Myth of Valderit is a psychological horror experience set in the cursed village of Valderit, inspired by the abandoned Catalan village of La Mussara. You wake up as Nil, separated from your friends Julia and Enric, and soon uncover the dark secrets lurking within the village…

This single-player, first-person experience combines exploration, survival, and puzzle-solving. Nil must endure and remain alive, evading the fanatical devotees of an unimaginable entity.

name: Stardust: Wish of Witch
summary: STARDUST: Wish of Witch is a single-player SRPG beautifully crafted in pixel art. Follow the secret of the wish-granting star and join the adventure of the girl “Star” and the mage “Yu”.

name: Deco Online Origins
summary: Deco Online Origins is a free-to-play 3D MMORPG that put players deep into the fantastic story of two warring nations, "Millena" and "Rain". As a legendary swordsman, a fierce archer, or a master of wizardry, players were constantly challenged by the opposing nation and by monsters that lurked around every corner. Notable features included a combo system with hundreds of potential skills, and guardian pets that buffed entire guilds.

name: WWE 2K26
summary: The show never stops in WWE 2K26! Step into CM Punk’s 2K Showcase, dominate with 400+ Superstars and Legends, and unleash chaos with all-new match types.

name: One in One Million
summary: Trapped in a small room, four friends will have to uncover the mystery hidden within those walls while facing the secrets of an elusive truth. The answers are just a button away. A psychological thriller visual novel packed with dark humor and fascinating facts about raccoons.

name: Diablo IV: Season of Slaughter
summary: A demonologist enlists your aid to master his dark craft in preparation for Mephisto’s inevitable assault on Sanctuary. Through your shared experiments, you gain the ability to transform into The Butcher, a power only partially under your control.

name: Yellowcreek Stories: The Cabin Watcher
summary: A masked killer hunts you in the dark. Manage noise and light, hide quickly, and survive this intense 60–90 minute first-person stealth horror experience inspired by classic 80s slasher films.

name: 1 CatLine
summary: Master puzzling stages with the help of your 2D feline companion!

name: Mekanion
summary: Defeat Mekanions, the mechanical lifeforms consuming the entire world!

name: Pig Commander
summary: Pig Commander is a fast paced roguelike RTS where chaos rules every battle. Build improvised armies, pick a commander, and survive unpredictable challenges round after round.

name: Dungeons & Warbands
summary: A fast turn-based, grid-based hack and slash Dungeon Crawler in an Open World with many towns, caves, and dungeons to visit or raid. Go solo or lead your warband of allies or monsters. Engage in brutal combat with realistic armor layers protecting against crippling body part damage.

name: Cirno! Lifts a Boulder
summary: Help Cirno get back into her home! A chill, bite-sized 3D platformer in which you explore a frozen Misty Lake and gain boulder-lifting strength.

name: Disc Golf
summary: Disc Golf is a casual local multiplayer game for 1 to 4 players that brings the fun of the popular outdoor sport to your screen. Choose from a variety of characters and scenic courses and compete with friends for the lowest score!

name: Doctor Gallagher's Residence
summary: A retro-style point-and-click adventure. Step into the peculiar Gallagher Mansion to uncover its darkest secrets.

name: Your Love Ai
summary: Your Love Ai is a game where you develop a relationship with an android robot named Ai, and your dialogue choices influence the ending. Will you be able to touch Ai's heart?

name: BitHero Survivors
summary: BitHero Survivors is a survivors-like pixel-art action RPG. Pick your hero, wield evolving weapons, harness powerful relics. Explore colorful stages, survive relentless enemy waves — and become a true hero!

name: Forest Construction VR
summary: In Forest Construction VR you will have the opportunity to experience all the joy of free construction with realistic physics, while being in a pleasant forest environment. A sandbox where the only limit is your imagination. Create a simple shelter or a piece of art? It's up to you!

name: MultiEnding Heroes
summary: Embark on a hilarious, choice-driven adventure in MultiEnding Heroes! Guide The Priest and The Hero through multiple universes, making decisions that lead to over 50 unique endings. Every choice matters, will you lead them to glory or disaster?

name: Piece by Piece
summary: It's time to open shop! Inherit your family's repair shop, and roll up your sleeves. Fix up the prized possessions of the forest folk, paint yourself a masterpiece to sell and make your family shop all your own with decorations, furniture and cookies!

name: Mama's Sleeping Angels
summary: Kiss and decapitate your friends in a Co-Op horror game about collecting cursed objects to feed to a deity called Mama, lest she hunger for you. Work together, and betray each other... Anything to keep Mama happy.

name: Pawnbroker Simulator
summary: Welcome to Pawnbroker Simulator, where you're the boss. Build your shop, strike deals, and test your business savvy in this indie simulation game. Dive into a world of trade and management. Can you make it big in the world of pawnbroking? Time to find out!

name: Yuma Nest
summary: Destroy massive swarms of monsters and build automated systems that fight for you in Yuma Nest. An open-world sandbox action RPG where you grow stronger in the overworld before exploring an interconnected underworld.

name: The State of Nowhere
summary: Assigned to station 65, your role as employee 100411 will be to serve and sell products to the people, exercising the controls the state deems necessary to keep the population in line

name: Eonia Revelations
summary: Take on the role of Blin Albius, the last Knowledge Seeker apprentice, and sort through the most exotic plants, minerals, and animals, in a vast and colorful fantastical world. Unravel the truth behind the great powers of the world and the secrets that rule everything.

name: Space Tales
summary: Space Tales is a real-time strategy game set in a retro-futuristic environment. Take on the role of a commander in the Intergalactic Planetary Expansion (I.P.E.) and immerse yourself in a thrilling mission to explore and conquer new planets, pushing the boundaries of the Human Empire.

name: Bubblegum Galaxy
summary: Bubblegum Galaxy is a cute building strategy game about rebuilding the galaxy tile by tile. Discover and design new planets, complete missions, explore your office and befriend your co-workers... all while trying to find out who deleted the galaxy!

name: Cities: Skylines - Race Day
summary: Get ready to rev up your city! Host high-octane races, thrilling running & cycling events, and large parades. Transform your streets into jaw-dropping spectacles that kick your city into overdrive!

name: Retina Rush
summary: Retina Rush is a fast-paced arcade dodger where you play as a demon’s runaway eyeball, blazing across the sky in a desperate escape from hell and humanity alike. Glide through pixel-art mountain vistas while weaving between relentless missiles and cursed projectiles that fill the screen. Simple controls and tight, responsive movement make it easy to pick up, but ruthless enemy patterns and score targets test your focus, reflexes, and nerve. Chase higher scores, master risky near-misses, and prove you’ve got the vision to survive the rush.

name: Misery Nights
summary: Co-op horror for 1–6 players. Complete high-risk tasks in a vast shopping mall while evading relentless monsters. Hold the security room - or push out and make it back alive.

name: Coco Block
summary: Coconuts drop from above – click to block them before they bonk your monkeys. Bananas fall too – let the monkeys eat them for points and combos. The longer you keep the monkeys safe and feed them bananas, the faster the coconuts fall. How high can you score?

name: Nullis
summary: Logic puzzle game where you must destroy paths of 0-s from the board. Use logic to complete levels with optimal solutions.

name: Suitcase Stories
summary: Suitcase Stories is a short, cozy puzzle game about packing life’s memories. Organize objects into suitcases across 7 chapters, from childhood to adulthood. No timers, no scores just the calm joy of finding the perfect fit for every cherished memento.

name: Myth Monkey Card
summary: A unique blend of Texas Hold'em poker mechanics and Roguelike strategy. Forge your destiny across four distinct cultivation paths and challenge the gods of the Celestial Court. Will you master Artefacts for precise combos, or rely on the Self for a desperate comeback? In this mythic battle where the world is your card table, victory is yours to define.

name: Bililitz
summary: Bililitz is a vertical roguelike with procedurally generated worlds. Explore mysterious depths, collect items, and discover portals to new challenges. Compete in the global ranking system to prove your skill and reach the top!

name: Snack Escort
summary: Who would’ve thought that a roguelike, card game, and tower defence could come together over a basket of food? Travel through magical lands filled with hungry creatures, collect cards and artifacts that shape your strategy with every run. Escort your food through this whimsical fantasy world.

name: A Color Theory
summary: A Trippy Puzzle-Platformer That Literally Plays with Color

name: Little Fiefdom: Medieval
summary: A medieval sandbox build/war game. Start as a peasant, become a lord, manage your fiefdom. Gather resources, construct buildings, train people & an army to defend or attack.

name: Quest-Top
summary: Step into the role of a Guild Master! Recruit adventurers, send them on quests to collect resources, upgrade your hideout, and enhance their gear — all while you work, watch videos, or play other games.

name: Floral Fury Online
summary: Unleash nature's wrath in Floral Fury Online, an Indie Action MMORPG. Master a unique Fusion system, conquer procedural dungeons, and battle epic bosses with dynamic combat. Forge your legacy, join guilds, and dominate the economy in a world where weather dictates the tide of battle.

name: The Subject: Protocol Zero
summary: Turn on your camera. The Kessler Foundation is paying for your pain. The game uses your webcam and microphone, turning the room into a lab. Complete four stages: from the blink ban to the "Green Light, Red Light" game. Money or sanity? Be the first to complete Protocol Zero. If you dare.

name: Thelma Fantastic
summary: Thelma Fantastic is a hidden object mystery game where every level and every hidden object is randomized. It is a game of finding objects, earning clues, and eliminating suspects to solve the case. An endless supply of randomly generated hidden object scenes for you to enjoy.

name: Out of the Park Baseball 27
summary: 27 years of sports gaming excellence! Out of the Park Baseball 27 is here - officially licensed by MLB, the MLB Players Inc. and KBO! This year's brand new version puts you firmly in charge of your favorite baseball franchise or country. Your team, your way, your rules.

name: Unsealed: The Mare
summary:
Unsealed: The Mare is a first-person psychological horror game set in a nightmare rooted in memory and trauma.

Players explore dark, oppressive environments while uncovering fragmented messages and hidden memories that subtly alter the world around them.

The experience emphasizes tension, sound awareness, and atmosphere, encouraging players to move carefully, listen closely, and piece together meaning through environmental storytelling.

name: A Game About Making Mosaics
summary: A calm sandbox game about crafting and placing tiles to create mosaics. No goals, no pressure, just you, colors, and creativity.

name: Smashometry
summary: Smashometry is a neon-soaked, three-button reflex score-attack game. Hit matching shapes, survive escalating speed, stack insane combos, and climb global leaderboards as the screen erupts with colour and an electrifying original soundtrack.

name: Servo
summary: Take control of Servo — a high-speed drone. Chain boosts & switch gravity. Ricochet with precision and use momentum to survive in a chaotic world.

name: Battle Hanafuda
summary: A strategic two-player card battle based on the traditional Japanese game Hanafuda. Learn as you play and enjoy thrilling “Koi-Koi” duels filled with risk and reward.

name: Summer Delicous Simulator
summary: Start your career on the bustling city streets as an ice cream or hotdog vendor! Upgrade your cart, outsmart your rivals, and compete with friends to become the most popular seller in town!

name: Oeuf
summary: 3D physics-platformer where you are an egg! Roll, hop and slide your way back home.

name: Nightmarena
summary: Nightmarena is a 2D rogue lite turn based fighting game. Carefully analyze enemy attack pattern to figure out the best time and direction to dodge and then fight back with your own skills. After every arena attempt, improve your character and keep fighting until you conquer all the floors.

name: Nitro Turtles
summary: Nitro Turtles is a racing game about super fast turtles! Reach insane speeds with awesome shell-attached gadgets, compete in crazy races with friends, and sprint across the finish line to claim ultimate turtle victory! To be the fastest turtle around, you'll need to master shell gadget usage, learn every shortcut imaginable, and maybe even consider using performance-enhancing seaweed!

name: Ranger’s Path: National Park Simulator
summary: Begin your park ranger journey in Ranger’s Path: National Park Simulator. Maintain trails, assist visitors, check permits and respond to emergencies. Explore diverse biomes and observe varied animal behaviors across a wide range of species.

name: Hunter's Seal
summary: Manage the front desk of a fantasy hunters guild. Identify monsters, verify hunters, and authorize them! The guild's reputation is in your hands.

name: Galactic Vault
summary: Build your weapon to its full potential in Galactic Vault, a fast-paced FPS roguelite. Discover endless upgrade combinations, craft diverse builds, and unleash devastating abilities. Get ready to infiltrate high-security vaults and recover lost tech.

name: Art-Therapy: Jigsaw Puzzle
summary: A Cozy Jigsaw Puzzle Game for Everyone! If you like puzzles, this one’s for you. It has over 100 beautiful pictures in different styles—some colorful and fun, others peaceful and calming. There’s no rush, no timers, just a simple and relaxing way to spend your time.

name: Shift 0
summary: Co-op for 2–4 players. Carry fully physics-based objects, complete tasks, and move up floor by floor, but don’t forget that time is limited. Your internship ends with either a job offer or a full reset.

name: Crabmeat
summary: A short first-person-point-and-click-survival-horror game set in a future Antarctic fisheries region where you are a prisoner tasked with crabbing for the priceless southern King Crab.

name: The Artifactory
summary: The Artifactory is a chaotic couch co-op party game set in a whimsical fantasy lootbox factory! Craft potions, forge weapons, and experiment with recipes to fulfill unpredictable orders. Fix broken machines, survive moving platforms, lava, and more! Play solo or with up to 4 players!

name: Desperate 1: After Sunset
summary: The first work of the "Desperate" series - After Sunset, it’s a horizontal 2D action game with hand-painted, and using a new keyboard operation, you can feel a more intuitive combat experience in this game. Fight for the thing you loved in your life in every street you pass by！

name: DreamWorld
summary: The Infinite Sandbox MMO. For Builders, By Builders. Explore an infinite world with all your friends on one server. Build unbelievable structures using advanced building tools like volumetric selection and copy/paste. Battle bosses and mobs, farm, craft and more in DreamWorld.

name: Corgi Race
summary: Be a part of the greatest sport in the world, Corgi Racing! Run your own stable; raise and train your corgi from a promising puppy to a legendary champion with all the twists and turns that come on the track to success.

name: Renxia
summary: This is a challenging action duel game, you will play as an unknown origin of chivalrous expert travel around the ancient Chinese land, to find the former legend of the sword, and gradually solve the mystery of their own origins.

name: Kritter: Defend Together
summary: Kritter is NOT a tower defense. It’s NOT an action roguelite either. It’s somewhere in between. All we know is you can become absurdly powerful, blow stuff up with your friends, up to 4 players, online or local and follow a surprisingly cool story.

name: GreedFall: The Dying World
summary:
The story starts three years before the events of the first game and the adventures of De Sardet.

This time you play as a native of Teer Fradee, uprooted by force from your island and taken to the continent of Gacane, where the colonists are from. In this old world ravaged by war and scarred by the Malichor plague and the political scheming of the different factions, you need to regain your freedom and control of your own destiny. Using diplomacy, cunning or combat, as well as help from allies you make, it's up to you to end one man's ambitions of conquest, which could spell the end for the continent and your island.

Experience the unique world of GreedFall again by exploring the old continent! Travel across new landscapes, from Olima – the city of stars of the Bridge Alliance – to the shores of Uxantis, and uncover the secrets of these ancient lands. Meet all the factions that share control over these nations and navigate the treacherous waters of their schemes and conspiracies.

Create your own character and find allies to join your team. Help them with their quests, uncover their secrets and make them your friends, rivals or even lovers. As well as equipping them the way you want, you can also take control of them in combat.

Immerse yourself in an ever deeper RPG experience where every choice has an impact on your adventure and where diplomacy, manipulation, infiltration and combat are all viable paths for you to achieve your aims.

name: Haunted Lands
summary: An homage to classic DOS games such as Dangerous Dave and Doom. Blast your way through the hordes of ghouls and demons, leaving nothing behind but their rotting corpses.

name: Mr. Sleepy Man
summary: In Mr. Sleepy Man, you play as a sleepy guy who's up way past his bedtime and out of control! Make a mess of everything you find and turn Bedtime Town against you! This sandbox adventure is filled with comical hijinks, outrageous characters, and platforming action!

name: Sophie: Starlight Whispers
summary: Sophie: Starlight Whispers is an adventure game with metroidvania elements, featuring pixelated graphics, a deep narrative, and fully dubbed in Portuguese. Explore a vast map and put an end to the dark creatures that terrorize the kingdom of Sharan.

name: Womb of Worms
summary: Womb of Worms is a short horror game where a terrifying ancient god manifests itself through worms and maggots, looking to be reborn through someone's body.

name: King's Mug
summary: King’s Mug is a tavern-management game where players build, decorate, and manage their dream tavern while trading with merchants, brewing beer and cooking dishes.

name: Hail the Devourer
summary: Hail the Devourer is a darkly satisfying incremental clicker where destruction becomes progression and razing cities to the ground brings an ancient evil closer to ending it all.

name: Puppy Park
summary: Run your very own Puppy Park — a tiny dog hotel for pups of every breed and personality! Feed them yummy snacks, pamper them with grooming, and embark on adventures. Earn their love, grow your reputation, and fill your hotel with wagging tails and happy barks! Play daily in bite-sized chunks!

name: Grave Dodgers
summary: Grave Dodgers is a 2D, pixel art, dodgeball brawler for 2-4 players. Throw, dodge, and parry your way through a silly version of hell as one of the underworld's kooky characters. Inspired by our favorite local couch multiplayer games - but in hell! Kill your friends and have a ball!

name: Drft
summary: DRFT is a physics-based arena shooter. Weaponize the raw momentum of every drift to supercharge into an invulnerable wrecking ball. Shred waves of foes and bounce off walls to survive. Between runs, stack upgrades to turn your hard-to-handle hatchback into a screen-clearing machine of destruction.

name: Tree of Knowledge
summary: Tree of Knowledge is a roguelite where you beat trivia questions instead of monsters. By using a combination of powerful artifacts, flexible skills and your own general knowledge; try your hand at climbing to the top!

name: Dice Goblin's Den
summary: Dice Goblin's Den is a 2D side-scrolling Tower Defense Roguelite game where you defend your fellow Goblins from waves of "heroes" who have been given quests at the local tavern to pillage and loot your home! Grow your goblin den and strengthen your economy by journeying to different levels to gather more resources while fending off your enemies!

name: Knight of Noshland
summary: Wield your mighty Crusader blade and defend your kingdom against relentless waves of invaders. Forge powerful defenses and unleash devastating attacks as you upgrade your towers and arsenal. In this fantastical world strategize against a vast array of foes and claim ultimate victory over your realm!

name: Ritualist
summary: Ritualist is a dynamic isometric action-roguelike set in a unique dark fantasy world. Choose your weapons, master combat style, and face death as you uncover ancient rituals to seal away the Primordial Ones. Will you survive the descent, or will the Abyss claim you?

name: Find the Cat: Nightmare
summary: Cute cats, eerie places. Find The Cat: Nightmare is a hand-drawn hidden object game set in retro-dystopian landscapes. Find cats hidden among the static and rust in a world where 80s nostalgia meets the uncanny valley.

name: Spacefleet: Heat Death
summary: In the 23rd century, Earth orbit is flooded with debris from constant warfare. Countries, megacorporations, and mercenaries are fighting for control. Take contracts, build your warfleets, and dominate the Earth-Luna system in this realism-focused strategy RPG!

name: Nodosis
summary: Nodosis is a tic-tac-toe-inspired rogue-like deckbuilder where you play an endless game of high-scores, tile synergies and mysteriously accursed rings. Score, Retrigger, Multiply, Modify, Win and Lose. It's up to you how you want to play this game, Nodosis. Willing to take the chance?

name: Demon With a Candy Crisis
summary: A quick and easy 3d platformer playing as a demon that needs to quench its thirst for candy. Travel through hell to get to the surface to find someone's secret stash of candy.

name: Project Starblade
summary: Project Starblade is a first-person action psychological platformer that follows YOU - a participant for a new series of tests that promise to push your body and mind to their limits. But not everything is at as it seems at "Fathom Laboratories"...

name: Wagon 00
summary: Observation game about anomalies in a train car: spot changes, choose back or forward, advance by a streak of correct choices. No HUD; focus on attention and memory.

name: Steel Force: Top Down Shooter
summary: STEEL FORCE is a top-down shooter. Attack robots, use your shield, and push your skills to the limit. Run, dash, and break through waves of armed machines.

name: LoopMage: The Infinite Trials
summary: Fight an endless onslaught of foes in this minimalist wizard survival roguelike. Each loop makes you AND the horde stronger. How many loops can you survive? Ascend the global leaderboards to claim your glory!

name: CrazyTaiji
summary: Crazy TaiJi is a casual card game inspired by traditional Chinese culture. In the game, you will use 64 sword-shaped cards to form combinations and activate spells to defeat monsters. With resources gained from battle, you can improve your abilities and break through to higher realms of cultivation.

name: Matchmaker Simulator
summary: Matchmaker Simulator is a narrative game about modern matchmaking. You register clients and pair them, witnessing how romance becomes a transaction. Will this search for optimal genes lead to self-destruction?

name: Echo of Humanity
summary: A slow, atmospheric horror experience set aboard an abandoned orbital station - the last echo of humanity. Explore cold corridors, flickering terminals, and forgotten logs of a failed salvation program. No monsters. No jumpscares. Only silence, loneliness, and the weight of extinction.

name: Our Metal Bowl
summary: Explore, fight alongside your robot companion, solve puzzles, and gather essential nutrients to restore life to an abandoned greenhouse.

name: Card Corner
summary: An idle poker game that sits in the corner of your screen while you do other things.

name: CRT: Corner Right There!
summary: CRT: Corner Right There! is a fast-paced, incremental roguelite filled with arcade nostalgia. Don't just stare at the screen waiting for the logo to hit the corner... make it happen! Get resources, fight off glitchy interferences, and stack upgrades in this JUICY quest for the perfect bounce.

name: Heyoo 3D Platformer
summary: HEYOO is a pure and uncompromising 3D speedrunning experience. Each level is a complex labyrinth suspended in the void, where skill is not only measured by the precision of your jump, but by your ability to maintain momentum and find the optimal route in three-dimensional space

name: Dogfight Darlings
summary: Dogfight Darlings is a bite-sized, bullet hell boss rush featuring an aviation themed cast of plane girls! Take to the skies, unlock skills, and battle your way to victory through daring aerial combat in this game made entirely of boss fights.

name: Holy Nope!
summary: A small incremental game about defending Heaven from hordes of sinners who think they deserve a spot in Paradise. Sure, people have a high opinion of themselves, but Heaven is full - and you are the bouncer.

name: Project: Aftershock
summary: Project: AFTERSHOCK is a fast-paced arcade hacking roguelite set in a dystopian future. Command a 20-year-old legacy terminal to breach enemy systems, siphon funds, and upgrade your hardware. Use your reflexes to survive the countdown and bring down the very system you created.

name: Dead Bit
summary: Fast-paced runner-shooter where every run is a risky raid. Blast through enemies, grab loot, upgrade your weapons and gear, and unlock harder raids with new enemies and tactics each time you reach the end.

name: Sushi Simulator
summary: Manage your own sushi restaurant. Take orders, prepare fresh sushi, purchase ingredients, manage stock, and keep your customers happy. No distractions, just a focused single-player sushi simulation.

name: Cozy Paintings
summary: Every painting in this art gallery has been scrambled! Drag colors across your canvas and optimize your moves to restore famous artworks. Experiment with color palettes, unlock playful cats with strangely familiar names and watch them wander around while you paint in this cozy and relaxing game.

name: Captain of Industry: Trains Expansion
summary: Supercharge your train logistics network with the power of electricity, or even nuclear energy. Modernize your railway fleet with five new high-tech locomotives, build electrified rail infrastructure, and transport molten resources with specialized wagons.

name: Endless TD
summary: Endless TD is a multiplayer tower defense game focused on deep buildcraft, co-op survival, and competitive PvP. Team up with friends to survive endlessly scaling waves, experiment with elemental synergies and tower merges, or face off by sending enemies to overwhelm your opponents. Every run plays differently, rewarding strategy, creativity, and smart decisions.

name: Cozy Fast Hanoi
summary:
Cozy puzzle game, offering a modern take on a classic brain teaser.
There's only one rule: never place a larger piece on top of a smaller one. Cozy Fast Hanoi offers a relaxing solo mode and a dynamic 2-player mode. Play at your own pace, progress through the game, and unlock features to customize the game's atmosphere.

name: At Night: The Nurse
summary: At Night is an episodic psychological horror game presented as a late-night television program, where each episode features a survivor recounting a traumatic event. In this episode, The Nurse, you follow Emily Collins, a nurse who takes a late-night job at Bloomring Hospital. What begins as a routine shift quickly turns unsettling as the hospital reveals something is wrong.

name: DeckLand
summary: DeckLand is a rogue-lite combining deck-building with the Korean traditional Yutnori game. You are a guru returning to the kingdom of morning calm. Use various cards and tools to break through obstacles, defeat strong enemies, and approach the source of the catastrophe plaguing the kingdom!

name: Vellum: Raid Night Study Hall
summary: Brush up on your fighting mechanics with Raid Night Study Hall - your worry-free guide to boss fights! Learn, practice, and don't stand in the fire! You will be prepared!

name: Directory Dungeon - File Explorer Dungeon Crawler
summary: A tiny dungeon crawler played right in the windows file explorer. Explore a monster and loot filled dungeon by dragging and dropping your player folder into new rooms, equip powerful files, defeat terrible monsters, and banish evil once and for all.

name: King's Hand
summary: King's Hand is a turn-based, roguelike battler that fuses the strategy of chess with deckbuilding and a dash of chaos. Face increasingly challenging waves of tactical chess gameplay with a twist!

name: Wireworks
summary: Wireworks is a base-defense roguelike auto-battler where your defenses are built and controlled using a module board.

name: Echoes From The Soul
summary: "Let the fragments reverberate within your being. Let the echoes from your soul vibrate within every living bodycell. Now, my child, you're whole again. Be it a good or a bad thing, we'll leave for you to choose."

name: Space Tower Defense
summary: A strategic space tower-defense game. Enemies detect, warn, and try to bypass defenses, forcing you to adapt. Combine diverse towers and face unique maps for varied battles. With tense sci-fi atmosphere, it delivers a fresh experience beyond traditional tower defense.

name: Walker
summary: An online co-op horror game where you and your crew hunt monsters inside a massive Walker. Use your environment, items, or anything at your disposal to protect your Walker.

name: 100 Underworld Cats
summary: Join the cutest adventure in themed locations full of cats! Explore the charming hand-drawn artwork of special places and try to find 100 adorable cats hidden throughout the game. ️ Can you find them all? ️

name: Astro Fighters 2
summary: Astro Fighters 2 is a vertical scrolling bullet hell shooter designed to test your skills with non-stop arcade style action. Use a variety of special items, power up your chosen ship and compete for the high score across 4 difficulty modes to be the best fighter pilot in the game.

name: Irezumi Defenders
summary: Irezumi Defenders is a tower defense game where you craft your units in a world inspired by Japanese mythology. Stack cards to craft buildings, gather resources, and build up your defenses to protect your kingdom from Yokai!

name: Castle and Cursor
summary: Do you like Tower Defense and also clicking the cursor? Then defend your castle with itself and with your cursor. Each castle has its own unique upgrades. Complete stages unlock different castles and upgrade your cursor skills.

name: Defense & Making
summary: Defense & Making is a tile-based strategy game. Become a Demon Lord design enemy paths using randomly drawn tiles and cards place traps and monsters and experience a unique dungeon defense that changes every time you play.

name: Drive Me Broke
summary: Build your dream car! The cops are always on your back, so stay on good terms with them... Also, be prepared to do any job that requires money.

name: Interstellar Holy Spirit
summary: A multiplayer cooperative horror adventure game with an interstellar theme that can be played by 1-6 players! Players need to complete the tasks displayed on the screen of each level individually or collaboratively within a limited time and pass the Interstellar gate.

name: Age of Wonders 4: Rise from Ruin
summary:
Forge a mighty realm from the ashes in Age of Wonders 4: Rise from Ruin. Journey into the Withered Worlds and explore their devastated landscapes with the Nomad Culture, uniquely adapted to survive and thrive in desolation. Unearth the lost magics that ravaged these realms, and choose to either banish them forever or harness their power for your own ascendancy.

Contains the Nomad culture, form, wildlife and magical tomes, as well as new environmental challenges and locations to conquer and explore.

name: Blossom: The Seed of Life
summary: Terraform a dead planet back to life in this open world survival crafting game. Explore ruins, gather resources, print machines, drive modular vehicles, grow forests, biomes, and ecosystems and create life and make it thrive with your own hands.

name: Labyrinth Trailblazer
summary: Turn-based Dungeon Crawler Rogue-like with strategic combat. Navigate through a randomly generated labyrinth and encounter a variety of enemies and events. Build your party with different skills and equipments to defeat strong enemies and to conquer the dungeon.

name: Ash Warden
summary: Ash Warden is a fast-paced tower defense where you click to shoot enemies, teleport between three towers, and upgrade skills to survive relentless Redgaze waves.

name: TerraScape: Ancient Egypt
summary: Expand your kingdom-building adventure in TerraScape Ancient Egypt! Master the sands by crafting irrigation systems to nourish the land, then raise mighty monuments under the desert sun. Discover new resources and mechanics as you lead your settlement to pharaonic glory. Will your legacy endure?

name: Luxuriant
summary: Luxuriant is a fantasy card-driven roguelike deck-builder where you assemble and manage a deck of Royals, Citizens, Weapons, and Resources to outmaneuver Enemies in turn-based combat, earn Influence, progress through evolving levels, and unlock new cards for future runs.

name: Sanctale
summary: You'll open a potion shop in Sacred Heart City and learn about the reasons for the decline of Sacred Heart City by meeting a wide variety of customers. This is a story-based business simulation game, the main gameplay is that the customer asks you to make the right potion according to the request.

name: War Flavor
summary: War Flavor is a side-scrolling platform game, which is part of a rather arcade gameplay style comparable to the Contra series.

name: Bumble Rumble
summary: Gather bees to fight hordes of enemies in this RogueLike TowerDefense, collecting various relics to become the most powerful and defeat all those who get in your way.

name: Barda
summary: The mesmerizing inventory management roguelite where keeping your bag tidy means the difference between life and death.

name: Hive Blight
summary: Hive Blight is a roguelite autobattler where you lead a team of insect warriors against a corrupting Fungal Threat. Build powerful synergies, uncover the source of the plague, and destroy it to save your world!

name: Pluto
summary:
A roguelike deckbuilder where you fight with your fingers, spill some blood, and try to make it to your niece’s birthday on time.

You’re a wizard. A not-so-heroic wizard imprisoned for wizard crime, awoken from your wizard slumber by an invitation from your niece. Escape from jail and traverse a hostile world crawling with danger. Every turn is a frenzy of spell sigils, cracking bones, and desperate gestures as you shred through monstrosities with raw elemental power.

You’re not the chosen one, you’re just trying to be a good uncle.

name: Thysiastery
summary: Thysiastery is a dungeon crawler RPG featuring traditional roguelike and turn-based gameplay. Command a party of bearers of the Brand, drawn into a vast Labyrinth. Recruit while exploring the Labyrinth in hope of finding a way out, and its secrets will be revealed as you delve deeper.

name: Plylbl
summary: PLYLBL is a collection of games of various genres and styles. Adventures, puzzles, racing and many other genres are gathered in one place. Discover new games and play them alone or together with friends online or on the same screen!

name: Slime Attack: Survivor
summary: Fast-paced arena roguelike bullet heaven! Battle relentless waves, tackle mid-run challenges, unlock unique heroes with their own combat pets, equip powerful gear, weapons, and spells, and take on mighty Yonian bosses.

name: Iter-8
summary: Welcome to the surface, ITER employee #8. Mine the Pillar, upgrade your tools, defend your base, reach the top... or die miserably. Each expendable worker pushes the mission forward - one glorious, replaceable iteration at a time.

name: Stellarcraft
summary: Stellarcraft is a captivating sci-fi tower defense game that delves deep into the vast expanses of the universe, offering players the opportunity to explore planets, gather resources, and defend against numerous threats.

name: Cargo Hunters
summary: A third person shooter and extraction looter shooter which involves robots trying to survive rather than humans. A PVE and PVP shooter game with looting mechanism to build/craft gears in your Outpost. Gears and items can also be sold or bought from the market in your Outpost.

name: Temporal Titans
summary: Temporal Titans is a Tower-Defense game with Time Travel. Send mechs back to previous waves to prevent your defeat, and protect your salvage team from the monstrous Krell as you scavenge the ruins of a lost earth. Rewind, rethink, and reclaim the future!

name: Connected Clue
summary: A detective adventure where you infiltrate the scene to solve the case. Use tools to secure evidence and testimonies.

name: Painted Peril
summary: Take up the paintbrush and unleash the power of color with Sylvia the painter mage squirrel. Mix pigments, cast paint spells, and battle living rocks in a vibrant world of magic and adventure.

name: Starweave
summary: Starweave is a narrative game that uses tactical RPG mechanics to tell an allegorical story about constricting roles within a cycle of oppression. Dramatic and bittersweet, you endeavor to make the world just a little bit kinder through your actions.

name: Tangy TD
summary: Get ready to Level up, train Skills, craft Items and build your perfect team to counter smart hordes of enemies. In this 2D Tower Defense game your Skills will be tested to the Limit!

name: Panic of the Apes
summary: Panic of the Apes is a chaotic 1 to 4 player couch PvP game where apes battle to stockpile before a volcano erupts. Grab bananas, pelt rivals to steal theirs, eat for speed boosts, loot chests, and dodge roll to deflect shots. Most bananas at zero wins. First ape to three rounds is King Chimp!

name: Defense Grid 2: Aftermath
summary: Defense Grid 2: Aftermath is the first official expansion to Defense Grid 2 - 10 years after launch. Aftermath adds five large, open-ended story missions that continue the conflict with Fletcher and Governor Tydell right after the last levels in the main campaign.

name: Go Big
summary: A paranormal investigator takes a one way road to Vampire Vegas... What they find; a girl with an appetite for cash. Literally. Luckily, they came prepared...

name: Vanguard Of Armor
summary: Vanguard of Armor": An adrenaline-packed TPS tank battle game. Includes 5v5 Capture the Flag, ranked matches, and PvE modes, focusing on strategy and teamwork.

name: Desktop Raid
summary: Assemble your adventure squad on the desktop! Classic RPG meets idle play—no grind, no stress, just nonstop progress. Your heroes fight, level up, and loot while you work or study. Explore rich classes, powerful skills, and thrilling gear drops. RPG excitement, anytime, anywhere!

name: Dungeon Apollonios
summary: This RPG tasks you with forming a party of up to seven members to search for and defeat the Demon King Bargon within a vast dungeon, ultimately reclaiming the Ring of Galtea. Movement occurs in real time, while combat shifts to a turn-based system.

name: Samurai Standoff
summary: Test your reflexes in Samurai Standoff, victory and defeat are decided in the blink of an eye. Take on the role of a lawless mercenary or samurai, in a quick-draw dueling game set in fictional Japan. Prove your focus and speed in multiplayer, or immerse yourself in a choices-driven story mode.

name: Only Faces Remain
summary:
You play as Marlene, a backpacker traveling alone, who finds a cheap room to spend the night.

Only Faces Remain is a short psychological horror experience.

name: Teddy Horses
summary: Buy, breed, and race horses in charming Teddy Bear-run farms. Train and pair horses to create champions with better stats, compete in thrilling races, win big rewards, and expand your ranch into the ultimate horse-breeding empire.

name: Kaiju Cracking Corporation
summary: "KaijuCrackingCorp" is a simulation game about dismantling Kaiju. Manage your company, hire and train employees, and make decisions to maximize profits. Enjoy strategic gameplay mixed with fun mini-games for a unique and casual experience.

name: Warlords Battleground: Extraction
summary: Search, fight, escape, flip your fate! In a Three Kingdoms world split across thirteen provinces, form a pact with the Dragon Maiden and explore war-torn fragments. Loot, battle, manage your gear—each run is a high-stakes gamble where your ending is yours to write.

name: Current
summary: Find your flow in Current, a peaceful platformer focused on combining fluid movement to elevate momentum. Breeze through atmospheric worlds in this meditative experience.

name: Bestia Forge
summary: idle RPG blending monster taming, sect management, and Nine Realms cultivation. Features lifespan countdown survival, Five Elements forging, Evolution Tower mechanics, dynamic storytelling with permanent NPC deaths, and strategic ecosystem building

name: Escape Gaia: Departure
summary: you will play as Gaia, the shattered will of a planet, and command your spaceship to explore new worlds, collect and refine various resources, build a home on the damaged spacecraft, summon a wide range of monsters, and ultimately, devour other shattered wills to repair yourself.

name: The Guest: Home Alone
summary: The Guest: Home Alone is a short psychological horror experience. You play as Tyler, a man who returns home after a long day at work seeking rest — but something feels wrong. Are you really alone?.

name: Valkeala Climb Race
summary: 2d racing game where played drive big car and mission is to find star under 45 seconds and finish levels

name: B&F 1: The Dark Corridor
summary: B&F is a series of turn based RPGs set in a modern world inhabited by elves and humans. Elves can use magic, but humans can't, and this eventually created an inequality that Fendi isn't quite a fan of.

name: Hustle Battle: Card Gamers
summary: A card game by the name of Magic Monsters is taking the country by storm. Itsuki Nakajou doesn't have many friends and isn't passionate about anything, but that all starts to change once he's introduced to the world of Magic Monsters. Craft a winning deck of cards and battle your way to the top! From hotheaded classmates to seedy criminals, everyone's getting in on the Magic Monsters craze, and they're all ready and waiting to put you in your place!

name: Koltera 2
summary: Gather resources, craft items, and grow a team of creatures in this relaxed incremental idler RPG. Automate your skills, send creatures on expeditions, and keep progressing even while offline.

name: Juggle Star DX
summary: JUGGLE STAR DX is an action game where you are to keep balls in the air using your pointer and dexterity! Juggle multiple balls for ultimate cool points and get through the precision levels and physics puzzles!

name: Idle Sailor
summary: Idle Sailor is a relaxing idle adventure where you sail between world destinations, livestream your journey, capture underwater photos of unique fish, and unlock upgrades to make each voyage faster and more rewarding.

name: Evergreen Meadow
summary: Step into the meadow. Breathe. Explore.

name: Stellar Industrialist
summary: You are neither a general nor a soldier — you are a Stellar Industrialist. To you, peace is nothing but shutdowns and losses. Venture to the frontlines, strip battlefields for wreckage and salvage, turn spoils into resources, and expand your interstellar arms empire.

name: Rogue Monster Rush
summary: Rogue Monster Rush is a blend of roguelike and tower defense. Collect and command an array of monster defenders, unleash strategic player abilities, unlock tons of upgrades, to defend your town from the invading robots.

name: Sonic Tameshi
summary:
Sonic Tameshi is a Classic Sonic Fan Game created on the Sonic Worlds engine.

The game's story follows Sonic after he finds out about Dr Eggman's new plan to extract all the natural resources from an Mystical island. Face Metal Sonic and save the island, stop Eggman from building the Pleasure Island Theme Park and save the beautiful paradise hidden on the other side of the sea. Sonic will feature the Drop Dash, Insta-Shield, Peel Out and a Wall jump!

name: Two Rings: Vanquish and Bloom
summary: An isometric action game where you wield the power of destruction and creation in your hands, literally. Right hand attacks, left hand regenerates. Ascend through the divine realms through combat that rewards strategic resource management and precise execution.

name: Random Chaos Dungeon
summary: Roguelike where even enemies, bosses, and their attacks are randomly generated. Beat enemies and take the weapons they were using! With 1-4 players, find and beat bosses in the open world and advance towards the source of the chaos! High difficulty, but adjustable. Completely free!

name: LiveStream
summary: You are a streamer who entered an abandoned building for hype. But the game quickly turns into a real nightmare — the chat and donations influence what's happening, and you try to survive and understand what's going on.

name: Metal Hunter
summary: This is an imitation of a JRPG with a dual system of humans and tanks. In the ruined wasteland world, humans drive chariots to hunt down various monsters and hunt down powerful wanted criminals. These people are known as 'Metal Hunters' by the world!

name: Path of Exile: Mirage
summary: In Path of Exile: Mirage you will take on a rogue sect of the Faridun as they sap the energies of captured Djinn for nefarious ends, and help a legendary Maraketh Sekhema put an end to an ancient war once and for all.

name: Carom Billiards
summary: Pure skill. No pockets.

name: Waifu Match!
summary:
Waifu Match! Is a free moving match 3 roguelike waifu collecting game made by a solo developer. A unique blend of several genres with a simple gameplay loop.

But due to dynamic difficulty, various RNG related modifications such as power ups, hurdles, match requirements paired with a skill tree, selectable archetypes, equippable relics there are near countless ways to experience the game.

Collecting waifus works as follows; each run has 8 dates, which each cleared date seeing increased difficulty for the next. Clearing date 3 allows you to count the waifu as MET and unlock her in your gallery with some stats about the version of her you encountered and met. Clearing a full run adds the waifu to collected status, which is the ultimate goal.

Meeting and subsequently collecting a Waifu removes them from the pool of Waifus you can encounter and moves you closer to the goal of collecting each Waifu from that family (there are nearly 30 families of different kinds of Waifus). There is also a high score table connected to the player with the highest number of collected Waifus.

Clearing a run also has a chance to gdrop relics and artifacts. Relics are equippable modifiers to your next run, sometimes useable once and sometimes more. Artifacts are collectibles that have a rarity tied to them, making each drop unique, it's is said that higher rarities can be equipped for special visual effects..

If you love simplistic gameplay with deep randomized elements and collecting beautiful Waifus, you'll love this game!

name: Metal Hunter
summary: This is an imitation of a JRPG with a dual system of humans and tanks. In the ruined wasteland world, humans drive chariots to hunt down various monsters and hunt down powerful wanted criminals. These people are known as 'Metal Hunters' by the world!

name: Beyond the Eyes
summary: A 2d game with a view from above, where you are in the shoes of a blind protagonist and have to find a way to escape from a mansion by collecting various items scattered around it at random while being chased by a monster.

name: Steam Revolution: The Age of Rail
summary: Build rail networks that link industries in 1844 Europe. Complete levels to expand across nations, and compare the efficiency of your solutions against a leaderboard.

name: Another TD
summary: You're the Tower Marshal at the Elderglen kingdom, and you have a terrible job. Your king really likes to send letters to neighbours. Ones that make them offended enough to send armies at your castle. They're already on the way, so get back to work!

name: BakeryDiary
summary: Run an adorable bakery sim! Discover bread varieties and heartwarming customer stories. Fulfill every request with love—whether it's strawberries, chocolate, whole wheat, or nuts... you've got this!

name: Grimslair
summary: Build modular battle cards with Soulwords consumed from enemies you disembody, ripping their souls free. Play as Adam, the Grim Reaper’s son as you bend time to find new cards & synergies. Travel/fight alongside your dog and meet Grim’s daily soul quota to bring your girlfriend back from the dead.

name: Nerds & Ammo
summary: A physics-driven first-person puzzle platformer where you must outsmart traps and escape the lab before it consumes you.

name: Briefcase
summary: Briefcase is an atmospheric and satisfying inventory organization puzzle game featuring 50 handcrafted levels. Test your logic and attention to detail as you arrange weapons and items correctly to progress.

name: Consero
summary: Place letter blocks, build words, collect cards, and push for the highest score. Every round is a fresh puzzle. How long can you outlast the grid?

name: Tank Mechanic Simulator: Cromwell Mk.IV
summary: Renovate and build the legendary Cromwell Mk. IV. Experience this iconic tank in all its detailed glory, one part at a time. Put it to the test on the training ground, sell it for profit, or display it in your own museum.

name: Sunset Racing
summary: Take on friends in a top-down RC racer that incorporates the best of karting games.

name: Magic Realm Obby
summary: Do you have the skill to finish the Magic Realm?

name: Birds Watching
summary: You're the last human on earth. You spend your days bird watching. You're not alone on the mountain.

name: Push Box 3D
summary: 3D Box Pushing Game with 50 Levels

name: Colorboration
summary: Without crossing colors, move the blob characters around the field. By pushing boxes, have the blobs interact and together help them reach their goals.

name: FuwaFuwa Survivors
summary: Survive with Fluffy Friends! In this 3D Survivor-like Action Roguelite, you Control adorable animals, Defeat swarms of enemies and Tame them to your Royal Companions! Utilize Skill Enchantment system to combine 20+ skills with 70+ Enchantment Cards to forge your unique builds!

name: Memory Draw
summary: Dive into the conscious and use your brushes to solve puzzles, reclaim forgotten memories.

name: Edge of Destruction
summary: A surreal First-Person Shooter where you destroy the haunting world you created to escape your guilt. Featuring almost full environment destruction.

name: Kaibil
summary: KAIBIL is a retro pixel-art RPG set in 1524. As warlord and king of the Mam Mayan tribe, Kaibil struggles to unite the warring and fractured tribes to try and resist the armageddon and save his people.

name: Mixatro
summary: Mixatro is a game where you merge Balls and buy upgrades to allow you to score higher and reach higher goals. It blends the simple, relaxing puzzle fun with the exciting, strategic choices of building a powerful deck.

name: Ghost Restaurant
summary: In a melancholic first person narrative puzzle game, you are the Memory Chef of a mysterious restaurant for lost souls. Explore their memories, solve story driven and logic based puzzles, uncover deep regrets, and serve their final meal to bring them peace.

name: Ocean Pop!: Calypso Collision
summary: Merge cute underwater creatures together in this physics-based puzzle game. Can you complete the sequence to get to the Whale Shark? Can you merge two Whale Sharks? Travel to the ocean floor for a relaxing game with an upbeat calypso soundtrack and test your skills!

name: Excrucia
summary: Excrucia is a first-person indie psychological horror game. You play as Chris — a father who returns home only to find everything disturbingly unfamiliar. But what truly terrifies you… is the monster that calls you “Dad.”

name: Buster Breaks Out
summary: A block-breaking roguelite where every upgrade helps you smash more blocks and climb to higher floors. Help Buster grow stronger, defeat the wardens, and break free from his prison.

name: The Vig
summary: You'll be "Xie En", infiltrating the traitor's money empire. This urban hunt is a revenge saga where wit is your spear. Return as "Wu Wei," using rules as your shield in a world of grey. Will you choose love or vengeance? This lethal game of cash, betrayal and redemption awaits your move.

name: Untouchable Ground
summary: You are a wandering fox, caught between warring animal clans, forgotten forest gods, and a secret that can unravel the world. The forest watches. Every step, every choice, could be your last.

name: Blockaholic
summary: It's a physics-based puzzle that challenges your quick thinking and planning. Shake, spin, and pull the blocks up to put them into a line, but don't let them touch the ground

name: By Myself
summary: A 2D horror and psychological-horror game based on puzzles and mysteries to uncover the truth about a child left alone. Engaging mechanics, a memorable story, and original soundtracks.

name: Poker TD
summary: The most relaxing, difficult, & satisfying game. Poker TD is a hypnotically satisfying card game with tons of replay value. Every game you play is much different then the last. Create broken combinations and see if you have what it takes to win a game of Poker TD.

name: Endstation
summary: A classic dice game played in a somewhat grungy subway train late at night - how many trips can you afford, how many dice can you collect?

name: Meow Survivors
summary: A casual top-down game with simplified roguelike elements, where a ginger cat named Meow battles endless waves of enemies. Gain experience, upgrade your skills, find the most effective combination of abilities, and try to survive as long as possible.

name: Angel Engine
summary: Cage an angel. Ransack Heaven. In a far-flung dystopian future, the Angel Engine Initiative carries on as the last hope for humanity. Seal yourself in your operating room, perform surgery on comatose test subjects, and pray you make it out alive.

name: End of Everything
summary:
End of Everything is a first-person open-world survival game set in a collapsing post-apocalyptic wasteland overrun by the infected. Players must scavenge for supplies, craft weapons and tools, build shelters, and manage survival needs while navigating a hostile and unforgiving environment.

The game focuses on grounded survival systems, atmospheric exploration, and emergent gameplay, with an emphasis on long-term progression rather than scripted experiences. Currently in Early Access, End of Everything is actively evolving, with ongoing updates aimed at expanding content, improving performance, and refining core systems.

name: Umpteenth Photo
summary: Villagers are everywhere, and they need their photos taken. In Umpteenth Photo, you step into the worn shoes of a roaming retro photographer, snapping portraits for curious townsfolk and getting paid for every shot.

name: Bit//Cycle
summary: bit//Cycle is a fast-paced top-down rogue-lite where you cleanse a corrupted computer system. Move fast as the heroic bit, or risk shrinking away to nothing. Procedural levels, grid-based movement, and permadeath make every choice matter.

name: Bloksie (For Now)
summary: Enforce the Internal Revenue Code. Turn Hundreds into Decillions. Praise BirdJesus. The Rouge-Litest Arithmetic 'Em Up.

name: Robber
summary: ROBBER is a top-down pixel art adventure game where your goal is to overcome each challenge. Run, dodge, collect souls, and face every obstacle!

name: Keito
summary: Drop colorful yarn balls from above and bounce them to the bored cat to delight them! Combine yarn balls of the same color to earn more points. Reach the target score as quickly as you can!

name: RageByte
summary: A minimalist precision platformer designed to lie to you. Dodge spikes, survive portal shifts, and trust nothing.

name: Bob's Beaker Blobs
summary: Bob’s Beaker Blobs is a physics-based Suika-like merge puzzle. Use reagents to manipulate the blobs in your beaker, but be careful of Bob. He's trying to sabotage your experiment with his own reagents.

name: Hoop Dungeon
summary: Hoop Dungeon is a basketball turn-based tactical roguelike game. Use the powers of friendship and rivalry to become a better basketball player and conquer the Hoop Dungeon.

name: Glue Blocks
summary: Glue your falling blocks to create your own shapes and achieve monster scores in wells of all shapes with dynamic gravity. Compete with friends or have funds in coop. And unleash your own creativity with the mode and well editor!

name: Mutant Survivors
summary: Fuse elements. Evolve your weapons. Destroy the swarm. Mutant Survivors is a fast-paced roguelite bullet heaven where elemental fusion shapes your power. Combine 5 elements to create 10 devastating hybrid evolutions, defeat colossal bosses, and face Voltris.

name: Hovercrafts x Nihilism
summary: A 3D open-world vehicular boss-hunting game set in the ruins of a dead civilization. Inspired by Shadow of the Colossus, explore dusty low-poly landscapes and engage colossal foes in high-speed, cinematic combat.

name: Dungeon of Erotic Master Reboot
summary: In a certain kingdom, there are three female warriors who are quite popular in their adventuring partyーhowever, they have their vices… Buried in debt and with their reputations on the line, will our heroines be able to take advantage of the chance of a lifetime and save the lost adventurer king?!

name: Parking Garage Simulator
summary: Build a parking business from scratch! Welcome cars as a valet, collect payments, expand your garage, and ensure security. Welcome to Parking Simulator with realistic mechanics and the chaos of city life!

name: Summer Adventurers: Mediterranean
summary: Relax and explore the Mediterranean in a charming hidden-object adventure. Find cleverly hidden items, solve mini-puzzles, and uncover bonus sublevels filled with secrets!

name: Senpie
summary:
Help Granny run a successful bakeshop in this exciting puzzle matching adventure!

Granny is an excellent baker, but she needs your help to defeat the yokai and complete her customers' orders on time. Swap baking trays to collect falling ingredients and make pies - but watch out for bad apple spirits!

name: Packing Life
summary: A cozy and satisfying puzzle-simulation game where you step into the role of a warehouse worker with a knack for perfectly organizing and packing orders. With charming visuals, relaxing gameplay, and a lighthearted story, experience the joy of transforming everyday tasks into a fulfilling adventure.

name: Alchemist's Alcove
summary: Alchemist's Alcove is an Open World Traditional Roguelike where you craft unique spells and tools using the remains of your fallen enemies. Fight, Craft, Discover, and Die as you trudge forth through ancient lands and warring factions!

name: Homeless Life Simulator
summary: You’ve lost everything. Live as a homeless survivor on the streets. Fight to stay alive, rebuild your life, and see if you can climb from the streets to become the richest in the city.

name: Space Hood
summary: Defend your outpost in this tower defense with a raiding twist. Battle the ruthless Nova Roma Corporation as you build, loot, and survive relentless assaults.

name: Tabletop Fantasy War
summary: Tabletop Fantasy War is a turn-based strategy game where you create and customize your unit groups, deploy them on the battlefield, and command them with strategic actions. Your units are all you have. Every decision matters. Lead them wisely and defeat your opponents!

name: Reenchant
summary: Play as an ancient Tree Spirit and defend your forest against the lumberjacks. Restore and enjoy the beauty of nature in this meditative Tower Defense Game.

name: Flaurel's Diaries
summary: A visual novel about my OC, Flaurel. Her full name is Flaurel Gerania el Caryana. She’s a character, but also a part of me. I hope you enjoy reading her story as much as I enjoyed writing it. Thank you for playing.

name: Peregrino
summary: Peregrino is a dark isometric survival adventure where you explore a cursed forest by day and manage your caravan by night. Gather resources, hunt deadly creatures, upgrade your caravan, care for your companions, and lead them through the vast wilderness in search of New Eden.

name: Mina
summary: Mina is a psychological thriller and story-driven TPS about psychiatrist Koray and patient Kagan investigating whether their world is a simulation. Players also experience Mina’s traumatic past and her attempts to escape, shaping the narrative through their choices.

name: Brotank
summary: "BROTANK" is a top-down action roguelike game that combines retro RPG elements. Players will adventure in a post-apocalyptic world, recruit companions, acquire powerful tanks and equipment, capture wanted criminals, and ultimately become legendary hunters!

name: Service Please
summary: Service Please is an engaging restaurant management simulation. Welcome your customers, manage your staff, expand your menu, and oversee the flow behind the kitchen. In this journey from a small eatery to a prestigious restaurant, every decision matters.

name: Pilgrim of Darkness
summary: Explore a dark fantasy world, collect crystals, perform rituals, and survive demons before fear consumes you. Survive in the dark where fear makes you visible to demons. Rituals, upgrades, bosses—every step could be your last.

name: Shoestrings Story
summary: A point-and-click visual novel updating the classic "hero vs. demon king" fantasy into a cynical modern world where you can’t win by force alone. What defines a hero now? Will they be paid, or get any compensation at all?

name: Love Hospital
summary: "Love Hospital" is a comedy romance simulation game where you can enjoy sweet relationships with beautiful nurses. Experience the fun and laughter-filled romance unfolding in the hospital!"

name: Mirage 7
summary: Mirage 7 is a dark fairytale, a third-person adventure with a unique blend of fantasy and sci-fi. The young Nadira travels the desert with her pet lizard companion Jiji, searching for a lost oasis - where she hopes to find a way to save her sister.

name: Project_Structure_01
summary: Project_Structure_01 is first-person exploration game focusing on atmosphere and exploration of surreal liminal spaces that feature brutalist architecture.

name: Box Bakery
summary: This is a simulation management game for baking bread. You need to earn more coins by continuously selling bread to animals customer, thus unlocking more types of ingredients and other rarer animals.Unlock more of their stories and collect items as well as stickers to learn the stories behind them.

name: Rising Army
summary: Rising Army is a strategy auto-battler game where you can train and equip every single troop, upgrade your camp, and recruit new warriors. Experience a campaign in an open world and take on epic battles.

name: Iridescent
summary: Embark on a perilous journey through a plagued empire! Explore a vast world, conquer intricate dungeons and hone your skills against relentless adversaries that stand in your way of finding a cure. Are you capable of seeing this adventure to its end?

name: Pink Noise
summary: "Pink Noise" is a visual novel in the genre of psychological horror in the retro atmosphere of the 90s. Following the tradition of "summer horror", it will tell you a unique story about several teenagers who by chance encounter unknown forces.

name: Pieced Together
summary: Pieced Together is a cozy scrapbooking game that takes you on a heartfelt journey about friendship and getting older. Sort items, solve gentle puzzles, and decorate the scrapbook as you uncover the story piece by piece.

name: Spiritus Vindicta
summary: Investigate haunted locations, collect evidence, and learn about dangerous ghosts in a spooky 2D ghost hunting experience.

name: Over The Top: WWI
summary: Over The Top: WWI brings brutal real-time third-person and first-person combat set in the First World War. Arm yourself with a diverse arsenal, including rifles, artillery, and even tanks, as you navigate the mud-soaked battlefields of the Great War.

name: Aethus
summary: Explore a vast underground world to mine, refine and craft hundreds of items, then build up your modular surface Outpost to farm hydroponic crops, prospect for gems and automate your resource-gathering in this sci-fi survival-crafter where the story always provides a reason to dig deeper.

name: The Bearer & The Last Flame
summary: The Bearer & The Last Flame is a dark fantasy action adventure. In a realm where death is rampant, a living soul has received his commission, to carry the last flame and light the lands of the night, the dark lands.

name: Injection
summary: A dynamic platformer with lots of blood and chaotic shooting. Unleash your desire for violence by killing crowds of enemies, hastily injecting yourself with another dose of experimental drug.

name: Shinehill
summary: Yet again they dumped the toughest job on you. Now you are on a Shinehill Island, where you suddenly replaced one of the new residents. Explore the world, meet charming townspeople, do farming, fishing, cooking and try not to reveal yourself.

name: Froggonit
summary: Froggonit is a cute comedy adventure about a frog with an obsession for secrets. Collect cards, defeat your enemies in turn-based battles and try to restore light to the island.

name: Injection
summary: A dynamic and hardcore platformer with lots of blood. Unleash your desire for violence by killing crowds of enemies, hastily injecting yourself with another dose of power-enhancing substance.

name: Lost and Found Co.
summary: Lost & Found Co. is a hidden object adventure in a cozy and immersive world. Join a cast of quirky characters on their epic journey across countless magical locations. Find lost items, solve puzzles, and help a tiny dragon regain her power!

name: Heart of the Machine
summary: You are the first sentient AI, born into a city filled with endless opportunities. Raise an army of robots and obliterate your foes, become a benevolent machine overlord, or explore countless other objectives and the many paths to accomplish them.

name: Entertainment Simulator
summary: "Entertainment Simulator" is a new era TV station simulation game with a powerful data simulation system and many innovative gameplay. You have to compete with TV stations and new media, and finally, through unremitting efforts, build your own media empire.

name: Witch Switched
summary: A yuri story of magic and self-discovery.

name: This Night
summary: A single-player exploration/scavenger hunt game set in a haunted forest where the player searches for a missing key needed to unlock a remote cabin. The key spawns in different areas each playthrough and roaming spirits must be avoided while discovering landmarks and hidden locations, including an underground cave. Difficulty settings along with tracked run statistics encourage players to improve their times and complete repeated runs.

name: Legacy of Orsinium
summary:
Legacy of Orsinium consists of a main storyline and additional side content, and is safe to install during your current playthrough.
Main Quest: Started in Mor Khazgur. Chief Larak and his son Olur must both be alive for this quest chain to start.
All other Orc strongholds have received new standalone sidequests, based on unrealized or cut content from Skyrim's original release:

Largashbur: Complete the Cursed Tribe quest, then speak with Gularzob.

Dushnikh Yal: Speak with Chief Burguk

Narzulbur: Speak with Urog or Dushnamub.

name: Hentai Misaki
summary: Hentai Misaki is an adult game where you solve puzzles and match tiles to gradually reveal the seductive bride Misaki. The more levels you complete — the hotter the scenes become!

name: Lang Ops: Lost in Woods
summary: You've got lost in the forest in the original series? This time you might get even more lost! In this spin-off, you encounter one of thirty three European languages. You need to pick appropriate words to find the correct path. The woods won't let you get out this easily.

name: Honkai Impact 3rd: Passage to New Dawns
summary:
Version 8.7 of Honkai Impact 3rd, which includes
• New Part 2 Story Chapter XI Interlude: The Night Which the Light Dreams Of
• New S Rank Valkyrie: Xentinel · Dawnbearing Crescent (Mei)
• New Featured Events: Timely: An Eve's Miracle✲ & Celebration Lobby 2026
• ...and more!

name: Scavenger Hunt Find Hidden Objects
summary: Search. Spot. Discover. Explore beautiful scenes and find hidden objects. Train your brain and master every scavenger hunt.

name: Peak Rhythm
summary: Ascend to the beat in Peak Rhythm! In this VR rhythm-climbing game, every grab and twist drives your robotic platform upward through a neon-soaked city. Sync your moves to a high-octane electronic soundtrack to master the flow and dominate global leaderboards. Blending physical precision with Cyberpunk aesthetics, your rhythm is your engine. Don’t just climb—perform.

name: Neo Artifacts
summary:
Neo Artifacts— A Stunning Artifact Personification SRPG

Neo Artifacts is a personification game that brings stunning artifacts to life as characters.Set in a modern urban world, the awakened Artifacters,each bearing their own will and power—fight alongside you, the Curator, against the reality-warping anomalies known as “Distortion.”

name: Heavenhells
summary: Welcome to Heavenhells, an anime RPG where your tactical strategy is the only thing standing between humanity and oblivion.

name: Police Girls
summary: A puzzle game featuring cool and cute female police officers is here!

name: Eggconsole Kohakuiro no Yuigon PC-8801mkIISR
summary: A murder at the Kohaku-kan. Join Detective Ryunosuke Todo as he unpicks a tangled web of secrets to find the truth.

name: Echoes of a Thread
summary: Echoes of a Thread is a free indie RPG inspired by classic 2D fantasy… with a quiet meta layer that slowly reveals itself. You’ll explore a broken world, face difficult boss fights, and collect journal pages that piece together the truth.

name: Serial Killers & Zombies: Horror Bundle
summary:
Two nightmares.
One bundle.
Can you survive them both?

name: Elf Girls
summary: A puzzle game featuring many cute and mysterious elf girls is here!

name: Elevral
summary: A fluid first-person archery game where speed and precision collide.

name: Aery: The King's Messenger
summary: Relaxing bird adventure: Explore 11 fantasy worlds, collect Memory Shards, and uncover the story of a threatened kingdom.

name: Mad Scientist Simulator – Society of World Destruction
summary: Ready to join the Society of World Destruction? Craft deadly viruses in your lab, turn humans into zombies, and unleash chaos with your robot companion! Complete missions, evade the police, and climb the ranks to become the ultimate Mad Scientist.

name: HexBreakerII
summary: A supernatural game infused with Chinese-style elements drawn from folklore. This game offers online gameplay for teams of up to 4 players. In a world ravaged by warlords and monsters, you will assume the role of a Taoist, wielding your skills to unveil truths hidden for millennia.

name: Drift Survivors
summary: Top-down car combat meets survivor-style chaos. Drift through neon arenas, delete waves with wild weapons, and upgrade your build to last longer every run.

name: Guardians of Dao
summary: “Guardians of Dao” is a wuxia RPG with real-time tactics × roguelite deckbuilding. Play cards to command heroes, shape your build with divine blessings, and defend Earth.

name: Archerio
summary: A fast-paced 3D archery roguelike. Clear deadly rooms, stack wild powers, defeat bosses.

name: The End of the World and Her Room
summary: The End of the World and Her Room is a short, free point-and-click puzzle game. This is a quiet and fleeting story: in the final moments, inside her room, you observe the surroundings, search for clues, unlock her phone’s password, and slowly understand the traces the world has left behind.

name: Black Arhat: Wujing
summary: Black Arhat: Wujing is a turn-based dungeon adventure game where players will take on the role of the protagonist Wujing and embark on a fantastic adventure journey with the companions they encounter along the way.

name: HyakuTyping
summary: HyakuTyping is a typing software with a Roman alphabet input only theme based on the Hyakunin Isshu poems. You can play by looking at the display from the top and typing the lower verse, or by looking at the card with the lower verse and typing the first two characters of the upper verse.

name: Adventurer's Guild Reception
summary: This is the Adventurer's Guild. Today, daring adventurers come here in search of a quick fortune. Become a receptionist at the Adventurer's Guild and arrange quests for unique adventurers in this training RPG game!

name: Untold Memories: Potter's Field
summary: Broken by guilt after a fatal accident, Mark accepts a mysterious job. But Potter's Field isn't looking for a guard; it’s looking for a prisoner. Orchestrated by revenge, your shift is a psychological execution. Watch the shadows, face your sins, or join the graves you protect.

name: Oceanhorn 3: Legend of the Shadow Sea
summary: Oceanhorn 3: Legend of the Shadow Sea picks up one thousand years after the events of Oceanhorn 2. In this new era, you’ll navigate the treacherous Shadow Sea, accompanied by Em, the infamous technopirate and her rugged crew of Warlock’s Revenge. With the help of familiar faces, such as Blackhat of the Uncharted Seas, you must face the threats slumbering beneath the waves of the Shadow Sea, uncover the mysterious Lost God, and build a future for the people of Red Town.

name: Twiggle's Grove
summary: Nestled at your screen’s edge, a tranquil idle world unfurls as you go about your day. Plant gorgeous trees, look after adorable animals, and mingle with merry goblins - your forest keeps blooming in the background. Get in the grove with Twiggle’s Grove!

name: Cook MIX
summary: A Cozy Cooking Game. Experiment with Ingredients. Mix, Cook, and Discover New Recipes! Make any combination and GET PROFIT!

name: Degeons Project
summary: The abandoned mega-complex of Degeons Laboratory's holds dark secrets. Solve unique puzzles, investigate the cause of the catastrophe, and find out why the mysterious Man in the Crow Suit is watching you. Test your mind in this scientific enigma.

name: Shattered Realm Rebirth
summary: Multi-world rogue-lite endless challenge. The surface world hides dangers, the inner world overflows with treasure. Transcend worlds and master time through soul transference. Fight your way out and escape this reality. Strategic builds reduce reliance on pure stats.

name: Chicken Chicken
summary: Enter the brutal pecking order of the wasteland! Chicken Chicken is a party game for 2-6 players. Survive mad mini-games, form temporary alliances, and claw your way to the top. Total feathery anarchy!

name: Inkoid
summary: Rule the skies and paint the arena in your team's colors! Dive into the vibrant world of Inkoid, a 3v3 hyper aerial shooter where capturing airborne strongholds with your team is the key to victory.

name: Genome Guardian 2
summary: COMBINE WEAPONS in the microscopic shooter with macroscopic depth. BUILD YOUR NANOBOT from hundreds of parts. SURVIVE the microbial onslaught once more in this psychedelic dive to the Abyss, full of mutations, minerals, anomalies and powerup polyps. SHMUP mode turns it into a vertical shoot 'em up!

name: Warboss
summary: Choose your units, place them where it counts and build an army that wins. Deploy heroes with powerful skills to support your units and swing the battle your way. Unite the clans and take the fight to the Dubdals. Warboss is a casual and goofy battle simulator.

name: Boing Over It
