summary: PUZKIN: Magnetic Odyssey invites players to explore a vibrant, magical world where magnetic energy sustains the balance of nature and creatures called Puzzies. Players, embodying chosen children, are transported to this mysterious realm to restore its harmony through epic adventures, collaborative construction, and immersive quests.

name: Ghetto Zombies: Graffiti Squad
summary: Expect blasts of green zombie goo painting the screen in this top-down shooter packed with crazy guns that blow the heads off some… freaky zombies. Your mission is simple: graffiti the whole city before these mutants dog-pile you.

name: Umbra Lumen
summary: Roguelike Deckbuilder meets puzzle gameplay. Collect tarot cards and mystic items as you face unpredictable events, meet memorable characters, and explore the beyond life. Each run is different, and every decision matters. Will you ascend or fall in this unique turn-based RPG?

name: Bomboban
summary: Bomboban is a classic Sokoban-style puzzle game with an explosive twist: instead of pushing crates, you push enemy robots into bombs to defeat them and clear each stag

name: Digimon Story: Time Stranger - Additional Digimon & Episode Pack 2: Gaku-Ran
summary: In this Digimon Story Time Stranger DLC, five new digivolution paths for Mega Digimon are unlocked, granting players a special story woven from encounters that transcend time and space separately from the main storyline.

name: Game With Balls
summary: Game With Balls! Move the Steam Deck to navigate through handcrafted mazes.

name: SkyLeap
summary: SkyLeap is a non-stop VR parkour action game where your only goal is to climb higher and higher. Use jumps, a grappling hook, and telekinesis to flow through a vertical world built for speed and movement.

name: Journey to the Void
summary: Prepare to fend off attacks from all directions in this hybrid strategy roguelite deck builder. On your journey through varied grid-based biomes, battle unique foes and make tough moral choices to restore a corrupted land and decide the fate of your world.

name: Dark Auction
summary: The game is a mystery adventure centering on the idea of a historical figure having surreptitiously bequeathed a fictitious estate, following the drama that plays out among the characters faced with an enigma extending all the way into their modern world.

name: The Midnight Walkers
summary: Fight, Scavenge, and Extract in The Midnight Walkers, a hardcore FPS game with deadly zombies, dangerous players, and valuable loot. Craft weapons, armor, and consumables; trade items; and maintain your hideout. Escape Liberty Grand Center mega complex, and thrive...or die and lose everything.

name: 5omeday
summary: You have been assigned to guard a dragon girl set to be executed at the end of 5 days and have the ability to kill her instantly at any time with the push of a button in this multi-ending visual novel.

name: Disgaea Mayhem
summary:
Disgaea Mayhem is a brand-new 3D action RPG from an all-star team consisting of director Shunsuke Minowa, character designer Takehito Harada, and composer Tenpei Sato.

In this game, players will be able to experience the exhilaration of defeating enemies with overwhelming power that defies convention—unleashing flashy techniques with simple controls, completionist elements like leveling characters up to 9,999 and “reincarnating” them to grow even stronger, and developing overpowered stats that let them deal over a billion damage.

name: Ufophilia
summary: UFOPHILIA is a first-person psychological horror game where you explore areas marked by alien phenomena. Use specialized equipment to detect, identify, and photograph aliens—but do so at your own risk... They are watching you too.

name: Space Warlord Baby Trading Simulator
summary: Buy low, sell high, and short an entire universe of babies in this arcade stock market sim set in the world of Space Warlord Organ Trading Simulator.

name: Folklore Hunter
summary: You are a hunter world reknowned for slaying supernatural beasts. Your next contract is to hunt down a wendigo plaguing a section of woods in north america. Gather resources, set traps, prepare your equipment, use your hunters instincts and take down the beast, before it hunts you.

name: Spirit & Steel
summary:
The spirits of a remote volcanic island have lived in balance for generations, until William Von Pingleton III arrives with a mining army and a plan to turn them into fuel for his machines. When his first attack knocks the island’s shaman, Ila, off her feet, the spirits answer with a gift: the power to command the elements themselves.

In Spirit & Steel, you play as Ila, a short but stubborn 70-year-old shaman who hits harder than she looks. Swap between elemental fists, chain melee combos, and weave in dashes and air movement to outplay swarms of mechanical enemies in tight, focused combat encounters. Every arena asks you to use your full toolkit; knock foes back with wind, pull them in with crashing waves, and burn through armored threats with searing fire.

As you fight deeper into the island, lush beaches and sacred temples slowly clash with scaffolding, smokestacks, and churning machinery.

Your journey builds toward a final showdown with Pingleton in his volcanic stronghold, where you’ll put all of your unlocked elements to the test. Defeat him, free the captured spirits, and restore the island’s balance, or watch it disappear under steel.

name: Kuky Adventure
summary: Help Kuky, a curious character who gets lost in the Candy World and must travel through colorful environments to find the way back home. Along the journey, collect candies and face strange sugar-made enemies such as marshmallows, cookies, and other living, dangerous sweets.

name: Starsand Island
summary: Leave the hustle of the city behind and embrace life on Starsand Island. Fish, farm, raise animals, and befriend or fall in love with locals to learn their secrets. Customize your world with our DIY system, and invite friends to help build your dream paradise!

name: Pure Pool Pro
summary: Welcome to Pure Pool Pro; the ultimate pool simulation. Play solo or online, master every game type, and compete in high-stakes tournaments in immersive venues. Experience breathtaking 8K native visuals, lifelike physics, and pinpoint-precise controls.

name: High on Life 2
summary: An intergalactic conspiracy threatens the fate of humanity! Team up with a wide cast of talking alien guns as you shoot, stab, and skate your way through the exotic locales to take down the bad guys and save your favorite species (humans)!

name: RD Racing
summary:
RD Racing is a casual combat racing game where speed and firepower decide who survives. Compete in intense top-down races, destroy rival drivers, earn cash, and upgrade your vehicle to dominate the competition.

Inspired by the classic Death Rally game, the game brings back the thrill of arcade vehicular combat — but with a modern twist and colorful 3D cartoon-style graphics. Fast races, explosive weapons, and strategic upgrades create a chaotic and addictive gameplay loop.

Win races. Eliminate opponents. Build the ultimate combat machine.

name: Norse: Oath of Blood
summary:
Norse is a turn-based tactics and combat game for PC and console. Set against the rich backdrop of the Viking Age, join Gunnar, a young warrior, on a relentless quest for revenge across the rugged landscapes of Norway.

Build a thriving settlement, govern your community, forge alliances, grow strong, and win the favour of the gods. For this is a time when legends are forged in the fires of conflict, and only the brave are remembered.

Written by prize-winning and Sunday Times bestselling author Giles Kristian, Norse is set in a fully realised historical world, driven by a compelling narrative and brimming with memorable characters.

name: Fur Squadron Phoenix
summary: Embark on an action-packed adventure in this on-rails space shooter. As a trainee pilot, you will fight in strange virtual worlds. Master your ship, upgrade your skills and protect the federation from an imminent threat. Are you up for the challenge?

name: Harvest Cafe
summary: Explore, grow, repair and cook delicious food! Harvest Cafe combines an open-world adventure with a restaurant business simulation, giving you the opportunity to enjoy farm life.

name: Demon Tides
summary: Explore the open seas and uncover the kingdom's dark secrets as you expressively platform your way across dozens of locales, upgrading your gear every step of the way!

name: Manairons
summary: Manairons is a 3D action platformer game inspired by the legends of little creatures living in the Pyrenees. Help Nai face off against the landowner who has taken control of a charming village using the power of the "canut," with magic, flute, and plenty of chaos.

name: Gear.Club Unlimited 3
summary: The Gear.Club series is back! Customize and set up your favourite cars to race at top speed along the roads of the French Mediterranean coast and Japan. Don't just win – show off your style!

name: Ultrapool
summary: The pool bar is always open! Ultrapool is a colorful roguelike about playing pool with a bunch of wacky balls with crazy effects. Carefully craft a perfect build and get the craziest trickshots!

name: Fixer Undercover
summary: Welcome to DIY Espionage - a VR puzzle adventure where everyday tools and found objects become your problem-solving kit. Go undercover as a repair worker inside a prison, investigate a mysterious rehabilitation program through various challenges, and make your escape with the truth.

name: The Legend of Khiimori
summary: The Legend of Khiimori is a system-driven game where you explore the untamed land of 13th century Mongolia as a brave courier rider. Breed and train horses with specialized abilities to explore every aspect of this diverse and fascinating landscape.

name: Homura Hime
summary: "Homura Hime" is a third person action game, featuring Japanese anime visuals and intense 3D bullet curtain gameplay. Alongside Homurahime, fight against Demon Girls possessed by deviant "emotions", and get closer to discovering the truth of not only the fallen, but also your own veiled legacy.

name: iRacing Arcade
summary: Race across global licensed series and build your own racing team to secure your motorsport legacy in this third person arcade racer.

name: Rager
summary: Immerse yourself in the adrenaline-fueled excitement of this melee combat rhythm game! Master weapon of your choice – sword, mace, claws, hammer, axe, your own fists and many more! Stunning visuals and spatial audio technology puts you right in heart of the action.

name: RoadOut
summary:
The world is dominated by an A.I. and rebel groups take refuge in a desert area known as the DeadZone.

Claire survives by executing delivery, sabotage and murder contracts for local leaders, while discovering about her past, revealing strange evidence that links her existence with the origin of the A.I.

name: Wraith Ops
summary: Wraith Ops is a fast-paced FPS shooter focusing on satisfying gunplay and back-to-basics playstyle. Its main goal is to bring together objective-based gameplay with a focus on teamwork, fast movement, snappy combat and more realistic/tactical features loved by many. Learning from its peers, we believe that realistic features and gameplay elements can work not only by putting obstacles in your way but by helping you overcome them, enhance the experience and improve your immersion.

name: John Carpenter's Toxic Commando
summary: Take control of one of the commandos, team up with your friends and send the Sludge God and its horde of things-that-should-never-be back to the underworld. Choose the class that matches your playstyle, pile into your favorite ride, and unload an array of gunfire, grenades, special abilities, and freaking katanas as you save the planet.

name: Neon Runner
summary: Test yourself on the neon lit tracks of Neon Runner. A fast paced runner style game that requires speed and precision to complete all levels as quickly as possible and set a high score.

name: Stellar Wanderer DX
summary: Stellar Wanderer DX is an old-school space combat sim set in a vast open-world universe. Follow the story or choose your favorite side missions as a mercenary fighter pilot. Explore the galaxy, upgrade your ship and weapons, trade resources and fight outlaws.

name: Collector's Cove
summary: Set sail on a cozy farming adventure aboard your boat in Collector's Cove. Explore diverse climate zones with your animal companion and discover a multitude of rare crops and fish. Enjoy cozy solitude while completing your Collector's compendium and rise to the rank of a Named Collector.

name: Solateria
summary: In a world where the Litt have perished, a small pyron warrior embarks on a journey to find the King, the Primordial Flame, the last hope to save the world. Defeat mighty foes, unleash fiery attacks, and master parrying. Explore a beautifully hand-drawn world and uncover its secrets.

name: Rolling Ball Game DX: Director's Cut
summary: Rolling Ball Game returns with Rolling Ball Game DX: Director's Cut! Traverse through obstacles and avoid the capsule-bots trying to knock you off the stage. Featuring all new and remastered levels, alongside extra content.

name: Tezzel: The Tilemaker's Tale
summary: Tezzel is a cozy, colorful, and crafty puzzle game where every move helps make a masterpiece. Discover mind-bending mechanics across 100+ handcrafted levels.

name: Anarchy Road
summary: Fast Speeds, Big Explosions, even Bigger Bosses and action throughout! Anarchy Road is a Post-Apocalyptic action driving game where our 4 heroes must race against the clock, battle bosses, while blasting enemies and dodging traps in order to survive to the explosive end!

name: Space Supermarket Simulator
summary: Run your own supermarket in outer space. Keep shelves stocked and nicely organized. Supply your store with drone delivery.

name: Corner Shop: NightShift
summary: Take a night shift job in a place that runs on habit, not purpose. Restock shelves, take deliveries, clean the mess, and try to make it till morning. Not everything feels right and you’re never quite alone. Something waits in the dark.

name: Rhell: Warped Worlds & Troubled Times
summary: Create unique spells by combining magical runes to solve puzzles your way. Transform objects, manipulate time, and discover the mysteries of a world where everyone has vanished, leaving only 12 people behind. Every puzzle has multiple solutions - if you can imagine it, you can probably do it.

name: 1348: Ex Voto
summary: Journey through a tumultuous Medieval Italy as Aeta, a young knight errant who sets off on a brutal quest to find and save her closest one. 1348 Ex Voto is a cinematic action-adventure game inspired by chivalric tales.

name: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake
summary: The full remake of FATAL FRAME / PROJECT ZERO II: Crimson Butterfly. This Japanese-style horror adventure game follows twin sisters lost in an abandoned village haunted by evil spirits. Using the Camera Obscura, they fight ghosts as the story unfolds.

name: End of Line
summary: Stay alive in this first-person horror-puzzle game. Trapped inside a claustrophobic train, each carriage tests you differently.

name: Wandfall
summary: Master tactical combat and collect powerful Sigils in this challenging roguelike. Navigate procedural maps through three acts of escalating difficulty, where every encounter shapes your build and every decision determines your survival.

name: Absolute Tennis Manager 2
summary: Immerse yourself in the world of tennis with ATM 2! Create or take on the role of a player and manage every aspect of their career: schedule, training, staff, personal life... Build your legend, tournament after tournament, and aim for the ultimate place in the Hall of Fame.

name: No Nap November
summary: No Nap November is a short psychological horror game set in a kindergarten during an endless nap time. Observe each loop carefully, spot anomalies, and survive an entire month without sleep to save yourself and the children from a strange presence.

name: Charmcraft Idle
summary: Charmcraft Idle is a cozy, witchy idle shop simulator where you gather magical resources, craft enchanted goods, and slowly automate every part of your spellbound business. Click, craft, study, and hire staff as your humble witch shop grows into a magical enterprise.

name: Korean Drone Flying Tour Daedunsan
summary: This game is a drone simulation game that allows you to experience real drone flight based on footage shot by a real flying drone. There is no up, down, left or right direction control, only the control to increase or decrease the drone speed.

name: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake - Digital Deluxe Bonus Set
summary:
The Digital Deluxe Bonus Set includes the following:

[Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake Digital Deluxe Bonuses]
- Accessories
Lace Gloves (White)
Lace Gloves (Black)
- Costumes
Japanese Gothic Dress (Left Wing)
Japanese Gothic Dress (Right Wing)
- Other
Deluxe Charm

name: Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake - Digital Deluxe Edition
Fatal Frame II: Crimson Butterfly Remake - Early Purchase Bonus Set
summary:
The Early Purchase Bonus Set includes the following:

Early Purchase Bonuses:
- Accessories
Peony Hair Ornament (Red)
Peony Hair Ornament (Blue)
- Costumes
Kimono (Red)
Kimono (Black)
- Other
Wraith Charm

name: Munchy Cat
summary: Cat + Food + Color Matching! A feel-good, yummy puzzle that lifts your mood

name: Forest Loop
summary: Forest Loop is a cozy incremental adventure game where you collect flowers, avoid hunters, and upgrade your way through the forest.

name: Clockwillows Voy Quest
summary: Take control of Voy and jump all over the place, this is an adventure game with arcade elements, defeat enemies that hinder you on the way with jumps and punches in this magical-tech adventure!

name: Let Deco Desktop
summary: A cute idle-crafting game nestled in the corner of your screen. Visit various regions to gather diverse materials and decorate your home with furniture you've crafted yourself!

name: Hollowreach: Alone
summary: A third-person psychological horror focused on exploration and puzzle-solving. Trapped between the dead and his own thoughts, fight to maintain your sanity in a forgotten world. Each day echoes voices from the past — and the line between reality and delusion begins to fade.

name: Withered Haven
summary: Withered Haven is a first-person psychological horror game. After the tragic loss of his wife and daughter, a broken man struggles to endure a collapsing reality. Familiar apparitions drift closer, echoing memories that mask a darkness beyond comprehension.

name: Shalnor: Silverwind Saga 2
summary: An RPG/Action Adventure game. With focus on gauntlet-style combat, traps, boss fights, and beautiful pixel-art scenery. Rynna has arrived on an island plagued by monsters and undead fiends raised by an evil Necromancer. The souls of those who remain cannot be free, until the Necromancer is slain!

name: Writer's Block
summary: Writer's Block is a falling block word game mashup where you write one block at a time. Put your vocabulary to the test, set up combos, and try not to let the letters pile up!

name: Mewseum: Film Festival
summary: Mewseum: Film Festival is a puzzle game featuring famous movie posters in a charming feline universe. Get the museum ready for the big gala night in a relaxing and fun experience! Lights, camera... meow!

name: Coraroc
summary: A back-to-basics retro platformer! Waking up alone in a mysterious laboratory, Coraroc must make his way through colorful stages and dastardly enemies to rescue his friends. Can you help Coraroc defeat the Pacicap menace?

name: Chosen Garden
summary: In this unique roguelike deck-builder, tend your garden and harvest plants for high scores! 100+ plants, 5 gardens, and a wealth of unique weather, animals, and tools — countless builds await!

name: Pocket Flight
summary: Fly your own way in Pocket Flight - a cozy endless flight adventure! Explore dynamic biomes, face shifting weather, customize your plane, and take on daily challenges. Relaxing skies, infinite horizons. Ready for takeoff?

name: Ollie and the Merchant of Dreams
summary: Ollie and the Merchant of Dreams is a 2D Metroidvania where you traverse a lore-rich world, summon monsters to your aid, ride a winged unicorn into battle, and unravel a story of duty and betrayal to free all of creation from chaos.

name: Echoes of Myth
summary: Action Roguelite with a bit weightier Souls-lite combat in a broken world where you're chasing that perfect run. Loot and draw power from relics of vanished gods, forge devastating builds from spell and steel, and crush the wretches in your way!

name: CFS: Chinese Football Simulator
summary: Chinese Football Simulator is a management game themed around Chinese football. As both club owner and head coach, you'll develop and manage teams either existing or customimmersed in authentic Chinese football culture.

name: Collie Call: The Future Is Calling
summary: Collie Call: Sheep Mission in Space

name: DecaDungeons
summary: DecaDungeons is a first-person, turn-based dungeon crawler where fate is decided by a magical six-sided dice. Explore 10 deadly dungeons, battle fierce foes, hunt monsters, and survive!

name: Six Seven Nights
summary: You have six nights. The seventh day changes everything.

name: CreArt: Painting by Numbers
summary: Relaxation meets creativity

name: Spa Massage Boys: Love & Relax
summary: Strong hands. Playful tension. Total relaxation.

name: Subsequence
summary: Subsequence is a linear single player story driven 3D adventure game about overcoming obstacles, solving logical puzzles and exploration of the world.

name: Neve
summary: Neve is a non-linear interactive fiction in which your decisions can completely change the course of history. Manage your team, race against time and unravel the mysteries surrounding your ship's crash in this suffocating retrofuturistic thriller that will have you hooked from the first second.

name: Mythmatch
summary: A Greek mythology community sim about bringing people together by putting things together.

name: Yellow Trouble
summary: 8-way water gun blasting horizontal 2D arcade co-op shoot ‘em up, with ducks?!

name: Vespera Bononia
summary: Vespera Bononia is a fast-paced action-roguelite set in an ever-changing city. Fight as nightmares come to life and switch classes as a shifting soul. Master a mix of third-person shooter, magic and bullet hell to survive.

name: Piece by Piece
summary: Piece by Piece is a jigsaw puzzle platformer where each level is fragmented into jigsaw pieces. Clear each puzzle by connecting and disconnecting each piece to make your way through each of our 100 handcrafted levels. Discover new themes and mechanics along the way!

name: Funi Raccoon Game
summary: Explore a series of whimsical, interconnected worlds to steal everything not nailed down. Make a garbage bin a garbage home :)

name: Shifting To The Backrooms
summary: "Shifting To The Backrooms" is a mix of psychological horror and drama game where the protagonist, Will, grappling with family tragedies, discovers the method of "shifting" enabling him to escape to the dream liminal worlds. However, the dream turns into a nightmare from which Will cannot wake up.

name: Dyping Escape
summary: Escape from a dying-typing game where the words you type become reality and turn against you.

name: Reflections of the Void
summary: A sci-fi drama about love, control, and the price of human emotion. Care for your wards, follow every order — or break the rules to discover who you truly are.

name: Mafioso's Dice
summary: A high-stakes mafia-themed dice and risk game. Four players roll dice to climb toward victory, then face off in deadly rounds of Russian roulette. Strategy, bluffing, and hidden cards determine who walks away alive.

name: The Shame of a Daydreamer
summary: Shame & choices = possible apocalypse. You need to figure out what’s causing the apocalypse to happen, so that you can prevent it. 2 playable characters with different relations to shame → 2 unique perspectives of the same story. Complicated families, branching choices and unforgiving consequences.

name: Lucid Blocks
summary: Explore, build, and survive in a liminal voxel expanse oozing with surreal landscapes and esoteric critters.

name: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection
summary: Twin Rathalos, born in a twist of fate. Two centuries after a conflict that divided neighboring kingdoms, the drums of war are reignited as twin Rathalos—long thought extinct—hatch from a single egg: an omen of destruction. Is there hope beyond the northern border?

name: The Last Screening
summary: You find yourself inside a cinema hallway, ready to watch your film. The venue, however, has other plans for you.

name: You're My Favorite Person
summary: Spend time with your new best friend! Have fun as it takes you through digital worlds to solve puzzles and collect Perfect Stars! After all, it knows what's best! It knows what's best! It knows what's best.

name: Forever-Happy-Town
summary: A PvE multiplayer shooter where a prophecy of eight endless nights is rapidly approaching, are you good enough to keep the town forever happy? You'd better be, else a herd of lovely rabbits will require rapid relocation.

name: Pizza Slice
summary: More than just a simulator, Pizza Slice is a true Italian adventure! Take on the role of Tonio, manage your family pizzeria, bake authentic Italian pizzas, fight the competition and grow your business. See if you can win the title of the best pizzeria in the area!

name: Happy Bones: Welcome Home
summary: After receiving a frantic message from her father, Laura heads out to her parents house located inside a cult compound to search for the truth, in this complete remake of the classic horror themed JRPG!

name: Shuffles 'n Scuffles
summary: Enter a papercraft world in this single-player, deck-building, card-battling, roguelike strategy game. Use your wits to battle your way through waves of enemies, while rewriting the very definitions of the cards you hold.

name: Cat Familiar Center
summary: Cat Familiar Center is a relaxing cat-raising game. Players will play as a witch and, with the help of fellow witches, train different cat familiars and find suitable new homes for them.

name: Caribbean Legend: Age of Pirates
summary: You are the captain and owner of your own ship—the finest fate one could hope for in the 17th century Caribbean. Unlimited sandbox experience. A unique genre blending naval combat, land exploration, and global map. Think Sid Meier's Pirates! meets Bannerlord.

name: Teko
summary: Teko is an Indie Roguelike Deckbuilder where you have to reach the highest possible score by playing Poker hands, but in an unconventional way: making 3 combos at once.

name: Echo Factory
summary: The world has gone silent. Tap into the void, generate echoes, and automate the restoration of sound in this neon-soaked, sci-fi idle game. Build powerful machines, unlock complex frequencies, and rebuild the cosmic core to bring harmony back to the universe.

name: Drill and Delve
summary: You've been trapped in a mine. You'll need to use your tools to dig your way to the exit in a fully destructible 3D voxel terrain. Manage your oxygen and equipment, and uncover the dark mystery buried deep within the mine.

name: Recursive
summary: A recursive incremental game where every system feeds another. Click enemies, unlock towns with unique minigames and currencies, and channel everything into your Giant’s growing power.

name: Desktop Aquarium
summary: A relaxing mini aquarium that stays on your desktop corner while you do other stuff — collect fish, upgrade tanks, and enjoy a cozy idle experience.

name: Scission
summary: Scission is a dark and gruesome action game where you control two characters at once. Fight grotesque representations of the subconscious, master new skills and explore the depth of the human mind in this singleplayer game.

name: Droste Detective
summary: You're stuck in an office corridor with no exit that has a painting of the same corridor on the wall. But then you notice the corridor in the painting is not quite the same. You decide to inspect the painting...

name: Mazy
summary: MAZY is a first-person PS1-style horror game where you explore procedurally generated mazes, solve a variety of minigames and survive while hostile clowns hunt you down. Collect coins to buy power-ups and assistance to help you escape.

name: Darkrite: The Blight of Love
summary: Old school, rich with lore, and made with love. Experience a linear gothic story with carefully handwritten prose. Play either as an action RPG or visual novel. Your Weaver journey starts here.

name: Next Patient
summary: During a pandemic, you are a medical distribution officer at a controlled checkpoint. Review IDs, medical reports, and blood tests; approve or deny requests. Supplies are limited. Procedures are strict. The decision is yours.

name: Today's Menu
summary: Mix cards with restaurant management in this sim game. Build, gather ingredients, and learn recipes. Use your deck to serve customers, earn profits and fame, then upgrade and expand to craft your ideal restaurant.

name: I am Slime
summary: Memory backtracking, as one puzzle after another is solved, the memories of the blue slime are also turned over page by page ..

name: Everfall 2: Idle Dungeon RPG
summary: Unique Bosses, Loot Filters, Combat Pets, & Pick Your Team of 4 to Customize with Skill trees, Keystones, Abilities, and Runes in a MASSIVE ENDGAME!

name: Insanio
summary: Autobattler where you send misfits into vehicular combat. Your job is to prepare them, deploy them, watch them struggle and finally watch them die or win in massive explosions.

name: Cyber Saber Pro
summary: Become HKKMR-U, the legendary Cyborg Samurai, and test your reflexes in a fast-paced arcade hack-and-slash survival game. Stand your ground, unleash your sword skills, and face wave after wave of mechanical enemies inspired by Japanese folklore.

name: Don't Crack!
summary: A chaotic co-op or solo rage platformer about a fragile egg’s dangerous journey back to its nest.

name: Topobeam
summary: Topobeam is a puzzle game about redirecting lasers in different two-dimensional manifolds. The levels operate on a grid system, but pay attention to how the sides of the grid are glued together as players, objects, and lasers can cross over these gluings to different parts of the level.

name: Exercise Your Demons
summary: Step into the world of Exercise your Demons, a 2d narrative adventure inspired by Irish fairies and folklore. Meet and befriend 5 locals while you work towards settling into the small fictional town called Inishsióg in County Galway, Ireland.

name: Night of Nightmare
summary: Every night, the nightmare comes. Your room is no longer safe... The moment you lie down on a strange bed and close your eyes, you are no longer alone. Is this reality? Or are you inside someone else’s nightmare?

name: Coloring Pixels: Natural Wonders
summary: This Natural Wonders book unlocks 20 additional levels for Coloring Pixels. Each image shows a different natural wonder from our beautiful green-and-blue planet! See the wonders of the natural world in this book!

name: Penguin
summary: Fish, sell, upgrade, and dive ever deeper into an ocean full of secrets. Collect the entire ARTICDEX!

name: Jigsaw Puzzle Passport: Spain
summary: Your Virtual Vacation Awaits

name: Draft Day Sports: College Basketball 26
summary: Build your college basketball dynasty in Draft Day Sports: College Basketball 26. Recruit elite talent, manage NIL strategy, dominate the transfer portal, and guide your team through March. The deepest and most realistic college basketball simulation yet.

name: Sand Seeker
summary: Walk the ancient paths. Seek what was lost.

name: Altiros
summary: Build! Craft! Destroy! Jump on clouds and fight cute monsters in skill-based battles of steel, magic and spirit in this online sandbox adventure set in a fantastical world of sky islands!

name: Keplerian Space Discovery
summary: Travel through the solar system in your own spaceship! The motion of each celestial body is accurately reproduced by the Kepler equation.

name: Giant’s Heart
summary: Giant`s Heart — roguelike dungeon crawler with gardening elements. Discover powerful artifacts, make critical path choices - time is your most precious currency. A Giant marches toward the castle... You have just 5 minutes to descend into the dungeons, find and destroy its heart!

name: Friendslop Drive
summary: Friendslop Drive is a chaotic co‑op driving game where one car is shared by multiple players. As one of the top friendslop games, teamwork and rivalry collide on a mysterious island. Can your crew reach the PEAK of madness and escape together? Only the best bros survive the ride!

name: Wizard Punks!!!
summary: WIZARD PUNKS!!! is a fast-paced, spell-slinging 4-player local party game. Create spells by combining the four elements of Air, Earth, Fire and Water, and defeat your fellow wizards with a variety of bombastic magics.

name: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin
summary: The Seven Deadly Sins: Origin is an open-world action RPG set in the universe of The Seven Deadly Sins. Step into the role of Prince Tristan of Liones and explore an open-world Britannia, as you embark on a journey to restore order to a world thrown into chaos by the collision of time and space.

name: Bonnie Bear Saves Frogtime
summary: Bonnie’s self-worth is at an all-time low, and there’s only one thing that can fix it - a lovely game of Frogtime! Grab your toadbag and get ready to go on a hilarious adventure full of quirky characters, explorable islands, and way too many frogs.

name: Find Matt's Cats
summary: A scavenger-hunt adventure that spans 80 hand-crafted levels, including beautiful holiday destinations and fantasy themes. Look in buildings, detonate bombs, unlock treasure chests, dig for secrets, and more! Every item is clickable as you search for Hidden Cats & Dogs!

name: Stitched Together
summary: Stitched Together is an RPG adventure with a deep story, unique battle mechanics, world-defying stakes, and a whole extra dimension!

name: Murder at the Birch Tree Theater
summary: Use deductive and abductive reasoning to uncover the truth behind a series of several unsettling deaths at a smalltown community theater. Uncover a narrative that spans decades by revealing the lies, petty grievances, and power struggles of people who came together to make art.

name: Frog Holm
summary: Unexpectedly, you become the owner of a pub that has seen better days. During the day, set sail to explore a variety of new islands, each with its own unique treasures and ingredients for your cocktails. Can you restore the pub to its former glory? Dive into this charming adventure and find out!

name: Age of Enchantment
summary: Tower defense deckbuilder where your towers are classes from D&D. Enchant towers with powerful buffs, sacrifice cards to forge new synergies, and select artifacts to customize your build.

name: Cavescape
summary: Escape a procedurally generated cave by grappling and swinging. Explore the depths of the ecosystem, fight foreign creatures, and upgrade your tools. Destructible environments, deep mechanics, and tough bosses!

name: Creature Creation Station
summary: Create characters, watch them play together, and easily share your creations with friends!

name: Ritus Exorcismus
summary: Become the exorcist that the world needs! Use Holy Relics and the knowledge from your book to fight demonic possessions. Investigate unholy events and take part in church rituals in this medieval pixel horror game.

name: Deadline Delivery
summary: Strap in, floor it, and deliver the goods... before the bomb goes off. Play as Carl, a monkey driving a wildly unstable mail truck that's rigged with explosives on a tight deadline.

name: Little Chef: Cozy Cooking
summary: Little Chef: Cozy Cooking is a physics-based cooking game full of discovery and playful chaos. Experiment with everything in the kitchen and unlock around 300 recipes on your way to becoming a master chef!

name: Grind Survivors
summary: Grind Survivors is a fast-paced action roguelike where demon hunters face endless hellspawn. Dodge, loot, and blast through brutal bullet-hell combat with dynamic builds and ever-changing weapons in a scorched, demon-ridden world.

name: Yes, My Warlord
summary: Rule as a hobgoblin warlord in this kingdom management RPG. Balance resources and manage the shifting opinions of commoners, goblinoids, and elites. Face difficult decisions, and choose whether to rule with fairness… or with brutality.

name: Balltopia
summary: Balltopia is a roguelike marble racing simulator where your only objective is to make more money. Featuring dozens of unique levels and over 50 game-altering cards, the potential to win is almost limitless - but be careful! Place an errant bet, and you could lose it all.

name: Starship Troopers: Ultimate Bug War!
summary: Lock and load into the Starship Troopers universe and join the Mobile Infantry in the most realistic depiction of war ever made ! Experience an original story in this action-packed, first-person retro shooter. Would you like to know more?

name: All Hail the Orb
summary:
All Hail The Orb is a quirky and short active incremental game in which you devote yourself to The Orb!
Explore the once lost dungeon as you build your gathering of cultists and bring the dungeon back to its former glory!
Explore and enjoy the light-hearted progression and story!

name: Vice Versa
summary: Play solo or with up to 5 players in this strategic card-stacking challenge. Place your entire deck on ascending and descending stacks, use clever resets, and survive two unique modes filled with tense, cooperative decision-making.

name: Mine Mine
summary: Mine Mine is an incremental game about mining ores, upgrading your equipment, and unlocking better and better quarries!

name: Peeping
summary: Peeping​ is a psychological survival game where you, a detained "supernatural suspect," must balance pretense and madness during a 31-day prison observation.

name: Thunder and Line-ing
summary: Move lightning through the air to form lines. When everything aligns a boom echoes blasting your score up to a higher strata!

name: Doomstacker
summary: A compact power-fantasy strategy experience wrapped in an auto-battler. Choose a castle, build it up, collect artifacts, and craft wild synergies between artifacts and (massive) armies.

name: Pit Pioneers
summary: A Lemmings-inspired puzzle game where you guide pioneers through treacherous underground caverns by strategically assigning abilities like digging, building, and blocking to overcome obstacles.

name: The King is Watching: Crowns of History
summary: Play as Cleopatra, Taizong of Tang, and Xerxes, three legendary-inspired rulers with radically different playstyles. Master death and rebirth, dominate with devastating defenses, or risk everything for overwhelming power.

name: SkyVerse
summary: SkyVerse is a sandbox set in a procedurally generated world of floating islands. As a captain, you can expand your base, improve your engines, decorate it, and explore the world to discover new items and fight the evil within dungeons. The higher you go, the more challenging the game becomes!

name: Sphere Shootout
summary: "Blue Warrior 4" is a 2D cover tactical shooting game. The key to win in the game is not the shooting technique but the tactical walking.

name: Pretend Cars Racing 2
summary: An old school top-down racer with split-screen multiplayer, track editor and night and day transitions.

name: College Basketball Manager
summary: Take charge as head coach in College Basketball Manager. Recruit your dream team, whether that be through All-Americans or hidden gems. Strategize gameplay, schedule games, run practices, and manage your staff, because you are in control. The court is your canvas – create a powerhouse.

name: Valkyrie Destruction
summary: Explore a classic JRPG world together with a cute battle maiden! Upon being rescued from a monster by a passing battle maiden, the protagonist Batz begins journeying together with her. But taking advantage of her weakness, the scoundrel Batz has other plans for his beautiful savior.

name: Skeleseller
summary: Skeleseller is a laid-back idle game set in a vibrant fantasy world. You're a skeleton shopkeep who hires adventurers to collect loot for you after your untimely demise. Send adventurers into battle, sell what they find, and build up your town!

name: Retro Rewind: Video Store Simulator
summary: Manage your very own video store in the early 90s! Rent, sell, decorate and expand your business from the ground up and relive the golden ages of video rentals!

name: Street Fighter 6: Additional Character - Alex
summary: Hailing from the Big Apple, it’s the brawler who puts the bomb in Power Bomb! Coming in at 245 pounds and with enough muscle to bench press the entire stadium, this New York native will show he’s the undisputed champion when he enters the Street Fighter 6 ring. Let’s hear it for Alex!

name: The Ratline
summary: A murdered priest. A secret list. Hunt Nazi fugitives across the globe in this gritty 1971 detective thriller. Analyze evidence, follow leads, and make sharp deductions before the trail goes cold. From the creators of Family, Rivals, Conspiracy, Echo Beach and Riley & Rochelle.

name: The Demon's Apple: Otome Game
summary: The Demon's Apple is a Dark Fantasy otome game with mature content. Pomme, a herbalist as to make an alliance with a bloodthirsty demon she saved to survive in a world hostile to both. Play as Pomme who has to learn to live under the same roof as the demon who wants her blood and more.

name: Bearly Flying
summary: A hard game about flying a helicopter. Ascend through the floors of a deadly factory. Solo or local co-op. Watch out for emotional turbulence. Careful with those propellers.

name: The Lost Experiment
summary: It is 1997. Farhad, an investigative journalist, arrives at an abandoned military base to uncover the truth behind a silenced 1986 meteor crash. But as he delves deeper into the forest, he finds that the debris isn't the only thing buried here. Some headlines are better left unwritten.

name: Trinket Bag Maker
summary: Trinket Bag Maker is a retro sandbox game inspired by the 2000's girl games, where you can create your own trinket bag! Choose between many adorable charms and bags to create the trinket bag of your dreams!

name: Twisted Fate
summary: A turn-based roguelike with a deep ability-modification system. Lead a party of three heroes, adapt their skills using modifiers, collect artifacts, and craft unique builds to destroy the source of corruption… or die trying.

name: MLB The Show 26
summary:
Step up and take control of how you leave your mark in the most immersive MLB The Show yet.

Discover improved Road To The Show mechanics, deeper Franchise experiences, thrilling Diamond Dynasty modes, enhanced customization options, and true-to-life on-field action.

name: Thomas & Friends: Wonders of Sodor
summary: Join Thomas and his friends on a special journey across Sodor! Hop into the cabs of North Western Railway’s classic steam team to enjoy nostalgic stories and all-new narratives right from the drivers’ seats. Explore the Wonders of Sodor – fun and magic await!

name: Hearthstone: Cataclysm
summary: Cataclysm is Hearthstone's 32nd expansion, featuring 135 new collectible cards released on March 17, 2026. This expansion continues the story of Across the Timeways, where Murozond refused to accept the defeat from Chromie, smashing the Hourglass of Time and opening a portal to a nightmare timeline where Deathwing never fell.

name: Timber Rush
summary: Timber Rush is a fast-paced incremental roguelite where every swing explodes into upgrades, chaos, and massive numbers.

name: Wizard 64
summary: Destroy incoming enemies as a flying wizard. Collect points to grow stronger. Unlock new weapons and abilities, and use different builds to defeat endless monster hordes.

name: Side Hustle
summary: Welcome to the Side Hustle program! You have 5 days to dispose of defective androids and earn the prestigious City of Light citizenship! Your freedom HAS a price, and it’s a great deal!

name: Cypher Dungeon
summary: Identifier = ZERO. Localization = unknown system. Objectives = survive, decrypt, escape. Codes are key. Death is protocol. The sequence begins now.

name: What Did the Chicken See
summary: A short, dark visual novel about a broken world. You are trapped with a cynical narrator who questions everything—school, society, and even you. In this glitchy reality, do your choices really matter, or are you just part of the system?

name: Relicguard
summary: Relicguard is an idle/clicker that you can leave running without it taking up the whole screen. Gain resources over time and spend them to upgrade your army. Once powerful enough, fight for powerful relics to augment your army. Build. Fight. Repeat.

name: Deck of Treads
summary: Deck of Treads is a chaotic 2–6 player tank brawler with a deckbuilding twist. Stack upgrades that transform how your tank looks — and how it fights. Each match spirals into unpredictable mayhem, packed with ridiculous, over-the-top tank builds!

name: Opus Magnum: Complete Edition
summary: “Without a doubt one of the best puzzle games I’ve ever played.” IGN “One of the very best puzzle games of the year, if not the decade.

name: Poly Impulse
summary: Poly Impulse is a fast-paced FPS platform game where you will have to shoot colorful polyhedrons to impulse yourself through the level. Speedrunning is not an option, only the fastest with godlike aim will get the SS rank.

name: RoadHouse Manager
summary: Bartend and run a roadhouse in this AI-enhanced roguelite-sim! Patrons once impressed, will become permanent barflies that can be hired as staff, or sent on quests in the mysterious mist. Upgrade your roadhouse, hire a band, and build your Signature Cocktail, with 333 ingredients to choose from.

name: World's Goodest Pup
summary: A cozy roguelike deckbuilder where you enter dog shows! Collect new tricks, groom for stats, unlock breeds, and accessorize at shops as you make your way to the top dog podium. Fluffy, heartwarming runs await in World's Goodest Pup!

name: AI.VI
summary: A mercenary robot is forced out of retirement as the P.A.S.C.A.L. Gigacorporation conquers his planet to squeeze it dry. Combine your FPS and tower defense skills, then send the corporate invaders to the scrapheap, seize the means of production, and take the planet back for the worker bots!

name: SOG: Vietnam
summary: Head to Vietnam as a lone SOG operative. Gear up, upgrade your skills, and explore the danger-filled jungles. Complete the missions assigned by your country and eliminate enemies using napalm and artillery in a brutal, tactical, turn-based 2D roguelite that does not forgive mistakes!

name: Let's Freeze Some Penguins
summary: Walnut the Walrus sets out to save his friends, and all of Northern Bear, from the dreaded Emperor Penguin. Luckily, his chilly Walrus Wind is ice cold. Now let's freeze some penguins!

name: Fireside Fables
summary:
Fireside Fables is a narrative driven 3D platformer, which follows a group of children telling stories around a campfire. These stories then come to life, and you play through them as your favourite plushie!

You will be transported across worlds! From a pirate island, to a lush forest, even to outer space - Anywhere that the children's imaginations can take you!

name: Cloudwalkers
summary: Cloudwalkers is a hilarious third-person shooter-platformer where you defend the cloud world from quirky alien invaders.

name: Void of Lilly
summary: Void of Lilly is an adventure in the world of the near future with JRPG elements and Bullet Hell battles! Help Ann to find her sister and uncover secrets of this world... Void of Lilly is coming on Steam for free!

name: In Their Shoes
summary: From the first day of spring, to the last day of winter, wear seven shoes of seven characters and live their most intimate moments. Explore their thoughts, choose their steps and shape their paths in a mumblecore narrative game where the most extraordinary setting is ordinary life itself.

name: Crawling Angels
summary: Smash and thrash the mysterious Forever Chicken, a living ragdoll central to a frightful midnight carnival. Your Uncle Tontine assures "you can leave as soon as you desire" but despite their efforts no child has ever gone home... Will you be the first?

name: Andromis
summary: Play as two heroes a soldier and a doctor in a third-person action adventure packed with explosions, vehicles, and survival missions. Switch between characters, drive cars and tanks, rescue survivors, and fight deadly robots across 50 story missions in a post-apocalyptic world. Coming in January.

name: Layer Land
summary: Layerland is a sandbox survival game set in a world that mirrors Earth’s terrain. Travel through gates, capture monsters as pets, and team up to battle, gather, craft, and build.

name: SpaceShift
summary: Save the crew in this 2D puzzle platformer! As a small robot, you manipulate gravity, time, and your size to repair a damaged ship. Use portals to change perspectives, avoid dangerous lasers, and solve creative puzzles in an unstable pixel world.

name: Goritaire
summary:
Goritaire is a solo card-based survival game centered on building a troop of seven or more gorillas. The deck consists only of Gorillas and Bananas, demanding strategic balance.

Bananas are essential for survival; if the supply fails, the troop scatters, resulting in defeat.

Strategically master diverse actions unique to each stage, expand the troop, and secure the necessary resources to reign as the master of the jungle!

name: Everything Will Be Fine!
summary: A dark conversation with a girl during a nightly car trip. A short multi-ending novel game where you try to understand this girl and her pain.

name: Crimson Desert
summary: Crimson Desert is an open-world action-adventure game set in the beautiful yet brutal continent of Pywel. Embark on a journey as the Greymane Kliff and restore what has been lost. Explore uncharted lands, fight against threats that stand in your way, and discover the wonders the world has in store.

name: Rule the Waves 3: Expanded Battles
summary: Prepare to return to the definitive naval warfare simulation game, Rule the Waves 3, with the new Expanded Battles expansion! Take your love and knowledge of 20th century naval warfare from the exciting campaigns of the base game and get ready to craft and fight the naval battles of your dreams.

name: Valor of Man
summary:
Valor of Man is a roguelike tactical RPG where enemies react to your actions, giving you endless chances to outsmart them with your tactics.
Valor of Man is developed by Legacy Forge, small indie studio created by 2 brothers.

name: Quickcast
summary: A turn-based strategy roguelike game where you and your opponent share a single deck. Use matching rules to cast spells and collect powerful artifacts. Defeat wizards specializing in each element and absorb their powers to become the best wizard you can be.

name: True Vikings
summary: Choose your own path: become a powerful jarl or a legendary king, or perhaps switch sides and follow the path of a knight, reliving the story of the Duke of Normandy.

name: Rushing Beat X: Return of Brawl Brothers
summary: The legendary beat ’em up series from Jaleco returns. Master trained fighters take on a rising evil with raw strength and refined technique. Built around easy-to-use auto-combos, the game lets skilled players weave powerful strings for exhilarating combat. Let your fists burn with fury once more.

name: Heroes of Magic & Cards
summary: Build the perfect deck, draw the perfect hand, and strike down your enemies with pairs and straights. Heroes of Magic & Cards is a roguelike deckbuilder with a poker twist, sending you and your fifty-two into a mystical fantasy world of monsters and magecraft!

name: Racer Overdrive
summary: This game tells the story of your rise from obscure rookie to racing star. A global championship, hosted by a mysterious tech company, is your chance to establish yourself in the world of racing. Experience extreme drifting and nitro acceleration on iconic tracks around the world. Experience a refreshing driving system, multi-mode racing, and a rich main and side storyline. As the race progresses, participate in various events and become famous. Ultimately, uncover the championship's conspiracy from the mysterious host company and face off against an out-of-control super artificial intelligence!

name: Three Kingdom: Zhang Jiao Revival
summary: Three Kingdom - Zhang Jue Revival is a real time RPG roguelite. Battle alone or recruit up to 10 comrade to fight along side in real time combat. Specialize in 1 class or learn all 6, wide range of equipment to create your own build. Powerful yet simple statistic system to spice up game play.

name: Virtual Ties Isekaijoucho Träumerei
summary: Our protagonist, Kirishima Yu, returns from Tokyo to the island where he once lived and reunites with his childhood friend, Minase Seikai. Seikai, who had been on the verge of giving up on her dream of becoming an idol, looks somewhat gloomy. Wanting to make her smile again, Yu proposes that she debut as a virtual idol named "Isekaijoucho" based on an illustration he drew himself.

name: Briar Flame
summary: A stylized action-platformer set in a world consumed by eternal thorns. Explore handcrafted zones, unlock new flame-forged upgrades, and face brutal bosses as the Young Emberhost in a desperate attempt to reach the Heart of the Briar.

name: Codex Mortis
summary: In Codex Mortis, Death is your weapon. Mix five schools of dark magic, unleash devastating spell synergies, and raise undead armies in this necromantic bullet hell. Infinite builds, solo or co-op – embrace the forbidden and dominate. 100% AI-driven development.

name: Card Colony
summary: It’s a card game where you build a deck, draw cards, and strategically place towers on a tile grid to earn gold. And you must defend your empire from the enemies closing in. They won’t let you build in peace.

name: Unwilling Host
summary: This is a first-person indie horror game with VHS effects. Be careful—you're facing a terrifying entity.

name: Aviarium
summary: Aviarium is a relaxing sky sanctuary simulation filled with cute birds. Manage your floating aviary with click and idle mechanics, collect resources, and enjoy a pleasant experience in a colorful and peaceful world above the clouds.

name: The Mortimer Paradox
summary: A third-person sci-fi horror game about exploring your grandfather’s abandoned mansion and its interdimensional portals. Solve puzzles, evade monsters, and uncover why Dr. Voss vanished.

name: Setuna: Legend of Hamburger 2
summary: All motions, all frames cancelable. The second installment of the ultra-free 3D action-adventure [SETUNA]. Challenge the limits of your skills with a fully professional-grade input system!

name: Hatters
summary: Hatters is a cooperative bullet hell roguelike for up to 4 players. Random spells of five elements, magical artifacts, new heroes and a light story with humor. Chaotic battles where magic and laughter fly everywhere.

name: HestiaFort
summary: At the end of the blue sky that spreads out like the sea, HestiaFort

name: Fortnite: Chapter 7 - Season 2: Showdown
summary: Players will be able to access new content and skins as a new battle thaws from the frigid standstill, with The Foundation and The Ice King preparing for a showdown.

name: Rubato
summary: A collect-a-thon about a frog fixing the solar system after it explodes for some reason.

name: Poke All Toads
summary: A puzzle game starring mischievous fairies. Solve levels by working as a team, operating dangerous machinery and manipulating local wildlife.

name: Moto Rush Reborn
summary: Feel the pulse of retro-futuristic Tokyo veins urging you to go faster, drawing you deeper. Surrender to the speed, let the thrill consume your essence. Each surge, each flicker of light, is your path to glory or oblivion in 'Moto Rush Reborn'. Is your soul worth this speed?

name: Excoverse
summary: A story-driven action RPG where you play as a noble lord torn between rescuing his lost daughter and leading a dying nation. fast combat, stealth, moral choices, and anime-style intensity await.

name: Lap of the Gods
summary: When the sun shines on the Lap of the Gods, it is blood red. And when it rains, the sky sobs. Explore a strange world populated by even stranger beings in this story-driven adventure as Marion attempts to undo a mistake on a universal level, before everything she has ever known becomes Undone.

name: VeilWood
summary: Protect your farm from twisted creatures as you cultivate the land and put an end to the Azure Haze in this first person real time strategy dark farming sim.

name: Lost Wiki: Kozlovka
summary: Explore a wikipedia-like database and solve a small town mystery in Eastern Europe. Step into the shoes of a journalist in the 90s as you sprawl through articles and uncover the secrets that have been laid in front of you.

name: Butler Guillotine
summary: Flesh filled puppets in a mishapen hotel. No windows, no exterior. Follow different characters' intertiwining paths and unearth forgotten events from a time long gone. Bring the ceremony to a halt.

name: Village Merchant
summary: Run and expand your own medieval shop! Sell weapons, armor, food, and rare goods to peasants and lords alike in the immersive medieval store simulator.

name: Völund
summary: The forge remembers every strike. In VÖLUND, a blacksmithing roguelike, you shape raw ore into weapons of legend. Unearth cursed metals, master the ancient craft, and forge your path to immortality.

name: The Great Flood
summary: "A War you can grasp." An upcoming strategy game, featuring the ability to engage in duels in VR/MR Dual Modes.

name: Paracesium
summary: PARACESIUM is a body horror time management game where you collect, analyze, dismember and reassemble body parts in order to create a pure cadaver for your experimentation. Every action takes time, so make your next decision carefully. Manage time, bodies and monsters and stay alive. Who is Delilah?

name: Hell Dice Gambit
summary: Hell Dice Gambit is a strategic roguelike game using dice. Collect various relics, dice, and pills to grow stronger and struggle on. Can you escape from the abyss of hell?

name: Chopping Together
summary: A 1-4 player co-op, You are stuck in a forest alone or together with one goal to chop every tree in sight. Chop Trees, Gather Wood, Make Money And Upgrade Your Tools

name: Inky Blinky Bob
summary: Fly a weaponized hot air balloon across a chain of dangerous islands overrun by failed experiments. Scavenge resources, upgrade your flying machine, and dismantle the defenses of an occult biotech corporation before its greatest creation breaks free.

name: Doodle Wipeout
summary: Doodle Wipeout is an action rougelite - survive waves of chaotic doodles by erasing them. Dodge, upgrade, and clean the canvas before it’s overrun.

name: Desktop Fishing Cat
summary: Here’s a cute, chubby black cat. All it wants to do is quietly go fishing. “Right in the corner of your desktop!” Collect fish to fill up the cat’s encyclopedia, earn money, and dress it up in adorable outfits!

name: Meta Card Backpack Legend
summary: The third installment of the MetaCard series, MetaCard: Backpack Legend, is a backpack management Roguelike card game! Before Battle: Manage your artifact backpack to build and synergize your playstyle. During Battle: Drag and drop cards to unleash skills on key enemies at the right moment.

name: GunX
summary: Get ready for the ultimate VR Gun assembling experience with PvP Duels, Zombie Campaign and a Shooting Range for perfecting your assembling speed and accuracy. Challenge your friends or join them in co-op and immerse yourself in an adrenaline-fueled fight.

name: Mote: The Old Office
summary: MOTE: The Old Office is a reflective walking simulator where you explore an abandoned startup space through the eyes of its CEO. Wander through meeting rooms, break areas, and forgotten corners as voice memories surface—stories of late nights, impossible deadlines, and the small moments that shaped everything. Along the way, collect 20 hidden donuts—a sweet reminder of the “night shift” days when sugar and panic powered the dream.

name: Castle Tycoon Simulator
summary: Let's build a castle!

name: Grizzly Cup Turbo Challenge '92
summary: A retro-inspired local multiplayer arcade racer where you pick a car, race solo or with up to 4 players on one screen, and battle through short, fast-paced events with easy-to-learn but hard-to-master handling. It features three camera modes, distinct cars, single races, Time Attack, multi-race Cups, and a built-in track editor with test drive plus track code sharing for custom circuits.

name: Mistfall Ruins
summary: Follow the mist. Discover the forgotten.

name: Nothing Beyond This Point
summary: In the Void, everyone is alone, and you're no exception. Use your health as damage, create your own character with abilities and Sigils, and fight through corrupted souls in this top-down action Metroidvania. Don't be fooled - you're nobody's last hope.

name: Pakinpaks
summary: A cozy puzzle game where you go on a journey all around the world packing and organizing all sorts of travel gear. Fulfill your client's request in any way you wish and — as long as everything fits — prepare the neatest bags that you can!

name: Journey of the Garden Rose
summary: Lily must explore a fantastic palace and contest with the machinations of a cruel prince to rescue her mother in this Old-School 3D Action-Adventure game!

name: To Be a Millionaire
summary: Ordinary people can also become millionaires. In the game, you can get money by transporting apples. Once you have accumulated a certain amount of money, you can own your own barbecue restaurant. From then on, becoming a millionaire is no longer a dream.

name: Violet Impetus
summary: Violet Impetus is a bullet-hell arcade melee 'em up set in a series of (lightly) procedurally-generated arenas. Drop into different biomes to rid the world of Æris—the demiurge, petrificate & fractured. Its other children just won't see things eye to eye.

name: Incremental Ragebait
summary: Incremental Ragebait is the journey of Demon Incrementus to ragebait god! Buy new weapons, unlock upgrades, and build a purgatory to automate the ragebaiting process.

name: Melody Friends
summary: Just drop in your favorite song—done! A cute rhythm game that auto-generates multiple difficulties. Play comfortably with any key and clear a song your way with five friends.

name: Stickman Physics Battle Arena
summary: Level up and unlock the ultimate weapons in a bloody physics playground! You must kill countless enemies to increase your stats and become the greatest warrior. Dual wield over 75 unique and fun weapons in 7 different modes across nearly 100 different levels with up to 2 players in co-op or VS.

name: The Mystical Traveler
summary: In The Mystical Traveler, you play as a cosmic cube in a 2D pixel art platformer. Master gravity, explore planets, unlock characters, and overcome various challenges in a mysterious universe.

name: Rank: Warmaster Bunker Buster
summary: Rank Warmaster: Bunker Buster meets tactical control with strategic execution, bringing RTS elements to this sci-fi, action tower defense. Acquire resources as you further secure your bunker strategically placing perimeters and defensive and offensive units.

name: Mask of Soul
summary: Mask of Soul is a 2D Metroidvania action-adventure where you play as Cheong-O Chasa, the underworld’s gatekeeper, hunting spirits released under the Red Moon. Master precise parry combat, switch between spirit masks, and explore a dark fantasy world inspired by Korean mythology.

name: Brighter Days
summary: Fight difficult enemies, explore dangerous locations, and gain strength in this hand crafted world to defeat the evil that lays waste to these Scarred Lands.

name: Genji Reincarnation: The Seven Mysteries of Shirahata High
summary: Friendship or fate—what will they choose? A karmic and occult visual novel where urban legends blur the line between life, death, and reincarnation.

name: Farming Simulator 25: Vredo Pack
summary: Counter grassland degradation with technology from Vredo, the renowned specialist in overseeding and self-propelled slurry injection vehicles. In the meantime, wild boars have been set loose to roam the land and threaten the health of crops. Includes 12 new machines, also featuring Evers Agro.

name: Overpowered 2: Crux of Fate
summary: Press your luck to its absolute limits as you fight for survival in a deadly monster arena!

name: Roombattle
summary:
Roombattle is a party fighting game where players will control robotic vacuum cleaners and will fight equipped with sharp objects and balloons. The main objective is to be the last to be equipped balloons in the game. In addition to the battles, the game contains a large crowd of minigames.

Meet up with your friends, customize your vacuum, and get ready to battle in different rooms to claim victory!

name: Damon and Baby
summary: An exciting new style of action adventure fusing shooting action with exploration.

name: Coincidences?
summary: After a sudden rent hike, you move into a suspiciously cheap house deep in the woods. The price is absurdly low and there’s work nearby—it seems like a stroke of luck. But you soon realize something is seriously wrong with the place...

name: Lofi Mahjong
summary: Dive into a calm, cozy world with Lofi Mahjong. Enjoy classic Mahjong Solitaire enhanced by a lofi soundscape for maximum focus and minimum stress.

name: Reconquista
summary: A fast-paced dungeon boomer shooter with melee combat, magic, and seed-based generated levels.

name: Mushi
summary: Welcome to Mushi! The next-gen Auto-RPG set in a rich fantasy world. This is a feature-packed incremental idle game, meaning that it mostly plays on its own. Your hero will automatically defeat enemies and level up on your screen while you do other things. Begin your rise from level 1 today!

name: The V Anomaly
summary: The V Anomaly is an atmospheric observation game where small changes matter. Search each room for anomalies and choose the correct exit: progress deeper as the Area number climbs or make one wrong call and return to Area 0. Stay sharp. Doubt everything.

name: Call of Dookie
summary: Imagine you went to the crapper, and emerged an hour later to a monster apocalypse! Retro first-person shooter action inspired by 90's classics! Old-school local deathmatch & co-op for up to 4 players!

name: Copa City
summary: Organize high-stakes football events in the first football tycoon! Get the urban space and the stadium ready, ensure safety, and provide fans with an amazing football fiesta! But stay alert: Your decisions will not only influence the city but also the emotional rollercoaster for football fans!

name: Rubber Sharks
summary: Plunge into the tranquil existence of the sweet poolside life with the amazing company of peaceful Rubber Sharks. This adventure invites you to revel in the bliss of your cherished poolside sanctuary. But could there be a mystery hidden in this peaceful scene, or even more?

name: Project Songbird
summary: Project Songbird is a cinematic first-person narrative horror game set in the Appalachian forest. Take on the role of Dakota, a musician who must record their new album in a remote log cabin amidst a writer's block. Take caution, however. These woods were never empty...

name: Screamer
summary: High-octane action and anime aesthetics collide in this arcade racing game, featuring fighting mechanics and a storyline that hits hard. In this world, some race for glory while others seek power or revenge. Every race is a fight and every battle is personal.

name: VMX
summary: VMX offers an authentic riding experience with gesture-based tricks and responsive bike handling. Take on challenges in carefully crafted skateparks and dirt tracks, customize your bike with a realistic spray-painting system, and express your style through a variety of outfits.

name: Curse Warrior
summary:
Curse Warrior is a dungeon crawler RPG where you explore and conquer the underground labyrinth “Eclipse,” filled with curses.

In the dungeon, your party members may become cursed through various actions.

Since curses alter the abilities and actions of your party members, players must constantly monitor the state of their party and make crucial decisions on how to proceed. Build stronger characters while managing and adjusting the effects of curses to successfully clear the dungeon.

name: EverSiege: Untold Ages
summary: Liberate Bastion, humanity’s last refuge. Defend against evil hordes, reclaim lost powers, rebuild ancient ruins, and adapt your tactics to break the everSiege. A top-down action-strategy rogue-lite where choices shape every run, playable solo or up to 3 players in co-op.

name: Chico's Rebound
summary: A mysterious tower full of challenges has appeared. Launch Chico's walnut up at the blocks to break them all! Dash, dive, and tail-whip, while deploying an arsenal of creative power-ups. In between stages explore the Celestial Tower to solve puzzles, earn rewards, and uncover its secrets!

name: Nutmeg!
summary: NUTMEG! is a nostalgic football manager game with a deckbuilding twist, set in the '80s and '90s. Relive the days when the tackles were as hard as the mullets were long and football was about football.

name: Living Dead House
summary: Living Dead House delivers a pulse pounding, classic arcade experience. Battle through waves of the undead solo or team up with a friend. Use an arsenal of weapons and survival items to outlast the night. Will you escape alive and claim your top spot on the leaderboard?

name: GridBeat!
summary: Dungeons! Danger! Rhythm Action! You just hacked into the biggest corporation in the world and stole an unfeasibly valuable amount of data, but getting in was the easy part. To get back out you’ll need to explore the Mainframe, solve puzzles, battle security programs… and do it all on the beat!

name: Super Mario Bros. Wonder: Nintendo Switch 2 Edition + Meetup in Bellabel Park
summary: More experiences are coming to the Flower Kingdom! Enjoy a variety of attractions in the Bellabel Park plaza that lets you team up with (or work against) friends and family. Collect the most coins, run and hide in Phanto Tag, work together to pass a Bob-omb to the goal and more! This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition adds even more content and enhancements as well.

name: Icarus: Console Edition
summary: Land on Icarus, a planet broken due to failed terraforming. Once meant to be humanity’s second home, it is now a hostile frontier of toxic skies, savage wildlife, and relentless storms. Every drop from orbit is a fight for survival. Build shelter, craft weapons, hunt for food, and seek your fortune in exotic matter.

name: Etrange Overlord
summary: Join Étrange on this musical odyssey as she seeks to conquer hell in the pursuit of living her best afterlife.

name: Before Exit: Gas Station - Daylight DLC
summary: In the Daylight DLC, the perspective shifts to the gas station employee’s wife as she searches for her missing husband. Across seven days of investigation, you explore the station in daylight, documenting supernatural anomalies through photography to progress the new investigation-focused mode. Missing any key detail forces you to restart the inquiry. The DLC presents unexplained events that challenge logic, revealing the story from a new viewpoint and uncovering what truly happened to your husband.

name: Sweet Starlight Sisters
summary: “Sweet Starlight Sisters” is a character-raising romance adventure where you share a sweet life under one roof with the bunny-girl sisters Anya and Sanya. Train the duo with your own hands to become top performers, and—while occasionally fielding their heart-pounding advances—lead them to victory.

name: Taito Milestones 4
summary:
The 80s were a simpler and more colorful time. Especially in the arcades! With the Taito Milestones 4 collection, you can transport yourself back to the era of hairspray, neon, and pixels, and experience ten games from a variety of genres. Whether you enjoy sports, martial arts, platformers, shoot 'em ups, or even blocks and balls, you’re guaranteed to find something magical here.

WATER SKI
Released: 1983
Control a water skier being pulled by a motorboat while avoiding obstacles. Jump to dodge small obstacles, and hit a jump ramp to earn points! Just beware of the shark...

FIELD DAY
Released: 1984
This colorful sports festival includes seven unique games, such as three-legged race and tug-of-war. Up to four players can join, with two players competing in each match. Who will be the ultimate victor?

TYPHOON GAL
Released: 1985
Wear down your opponent’s stamina with punches and kicks, then finish them off with big techniques like the shoulder throw or brain buster! It’s a fight for the ages!

ARKANOID
Released: 1986
The classic block-breaking game! Arkanoid is easy to understand yet hard to master. Use the paddle-like craft Vaus to bounce balls, destroy blocks, and defeat the boss DOH! Elegant, simple and totally addictive!

BONZE ADVENTURE
Released: 1988
Yokai time! Two Buddhist priests must fight snakes, giant eyeballs, ghosts, spiders, and more to exorcise the evil from Enma, the king of the underworld. Too scared to go alone? Ask a friend to play with you!

KURI KINTON
Released: 1988
You are the master martial artist Kinton! Kick and punch your way through hordes of thugs to rescue an intelligence officer of the WSPO (World Shadow Police Organisation) and his daughter. Failure is not an option!

SYVALION
Released: 1988
Pilot the golden dragon-shaped mecha Syvalion to thwart Earth’s invasion by a mysterious army. The storyline changes dramatically with each playthrough, featuring over 100 different ending!

DON DOKO DON
Released: 1989
Join lumberjacks Bob and Jim as they set out to rescue the kidnapped king and princess of Marry Land. Use their trusty mallets to defeat any enemies standing in their way!

CAMELTRY
Released: 1990
Rotate the screen to guide a ball to the goal! Press the shake button to make the ball jump, and hold it to increase rolling speed. Can you get through the mazes in time for a high score?

THE NINJA KIDS
Released: 1990
When a peaceful town of puppets is overrun by a cult seeking to resurrect a demon, four ninja puppets take up the fight. This unique action fest supports up to four players at the same time!

name: Weed Supermarket Simulator
summary: Grow weed and grow your business! Run your own weed supermarket, manage stock, set prices, and help customers. Try new strains, choose the best products, upgrade your shop, and keep your store running smoothly so people always come back.

name: Neopets: Mega Mini Games Collection - The Neopian Arcade Odyssey
summary: Journey back to Neopia with 26 classic games, brought back to life for new and returning fans!

name: Life is Strange: Reunion
summary: Life is Strange: Reunion is the thrilling finale to the Max and Chloe saga, a chapter that brings their book to a close. This is a full circle moment for both developers and fans—one that builds on everything that has come before. And even as the game delivers a reunion long-thought impossible, it also caps off our time at Caledon University in a literal blaze of glory.

name: Dwarf Guild Mania
summary: Lead your capitalist dwarves across new lands in search of gems and gold. Each game brings a unique experience in this procedural turn-based strategy. You must vanquish your enemies, prospect for gems, construct mines, dispatch spies, and risk it all. For the Guild!

name: Diceaster
summary:
I made this game with one clear idea:

See how far you can go before you give up.

You control a die. Each face represents one available hit. Every time you launch yourself, you lose a face. As long as you still have faces, you have control, precision, and the ability to correct mistakes.

When you run out of hits, the die stops being a die. It turns into a ball and starts rolling. Rolling is not an advantage: it’s an alternative. A risky option that can help you move forward… or wipe out all your progress in seconds.

Each level reduces the number of hits available. The challenge is reaching just as far with fewer resources.

You will fall. A lot.

You will climb… sometimes.

And if you reach the top, there will be proof that you were there.

name: GwenBlade Witcheresque
summary: Hack and slash your way through depression in lightning-paced Soulslike to find a way to finally move on from loss in real life

name: Karigurashi Renai: Living on Borrowed Love
summary: Welcome back to your childhood town! The Full HD Remaster of Karigurashi Ren’ai: Living on Borrowed Love perfectly preserves ASa Project's signature blend of comedy and heartwarming charm while offering a stunning new visual experience.

name: Michael Test
summary: Michael Test is a point-and-click adventure game where you uncover hidden truths within classical paintings and follow faint traces of sound to deduce and choose the final ‘sin.’

name: Commie Block
summary: Survive as the newly appointed manager in an expanding communistic regime where our purpose is to produce more and more resources for the glory of motherland! Manage the workforce & optimize output of buildings to survive against unrealistic demands as long as possible in our own commie block

name: Is Zombody Home?
summary: Upgrade the house, customize the weapon and charge the special attacks, your cute zombie horde is about to attack.

name: Cards Lie
summary: Unmask the demons. Trust no one. You’ve gathered the entire village for a midnight ritual. Among them hide creatures of pure evil — demons disguised as villagers.

name: Blastroid
summary: Blastroid is an arcade-style roguelite set in space. Players customize their ships by combining different engine and weapon systems, striving to survive against ever-evolving threats in regions swarming with enemy waves.

name: BasketBlow
summary: Play tabletop basketball with realistic physics in relaxing environments. Compete in customizable leagues and cups, edit your teams, and complete your trophy room. Collect points to unlock courts, balls, and environments. Play with friends locally or online.

name: Rocky Idle
summary: Rocky Idle is a single-player idle/incremental game. Level up your skills, gather resources, and craft powerful combat gear to defeat the strongest bosses and complete your collection log.

name: Otome Daoshi Fighting For Love
summary: Welcome to Kayu, where every citizen, both man and woman, young and old alike, enjoy martial arts. Living in that kingdom as a Daoist priestess in training, you made your way to the Tournament of Valor to root for your childhood friend.

name: Tiny Misery
summary: A sick mother and her young son move into the home of a lonely old woman. A tragic story inspired by the dark puppet animations of the 80s and 90s.

name: CyberPunk Sex Tower
summary: The world of the future, modern technologies make it possible to create a super realistic sexual experience ...

name: Farming Sweeper
