summary: A first-person psychological horror game focused on exploration, puzzle-solving, and environmental storytelling. Discover the tragic story of Unit 199, where a fragmented consciousness still haunts the place.

name: Treeplanter
summary:
Create and enjoy a peaceful, interactive woodland throughout the changing seasons.
For every copy sold, we plant a real tree! 

Welcome to Treeplanter, an interactive woodland that grows and changes with the seasons. Piece together a small grove of trees, branch by branch, and watch as their roots blossom under the soil!

As time goes by, an ecosystem of animals, plants and birds will move in, turning your creation into a living world. Changing seasons and weather will affect the miniature universe of your grove.

Build your grove in a variety of landscapes, from sunny meadows to ancient ruins. Combining meditation and education, Treeplanter aims to teach players about the interconnected wonders of the natural world, above and below ground.

Each copy of the game sold helps Henry plant trees, wildflowers, meadows and community orchards, through partnerships with schools, farms, communities and woodland charities. Meaning you’ll help restore real-life nature too!!

name: Void Authority
summary: A sci-fi roguelike document-inspection game where you approve or deny alien travelers, scan for contraband, and navigate shifting galactic laws across border outposts, with each run shaping the future political climate.

name: Rhythm Animal Café
summary: Welcome to ​Rhythm Animal Café​! Animals' daily chaos meets funky beats: boss hype, colleague woes, your slacking, unfair blame—all become hilarious one-tap rhythm games! Simple controls, joyful groove. Feel music fuse with daily life’s warmth!

name: Jungle Jinx
summary: Set up camp deep in the jungle and begin your adventure! Explore lost ruins, collect artifacts, upgrade your gear, and grow your expedition. In Jungle Jinx, choose your path: dodge deadly traps, fight enemies, or race through the jungle on wild karts!

name: Awakeroots
summary: Awakeroots is a passion project—crafted by two brothers who combine creativity with a deep love for Slavic culture and storytelling. It’s not just a game—it’s a journey into a world that could have been… and now awakens again.

name: Mystic Fishing: A Fantasy Fishing RPG
summary: Travel through over 10 different biomes, catching over 90 different kinds of fish. Collect different rods, level up, and try to fill your Fish Encyclopedia. Experience a story-rich narrative filled with a fun and unique cast while exploring a Lovecraftian-ridden sea.

name: Lux Leonarii: A Mechanical Puzzle Adventure
summary: A puzzle game revolving around guiding beams of light throughout an ancient structure using a multitude of mirrors and devices, ranging from simple A to B connection to multiple colours and complex interactions.

name: Mage Blast
summary: Forge arcane might in this semi-idle deckbuilder! Craft spells layer by layer—turn a simple fireball into a barrage of flaming meteors. Build a deck of modifiers to trigger explosive combos, explore ancient realms for rare resources, and stitch together magic unlike anything the world has seen.

name: Factory Town 2: Paradise
summary: A cozy city-builder where you craft and sell tropical items to keep villagers happy. Use conveyor belts, trains, zip lines, catapults, and boats to automate delivery, optimize production, and earn the favor of a giant sentient volcano.

name: Bounce 2
summary: Bounce 2, the 1v1 Physics Based Digital Sport built with the warmth and comfort of 2D analog graphics, and the cold precision of modern computing and networking. Challenge your friends, together or online, in the Bounce Arena.

name: Iconic
summary: Battle an army of merciless monster icons in this lane-based horde survival roguelite frenzy and put an end to their evil endeavors. By clicking.

name: LinkShift
summary: A abstract arcade-style puzzle game with roguelite elements in which you place Nodes on a grid to try and form big connection chains. Use Upgrades and Master Nodes to change the rules or break them.

name: Stock the Shelves
summary: A Frantic Store Management Sim. Create the best shop you can imagine, then make it better! Manage, Upgrade, Keep Customers Happy, but most importantly STOCK THOSE SHELVES!

name: Sabotrix
summary: Sabotrix – A New Kind of Trolling Game! Use cunning strategy, precise control, and a variety of skill combinations to sabotage your enemies' operations and bring down those who seek to corrupt the Matrix World!

name: Kioku: Last Summer
summary: Kioku: Last Summer is a cozy, story-driven adventure where you play as Asti, a young girl spending her first summer on the mysterious island of Kioku. Set in a hand-crafted world blending Scandinavian and Japanese influences, players explore, build friendships, play minigames, uncover secrets, and relive the magic of early 2000s childhood summers.

name: Vexcell
summary: Vexcell is an elegant, minimalist puzzle game. Embrace the satisfaction of everything falling into place.

name: Floatineer
summary: The game is set in a world where lands have vanished beneath the waves. Players experience life as floating engineers, using modular architectural blocks to rebuild shelters that can withstand various disasters and fulfill villagers' aesthetic requirements within a given time limit.

name: Feudal Craft
summary: Immerse yourself in an exciting medieval settlement simulator where you will have to fight for your place in the feudal hierarchy. Use a smart strategy to develop your settlement. After all, it is the skills and equipment of each peasant that can make the difference.

name: Rest in Paws
summary: Explore the touching story of Kebab, a rural cat, as she copes with grief following her passing from old age. Delve into her world and discover the story of her life, from her adoption by a loving family to the meaningful recollections that shaped her being.

name: Inner Voice
summary: Step into the world of "Inner Voice", where the silence is louder than screams. In this atmospheric horror experience you will uncover long-buried secrets as the story unfolds. Every creak and every whisper holds a part of this story. Are you ready to face this nightmare?

name: Game Store Chronicle
summary: Run your own game store! Stay ahead by following the timeline of gaming history and preparing for key events that has shaped the industry. Stock shelves, set prices, and sell consoles, games, and accessories. Strategize to grow your business and dominate the market!

name: Raccoin: Coin Pusher Roguelike
summary: A coin-pushing dopamine machine. RACCOIN is a roguelike deckbuilder where you combine special coins with powerful items to trigger wildly satisfying combos. Stack shiny towers, spin the lucky wheel, and shake the machine until all the coins drop.

name: Wavekin
summary: Wavekin is a narrative adventure and underwater exploration game where you dive into the depths to discover an ancient civilization. Observe, listen, and use your song to unravel the ocean’s mysteries and breathe new life into a world on the brink of silence.

name: Before the Silence
summary: In this turn-based strategy, you will take control of an anti-disinformation department and protect your citizens from terrorist influence. Manage your agents and resources, analyze media, and restore order in different regions of your country.

name: Croakspire
summary: Dive into a fortress labyrinth crawling with monsters, defending yourself with your... tongue? As a frog, it's your best bet to traverse this retro-inspired 2D metroidvania title. Collect treasures to gain permanent upgrades, discovering new areas of the massive interconnected map with them!

name: Mysteries of Old Tokyo
summary: Step into the Imperial Capital, where knowledge is your weapon. Research and explore 40+ real-life Tokyo locations, past and present. Encounter a cast of wandering spirits, interrogate their stories, and separate the truth from their lies.

name: Remembrance
summary: Step into the fractured mind of a dying scientist in Remembrance, a mind-bending VR puzzle adventure. Piece together broken memories, uncover devastating truths, and decide the fate of a world teetering on the edge of collapse. Will you save humanity?

name: Gallipoli
summary: Land on the battlefields of the Middle Eastern Front of World War 1! Gallipoli brings the most authentic WW1 FPS battles yet, with desert warfare, beach landings, historical classes and realistic weaponry.

name: Chickens Don't Fly
summary: In this tough-as-nails physics-platformer, swing to freedom as a rooster whose only hope of escaping a harsh pit of hopelessness lies in a pair of plungers and his own strength. Grapple your way to freedom, but be careful—one wrong move can send you back to the start.

name: Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes
summary: In Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes, take command of a fleet escaping the annihilation of the Twelve Colonies. Manage crises on board as you prepare for the next encounter with the Cylon Fleet. Times are dire, and hard choices must be made. Your only hope: rejoin the Battlestar Galactica.

name: Sherlock Holmes: Night Stalker
summary: “When you have eliminated all which is impossible, then whatever remains, however improbable, must be the truth.” — Sherlock Holmes. This work is an immersive mystery and deduction game, powered by the latest large-scale AI model technology and offering a brand-new interactive experience.

name: Sky Legends: An Aeropostal Epic
summary: Play as the iconic pioneers of aviation and fly their legendary aircraft. Between human challenges and technical feats, cross the extreme landscapes of the Sahara, the Andes, or the Atlantic in an immersive, narrative, and historical virtual reality adventure.

name: Mega Drill: World Domination
summary: Run your mining empire to success and become the richest person in the world! Mega Drill is an action, management, upgrade game with a digging theme. Procedurally generated islands make every run different!

name: Heroes and Forsaken: The Official Wheel of Time Digital Card Game
summary: Heroes and Forsaken is the official Wheel of Time digital card game. Build decks under Leader identities, choose Light or Shadow, and face rivals in fast, tactical matches across the world of The Wheel of Time. Command legendary characters and spells, outplay your opponent, and shape the fate of the Age.

name: FrogSpin
summary: A wind-up frogventure bursting with colorful platforming and roguelike surprises. Spin the slots, master precision jumps, and rack up points. Ready to leap into action?

name: Frontline Logistics: Isarian Warfare
summary: A tactical survival and outpost management sim driven by dynamic battlefield events. War isn't just about combat—it’s about the daily lives of your soldiers. Keep logistics running, scavenge every usable resource, and do what you can to ease the harsh reality of life on the frontlines.

name: GameShop Simulator
summary: Run a GameShop set in the early 2000's. Manage your products for sale such as games, consoles, and accessories. Customize your store and your character to make it your own. Play solo or enjoy up to a 4 player co-op and run the store your way.

name: You Know The Drill
summary: You Know The Drill is a relaxing incremental mining game about digging underground to harvest ores. Collect resources, sell them, and upgrade your drill to go even deeper!

name: Touhou Unite Arena
summary: "Touhou Unite Arena" is a card Roguelike game based on the theme of the Touhou Project. Build your own team, combine the spell cards in your hand, play explosive attack values, defeat the target enemy step by step, and challenge the final champion!

name: Bonemarrow
summary: Bonemarrow is a short action survival horror in which you play a mutant creature created in a lab, destined to be used as a test subject. When the facility you were created in falls into disarray, you finally have your opportunity to escape. You may just make it out alive.

name: Dungeon Bodega Simulator
summary: Dungeon Bodega Simulator is a retro styled fantasy shop game where you can grow crops, brew potions, sell items and raise slimes as pets! Can you build up your bodega into a one stop adventuring shop while solving the mysteries of the dungeon beneath you?

name: Orebits
summary: Smash through alien rock with oversized mining gear, collect rare ores and uncover strange secrets. Orebits is a gritty sci-fi idle game full of mystery and metal.

name: Defense Collapse
summary: Defense Collapse is a strategy game set in a medieval fantasy world. Pioneer the unexplored dark forest, build your town and defenses, and hold out against the massive hordes of enemies. How long can you survive?

name: Ash & Adam's Existential Treads
summary: A mini action city-builder in a post-post-apocalyptic world. Grow your settlement. Fend off waves of enemies. Restore nature.

name: Cult Vacui
summary: Cult Vacui is a horror point-and-click adventure with survival and time management elements where your choices could keep you alive... or not.

name: Cloudspan
summary: In this bite-sized city builder, your goal is to stack and stretch your town as far as physics will allow. Tiny Island. Big mess.

name: War of Banners
summary: "Start with a handful of soldiers and rise to become a lord who shakes the battlefield!" The game is a medieval-style strategy/real-time combat RPG. Explore a vast land, raise your knights, and conquer new territories. A free mercenary, a loyal noble, or the ruler of an empire. Choose your path.

name: Lord of Ogre
summary: Lord of Ogre is a turn-based strategy game with action combat, where players manage their own attacks and defenses. It also features RPG, board game, and strategy elements for a unique victory quest.

name: The Mailroom
summary:
A horror job simulator where you work in the mailroom of a small regional office of Hell located in Modesto, California.

You just started working in the mailroom of that weird building on 5th. The job was easy enough at first. Sort the mail and use their creaky old pneumatic tube system to send it to the correct departments. But then shit started getting weird. Can you figure out what's really going on in this place and find a way out?

name: Island Beekeeper
summary: Island Beekeeper is a cozy sim where you harvest miraculous honey from sky islands to save a dying Earth. Explore biomes, breed exotic bees, craft elixirs and dishes. Relaxing farming, crafting and adventure with meditative cycles and mini-games.

name: My Infamous Dungeon
summary:
It's time to be evil. Build and master your dungeon, hire despicable monsters, and rise to conquer the overworld. Gaze from below as your dark tendrils creep across the land, snatching treasures from the forces of good and funding an ever growing empire. But beware! Saint Million the Hero King and his table of royal knights are always watching. Leave your dungeon weak, and a single cleave from the hero's sword will end your reign.

My Infamous Dungeon is a roguelite dungeon builder. Take time to carefully plan your dungeon, then protect it against waves of greedy heroes.

name: Berghotel Heist
summary: Co-op horror game that takes place in the Austrian Alps. Your break into a hotel, searching for valuable treasures, but little did you know that Perchten and Krampus are already waiting for you.

name: Cyber Siege
summary: Cyber Siege is a fast-paced twin-stick shooter with pure gameplay. Play solo or in local co-op up to 4 players. Upgrade your character and weapons as you fight 100+ enemy types across 20 levels in 4 distinct worlds.

name: Path to Tamer Town
summary: Travel from city to city collecting badges in these procedurally generated roguelite adventures. Catch and evolve your team of Mokitons, make tough choices, and fight using a unique real-time meets turn-based battle system – all leading up to the ultimate Stadium Showdown!

name: Frutiger Space
summary: Frutiger Space is a social multiplayer game about the future we were promised.

name: Mysplaced
summary: Mysplaced is an enchanting action-adventure game where exploration, puzzles, and combat come together in a beautifully crafted 3D world. Dive into a realm filled with secrets, challenges, and a compelling story waiting to be uncovered.

name: Jiji the Bajillionaire
summary: A precision puzzle platformer, with no legs. Propel Wizard Jiji by setting off bombs along with loads of powerups and mechanics. Help Jiji collect enough money to pay off his debt and break his curse!

name: Soul Essence
summary: A frantic, race-against-time survival horror game with Roguelite and Metroidvania elements. Traverse a decrepit, cultist-infested estate and collect awakened souls to conquer an ancient god looking to feast on your essence. Before midnight strikes—can you defeat the god or prevent its return?

name: Together: Moon Escape
summary: Trapped on the Moon, two astronauts must work together to escape! Solve clever co-op puzzles, share laughs, and survive a hilarious lunar adventure with your partner.

name: AlcheMice
summary: Explore 16th-century Granada, steeped in tarot and alchemy. Face Gusparda, the cursed witch, and fight for your freedom. Build your deck, choose every move across 3D boards, and use strategy and tactics to break the curse and craft the Philosopher’s Stone.

name: Cora
summary: CORA (Counter Offensive Rapidfire Automata) is a singleplayer/multiplayer top-down shooter created by Empty House Games borrowing inspiration from other arcade top-down shooters.

name: Dice Card Heroes
summary: In this roguelike deckbuilder, every card features its own dice. Battle against many fantastic creatures across 3 chapters. Upgrade your cards, build countless synergies and find mighty weapons to shape your playstyle. There is only one goal: Be the hero, slay the dragon.

name: Deadliest Pigeon
summary: Equip weapons against physics-based enemies, swing through chaos with grappling hook and destroy everything in your path to avenge the little chick!

name: The Afterlife Cafe
summary: In a city split between life and afterlife, chat with spirits, brew drinks to suit your mood, and bond with the people who run the cafes that connect both worlds. In this urban sci-fi fantasy visual novel, your choices impact the living, the departed, and your own path forward.

name: Elfie: A Sand Plan
summary: A perfect day at the beach requires sand castles. Help a small ambitious elephant with her ideas in this relaxing geometric puzzle game! Or enjoy building your own!

name: Well Keeper
summary: Well Keeper is a Bullet Hell Shoot `Em Up where you move by flapping. Battle waves of enemies, upgrade unique and unexpected abilities and become immensely powerful.

name: Deadly Trick
summary: Survive the death game unfolding at school under the name "Special Class." You are not given any special role at the beginning. Depending on the situation or your own choices, you could become the White or the Shadow! Cooperate… or betray.

name: Cat Island Petrichor
summary: "Cat Island Petricolor" is an exploration adventure game set on Japan's summer "Cat Island." Become a cat, explore the island, and uncover the mysteries of Cat Island together with the heroine!

name: The Hidden Scrolls
summary: The Hidden Scrolls is a turn-based roguelike tactical RPG with a Chinese-inspired setting. Explore five mysterious regions, battle fierce beasts and ruthless bandits, recruit and train a team of warriors to uncover the secrets hidden within ancient bamboo scrolls.

name: Scribble Wolf
summary: A Werewolf game (or social deduction game), in which you can control the character that you have drawn. Up to 10 players can play online. Perhaps the key to victory is to "draw tracing" of an opposing team's character and "disguise yourself" as it...?

name: Dress the Duel
summary: "Dress the Duel," is a roguelike deckbuilding game where your cards are your wardrobe and your outfit is your arsenal!Build a versatile wardrobe, disrobe strategically, layer outfits for powerful effects, and Dress the Duel!

name: BB Adventure
summary: “BB Adventure” is an immersive action game where you ride a real balance ball and clear athletic stages. Using a controller with an accelerometer, your balance ball’s movements control the in-game character, making you feel as if you’re inside the game.

name: Beast Gang
summary: Place cards on a 5×5 board to complete hands in rows, columns, and diagonals in this fresh, casual puzzle game! Simple controls, deep strategy, and addictive combos await. Use items to turn the tide and push your score to the limit in endless mode!

name: Space Revolver
summary: Space Revolver is a strategic puzzle game set in a space station. Use limited moves—such as map rotation, gravity control, and horizontal movement—to find the optimal path. Enjoy clever and deep puzzles with retro-style pixel art and a classic sci-fi atmosphere!

name: The Last Keeper
summary: In 1900, three keepers vanished. The official report lied. Now, you are the new keeper. Wind the gears. Polish the lens. In the consuming dark, let your voice be the spark. The sea is hungry. The island remembers. Based on the real Flannan Isles mystery.

name: Blast Head
summary: Blast Head is a fast-paced action roguelite/bullet heaven with absurd weapons, powerful runes, and non-linear weapon skill trees. Dive into 10–30 minute runs, discover wild synergies, and unleash chaos across alien arenas.

name: Catio Simulator
summary: Catio Simulator is a relaxing idle game in which you decorate a catio to attract cats. Pet your cats to get them ready for adoption, collect adoption fees, and buy new decorations and petting abilities!

name: Everglen
summary: Build your dream farm in a cozy pixel RPG. Grow crops, fish, mine, and explore a charming island full of secrets. Meet quirky NPCs, craft and trade items, and uncover magical surprises at your own pace. Relax, explore, and create your story in this farming adventure.

name: IPS 13: All Signals Lost
summary: Take command of the massive VOD(Vehicle of Destruction) and journey across planet Gaiganthra with your IPS(Inter-Planetary Squad)-13 crew to uncover the mystery of humans there. Be prepared for the worse and ready to fight. Upgrade your VOD, hire new crew factions, to be the ultimate War Machine.

name: AnimalFruitTart
summary:
Simple controls—just jump! Play with one button in this physics-based, intuitive action game!
Bounce and roll through a candy world in the grand adventure of the “Animal Fruits”!

name: Sokoku
summary: A block-pushing game where you not only push blocks, you are one. Plan your movements so that the right number ends up on top, while you interact with other cubes and mechanics. Can you roll your way to the solution?

name: [Herror] Gas Station Case
summary:
[HERROR] is a series of short horror episodes where everyday work routines collide with paranormal threats. Each episode is a unique standalone story lasting 1.5–2 hours.

Dan Cooper, a 25-year-old night shift gas station worker in Ohio, recently laid off from a uranium plant, is trying to put his life back together. But everything changes when his friend Michael discovers a mysterious case by the lake. Soon, people begin to vanish in the surrounding woods, and the cozy gas station turns into a deadly trap.

name: Project II: Silent Valley
summary: Project II: Silent Valley is a linear, semi-open world dystopian visual novel with card combat and explore. Play as US Navy Officer Hierophan, joining the docile humanoid weapon Osprey to uncover a conspiracy at the underwater base "Silent Valley" and the hidden truths of his missing friend, Ochira.

name: Nophenia
summary: explore atmospheric dreams of vagrant but familiar memories.

name: Lobsterpunk
summary: Lockpick your way through an abandoned city powered solely by the combustion of lobsters. Bring the dead machinery one last breath of life before their steel forms lay cold forever. As you do, see the memories of the last man on earth, and how familiar that might feel, however foreign the setting.

name: Black Cat Book Club
summary: A magical library you can place on your desktop. Help the black cat study ancient tomes and learn spells in this cozy idle game.

name: The Gate Must Stand
summary: Fend off brutal waves of demonic hordes as a mobile hero amongst your stationary allies. As the city’s last line of defense, recruit followers, unlock upgrades, and synergize skills to hold the line against apocalyptic bosses. Remember: heroes can fall, but the gate must stand.

name: The Solitary Existence of a Little Universe
summary: In this dark interactive novel you will play as a lost soul wandering a forsaken desert, accompanied by a mysterious girl. Explore ancient ruins and face obscure choices. Your decisions will shape their journey—often in ways you’ll never fully understand. Will you find peace, or something else?

name: Deliverance Protocol: Ironrot
summary: Atmospheric first-person retro horror. You are a courier — a disposable tool of the System. Sort, deliver, collect archives. Obey… or uncover what lies inside.

name: Everbrew
summary: Farm, cook, and design your very own woodland café in Everbrew, a cozy pixel-art management game. Harvest ingredients, craft delicious meals, and welcome woodland creatures as they gather to relax, eat, and feel at home.

name: The Bestest Alchemist
summary: Solve puzzles and brew potions in The Bestest Alchemist, a strategic match-3 roguelike! Freely arrange ingredients to create magical combinations, discover 100+ new recipes, and upgrade your collection to build powerful synergies. Your journey to becoming a master alchemist starts now!

name: Seek & Sail
summary: Seek & Sail is a pirate-themed deck-building roguelike. Your deck is made up of sailors, each bringing their own actions into combat. Upgrade your crew, uncover unique relics, and face intense naval battles where timing is everything.

name: Convent Chronicles: Revelation
summary: A visual novel that combines religious themes from Catholicism with anime inspired drama and visuals.

name: The Floor Above
summary: A claustrophobic anomaly-horror game where you can only turn, blink, and decide: is it real or not? Survive five endings and uncover Mike’s story.

name: Kkokko Industry
summary: Kkokko Industry is a relaxing idle game where you manage a chicken farm. The game runs on one side of your monitor, allowing you to enjoy it comfortably while working on other tasks.

name: Snow Steam Trail
summary: Drive a steam-powered truck across frozen wastelands to uncover the truth behind the Great Freeze. Gather resources, refuel, repair, and upgrade your vehicle. Cultivate and cook plants. What secrets await in this slumbering frostland?

name: Car Dealer Simulator: Up 2 You DLC
summary: With the Up 2 You DLC, Car Dealer Simulator lets you fully customize your dealership, cars, and brand. Design interiors, tune cars, attract new clients with new Photo Mode, and even race your own ride in illegal street races.

name: The Reflex Lab
summary: You've been kidnapped by an evil (and extremely rude) alien. To escape, you’ll have to complete a series of reflex, skill and patience based trials in his poorly constructed laboratory. Will you survive the alien’s twisted tests and escape? Or will you end up like his last batch of “lab rats”?

name: One Nation Under the Old Gods
summary: A Rogue-lite Deckbuilder set in early 1800s United States. Play as members of a secret organization that investigates occult activity in an effort to stop various cults from summoning Eldritch Gods. Acquire cards to create combos and synergies to defeat your enemies in turn-based combat!

name: Blast Bebop
summary: Blast Bebop is an easy-to-pick-up action-incremental game, combining dodging, shooting, collecting, and upgrades, set to retro pixel visuals and psychedelic music for a short, relaxing combat experience.

name: Jack's 510 Racing
summary: Jack's 510 Racing is an open world arcade driver set on nine connecting islands. Earn points by racing on the streets, surviving UFOs and police, or causing mayhem in death races inspired by the cult classic movie. Use points to upgrade, customize, and buy new cars.

name: Hand Meat Walker
summary: A strategy-driven FPS where you explore vast and confined areas, exterminate malicious creatures, and solve puzzles alongside your robot companion. Fend off monsters in large arenas with your battle machine — and be ready to survive on your own!

name: Lucky Break: Dating in New York
summary: A Slice-of-Life Dating Sim with AI Full-Motion Videos, set in modern New York.

name: Where the Forest Ends
summary: Where the forest end is a story-driven, top-down horror shooter set in a zombie-infested post-apocalypse. Visceral, grounded, and realistic. A fresh take on a classic genre.

name: R.E.A.P.E.R. Corp.
summary: A co-op horror about scavenging a post-apocalyptic earth and eating your friends.

name: Blitloop
summary: A fast-paced, side-scrolling retro shooter where you play as “Blit" on a mission to rescue orb pods. Blast enemy swarms and face off against bosses in this bullet-hell shoot 'em up. Earn power-ups and get ready for fluid arcade action in a stylish world with an 80s synthwave soundtrack.

name: Tyrone vs. Cops 2
summary: Awaken the latent power of your melanin and kill cops in this thought-provoking game on police brutality in America.

name: Fractals
summary: Fractals is a two-player co-op puzzle platformer where players complete puzzles and challenges using innovative mechanics. Work together to solve physics-based puzzles and go through platforming challenges.

name: Don't Freeze: A Winter Card Survival
summary: Don't Freeze is a winter card survival game set in a winter wasteland. Explore, gather resources, craft, hunt, die, repeat. Something sinister lurks in the cold darkness. Will you make it out in time?

name: Love Surge!
summary: Love Surge! is a comedy dating sim where you can romance human versions of your appliances, merging visual novel text with card game mechanics. As you rack up point combos, you will simulate deeper conversations. Who will you choose?

name: The Stalked 3
summary: A late-night thrill turns into a nightmare. Olivia sneaks into Creepwood Wonderland Carnival with her boyfriend, expecting a fun night alone in the park. But something feels off. Distant footsteps. Faint whispers. Someone else is here… Watching.

name: Restless Rites
summary: Tend to a cursed chapel at the edge of town, or be swallowed by what sleeps beneath it. Clean, survive, and unravel a rotting mystery in this surreal horror game of routine, decay, and sacrifice.

name: The Last Tape: Before the Mine
summary: In this first chapter of the saga, relive an old tape recorded over 35 years ago, revealing one of Lurmont Corporation’s darkest secrets. Explore the Alhambra mines, uncover the truth behind the events, and survive the constant threat of B-96. What was once recorded now hunts you.

name: Out on the Water
summary: Out On The Water is a short, meditative journey through memory and grief that tells the story of an inattentive father and his last chance to connect with his children. Set adrift in quiet waters that represent each child, catch strange memory fish to uncover the past and face regrets.

name: Impact Trial: Hyperchaos
summary: Face endless waves and survive the chaos! Impact Trial: Hyperchaos is a casual spaceship bullet hell with adaptive difficulty, where your reflexes and decisions make the difference against hundreds of relentless enemies. Push your limits and climb the global leaderboards.

name: Perk Up
summary: Perk Up! is a multiplayer deck-building fighting game where every defeat makes you stronger. Each time you fall, you gain new powers, evolving into an unstoppable force. Keep fighting, adapt, and outlast everyone to become the last one standing!

name: System Clues
summary: Play as a secret agent of a mysterious organization and complete complex plot investigation tasks through network infiltration, social engineering, and digital investigation. Is it justice or sin?

name: Remnant Frontier: Survival
summary: The Remnants of humanity send an augmented human to a seemingly uninhabited alien frontier. From sticks and stones, build the tools required to complete the Quantum Gate Terminus and save the world. A relaxed yet deep and engaging Rogue-lite Card Based Adventure; Combine, Explore, Learn & Build.

name: Rotten Life: Desert Prisoner
summary: "Rotten Life" is a dark medieval RPG where you play a desperate mercenary. Complete lethal contracts, explore cursed dungeons, and manipulate warring factions. In this brutal world, survival means getting your hands dirty. No heroes - just blood, gold, and hard choices.

name: Amanita
summary: Amanita is an introspective journey into your mind where the path seems to be only one, and it does not seem to be easy. Let yourself be guided by surreal characters in your thoughts, clash with your memories with sword blows, wander in your memory, play cards with your fears.

name: Fishing Tales: Neko's Journey
summary: A relaxing idle fishing game focused on companionship, featuring 26 fishing spots and over 200 fish species. Easy to enjoy without much effort. You can place the game anywhere on your screen while studying or working, without it intruding on your tasks.

name: Asteroid Boom Cosmic Courier
summary: You’re no hero—you’re a subcontractor. Drop the bomb, dodge the blast, and hope the paperwork clears. 4-player physics chaos in a space platformer with no safety net.

name: Tiny Hell
summary: A 2D pixel roguelike where a tiny hero tries to escape from a hotel. Choose a class, explore rooms, collect items, craft powerful weapons, and defeat enemies in turn-based battles. Each run is unique and full of surprises.

name: Pizza Syndicate
summary: Run your pizza empire in this quirky retro tycoon! Manage restaurants, hire staff, craft menus, and outsmart rivals. Dive into the underground syndicate—rob banks, hire hitmen, sabotage competitors, and use any scheme to dominate the city with humor and strategy! WISHLIST NOW!

name: Wanted Shadows: Unchained
summary: A survivors-like game where you defeat creatures of the night trying to take over the underworld. Vanquish the invasion, perfect your build, and become purgatory's master.

name: Virtuoso GP Race: On
summary: An homage to early 3D racers: true ’90s handling with bespoke physics, checkpoints with EXTEND TIME, instant restarts, ghosts, and global leaderboards. Demo: Sakura Coast & Dunas de Giza.

name: Slimeward
summary: Slimeward is an idle game where players build and upgrade a village, recruit heroes, and defeat Monster 'Slime' that fell in front of the house one day,

name: 1492: Colonization of the New World
summary: Chart your nation's rise in 1492 Colonization of the New World, a turn-based strategy game where you explore, settle, trade, and lead your colonies to independence amid rival empires and native alliances during the Age of Discovery.

name: Combotronica
summary: Discover hidden patterns. Build spectacular chains packed with combos. Collect powerful Amulets. Watch scores skyrocket in this brilliantly satisfying roguelike deck-builder where you balance logic and luck your way!

name: Ware's Laboratory
summary: Anti-piracy measures are now active. Your game has turned into a nightmare. Crawl through corrupted levels, read notes from a malicious developer, and face the nature of evil itself.

name: Faust Duel
summary: FAUST DUEL is a Blackjack-driven roguelike deck-builder. Play as Dr. Faust, who lost his wager and now joins Hell’s games. Within a limited number of rounds, earn enough chips to buy back your soul from its master.

name: Hand-me-downs
summary: A roguelike deck builder where you are your own worst enemy. Manage your deck as your opponents use your old hands against you. Use powerful trinkets to take full control of the table.

name: MechShell
summary: Defend the Overgrown Realms as S.H.E.L.L., a weaponized snail! Customize your shell, unlock wild abilities, and team up with friends in chaotic multiplayer mayhem across lush, trap-filled biomes. Every battle is a fast-paced, action-packed adventure!

name: Decision Point
summary: Plans meet friction in Decision Point, a wargame where you issue NATO-standard orders, observe AI execution in real time, and adapt as the battlefield evolves. At key Decision Points, the action pauses—giving you time to reassess, redirect your forces, and outmanoeuvre the enemy.

name: Gun of Fate: The Silver Gun of Ylia
summary: A shooting adventure RPG game, where you play as a gunslinger in Westland. The main combat system of the game is gun shooting. You can complete quest and side missions, unlock items and equipment, and also play fishing and horse racing mini games.

name: Divine Sin
summary: A deck-building roguelike with innovative card mechanics, blending strategy with unpredictability. In a decaying dark fantasy world, you are a resurrected Apostle—sworn to hunt the gods.

name: Red Souls
summary: Prepare to suffer! Swords, Knights, Castles, Deflect, Gun Parry, Execution, Boss, Assassination, Explore, Ladder, Elevator, Does not open from this side, Clang! Clang! Clang!

name: Clan Fantasy Adventures
summary: Clan fantasy adventures is a turn-based 2D RPG. Play Marco, a young boy who wants to become a swordsman, through various adventures that will plunge him into the heart of a major conflict.

name: Stardust Escape
summary: Survive 15 minutes of neon space chaos in this fast-paced top-down arcade shooter with a twist of Asteroids. Blast through swarms of geometric enemies, complete quirky quests, and upgrade your ship with absurd weapons in a Jetsons-style galaxy brimming with danger, glow, and humor.

name: My Hero: Before the Conquest
summary: This is a turn-based card game. Build a powerful team, reasonably arrange your cards according to the environment, and fully utilize the equipment, potions, and scrolls you have obtained. Keep fighting until you reach the deepest part of the enemy's territory!

name: Joyful Masks
summary: Step into the subconscious mind of a brilliant professor, where memories twist, logic bends, and hidden truths await discovery through intricate puzzles

name: Uncle Lee’s Cookbook: Five Recipes for Disaster
summary: Uncle Lee has done it again. It’s up to you to pick up the pieces. Join rebellious teen Ines as she deals with the fallout of her uncle Lee’s experiments/inventions/cooking, in a modern point & click adventure in five self-contained episodes.

name: Sticky Date
summary: An anti-dating simulator that subverts the genre and provides catharsis through relatable, raw and satirical dates. You play as an underpaid dumpling cook who, in order to make ends meet, gets recruited by a sketchy dating app agent. Now you need to crash dates in order to earn a living wage!

name: Deckanism: Singularity Island
summary: A roguelike deckbuilder meets auto-battler where every fight is a puzzle. Build mechanisms, counter enemies and unleash your perfect combo!

name: Gazar
summary: GAZAR is an intense vertical arcade space shooter where you fight against an alien fleet destroying the galaxy. Battle through Story Mode or test your skills in Infinity Mode with 5 difficulty levels and leaderboards. GAZAR delivers non-stop action, stunning visual effects, and dynamic combat.

name: Reborn: The Evil Being
summary: This is an open-world action-adventure game where you explore a stunning and vibrant fantasy world full of magic, mystery, and hidden danger. Play in either third-person or first-person as you battle monsters, uncover secrets, and grow stronger in your quest to find the truth behind your arrival.

name: The Lists VR
summary: Mount your horse, lower your lance, and experience the thrill of medieval jousting in full virtual reality. The Lists VR puts you directly on the tournament field in 15th-century Europe. Compete in a focused, skill-based jousting experience where your body becomes the controller.

name: Big Beautiful Women: Giantess Dating Action
summary: If you like big girls, this is the game for you. Play as a college student trying to find love in a city full of giant ladies. 5 lovely ladies to woo, 5 stats to manage, and 10 endings to reach. Can you fall in love before you graduate?

name: DualVerse86
summary: A 2D retro speedrunner where every second counts. Switch between worlds, dodge traps, beat the clock.

name: Tales of Justice Academy: Winds Arise
summary: You can play as a young martial artist entering Justice Academy. Train through various courses, customize your build with different weapons, skills, and inner techniques. Explore the jianghu, bond with companions, and shape your fate across branching stories and three romanceable heroines.

name: Messy Hearts
summary: Messy Hearts is a pixel-art visual novel about a complicated coworker friendship. Through journal-style narration, Florence unpacks romance, trauma, and some messy boundaries in a deeply personal story of mental health and heartbreak. No choices; this is a linear narrative.

name: Dungeon Forge
summary: You are a blacksmith, not a hero. Create weapons with countless unique combinations, exploit monsters’ weaknesses, and supply heroes with what will determine their fate.

name: Recoup
summary: Bring back mankind. Bring down factions. Explore the new world by solving light grid puzzles. Interact with lots of unique citizens such as a cashier and a shopkeeper. Recruit and bargain through combat-like dialogues. Modify your abilities as you experience the story through comic cutscenes.

name: To Crown or to Destroy
summary: Fight horrible creatures. Devour other fairytales' hearts. Set the Princess free from her cage...and rewrite her fate! To Crown or to Destroy is a narrative RPG inspired by dark fairy tales, and tragic love stories.

name: SOS: Save Our Ship
summary: SOS is a 4-player online co-op horror-action game. Operate your ship, explore dangerous islands, loot valuable treasures, and escape deadly enemies to repay your soul’s debt. Strategy and teamwork are key to survival!

name: Cuzuco
summary: Challenge yourself and demonstrate your precise high-speed hand control to help our little armadillo get back home as fast as possible in this fair but unforgiving platformer game.

name: Eagle Legacy: Zero
summary: Explore a cursed realm locked in mist and blood. Solve ancient puzzles, cast forbidden spells, and survive the Witch’s trial in this dark third-person adventure set at the edge of myth and memory.

name: Pelican Empyrean
summary: Food is love! In this fantastical roguelike card game share the magic of abundance by cooking delicious meals for all who come to Pelican's kitchen.

name: Referee Life Simulator 2026
summary: A realistic referee simulator! Show cards, use VAR, control matches, and rise through your referee career!

name: Forgotten: Whispers From Ashes
summary: A curse lurks in the fog in this psychological and investigative horror game. Use a strange lantern to uncover the truth and solve the mystery of Centreville and its ghostly inhabitants. Will you break the curse… before it drives you insane?

name: Starship Dice
summary: Starship Dice​​ is a strategy game with dice at its core, inspired by Mahjong. Players use dice to command fleets in battle. Different point values and dice combinations form scoring hands. But don't worry, you can still battle even without forming a complete hand.

name: Saga of Yurina
summary: A 2D action platformer of graceful duels and perfect parries under the falling sakura.

name: The Sage's Spirit: Shining Flame
summary: A Japanese-inspired Western fantasy visual novel with a female-centric narrative, set in a unique world. Play commoner mage Nolan: follow your mentor to Sabelien, forge bonds, face power struggles. Choose to avoid chaos or carve your path—your choices will shape Aorleton and the Mage Guild’s fate.

name: Rift Survivors
summary: Rift Survivors is a 2D survivor-like game where you grow stronger by arranging your inventory. Equip items to unlock hidden powers and create your own unique build. Cross the rifts and survive against endless waves of enemies!

name: Synth Laser
summary: Synth Laser is a dynamic laser maze rhythm game. Get ready to dodge and weave around the deadly and stunning laser show, built upon the outrun and synthwave music.

name: RebreatheR
summary: Underwater, you're alone. Or almost alone. You're a diver doing routine work: cleaning the seabed, collecting waste, fixing pipes. But deep down there's always something wrong. Explore, repair, survive — and try not to lose your mind.

name: Synergy Strike
summary: Arcade game where you play as triangles that dash strike enemies. Enter the flow state to climb global leaderboards while earning massive combos. Up to 4 friends can join in synergy with couch co-op team mode. Unlock prizes using your precision, poise, and persistence as 2D colorful combat ignites.

name: How Many Secrets Under Ceiling
summary: The first light novel-style immersive detective game's here! A dentist dead in a double-locked room seems like a suicide, but unexplained contradictions connect different truths. Each investigation and puzzles are up to you. But wait, what's wrong with this suspicious "assistant" following?!

name: Whiskers Wizards & Wands
summary:
Whiskers Wizards and Wands is a whimsical and cozy adventure game. Take on the role of a Wizard Cat who interacts with the world around them via a customizable wand. Fight enemies, find secret treasures, design spell combinations, to repair a world that has been broken and scrambled.

The game has a beautiful orchestral score, and is completely hand-drawn. Every image was drawn with markers on paper before being placed into the game.

name: Casino Tycoon: Sin & Win
summary: Rise from a broke gambler to a casino kingpin in this high-stakes sim blending management, gambling, and adult content. Win big, indulge in luxury, go bankrupt, or start a gang war—every choice writes your destiny. In this city, you either rule the tables… or end up in a ditch.

name: Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy
summary:
A new Dissidia story unfolds in modern Tokyo, where legendary Final Fantasy warriors assemble to save the world from destruction.
Defeat the boss faster than the enemy team in exhilarating, action-packed battles in this 3v3 Team Boss Battle Arena.

name: Hacked: The Streamer
summary: You are blackmailed in Hacked: The Streamer. Investigate clues, make impactful decisions, and shape your story to uncover the culprit is in this thrilling interactive movie. The fate of PinkyPie, a fan-favorite streamer, is in your hands.

name: Echoes of the Hive
summary: Team up with friends in this 2D fantasy sandbox adventure! Explore mysterious worlds, craft powerful gear, battle monsters, and delve deep underground to uncover secrets and challenge epic bosses.

name: Yāo Liàn Xī Yóu
summary: You, an ordinary college student, are unexpectedly reincarnated into another world, becoming the new "Golden Body" chosen by Jin Chanzi. Characters from "Journey to the West" suddenly reappear before you in the guise of women. To return to your original world, you must complete the mission entrusted to you by "Tathagata Buddha." Renew your bonds with various demons, undo the mistakes of the previous Golden Body, "Tang Sanzang," and retrace your journey westward, reshaping order and causality...

name: Shāpán Zhànzhēng: Sānguó
summary: "Shāpán Zhànzhēng: Sānguó" is a strategic simulation game set during the Three Kingdoms period. Here you can play as various factions from Three Kingdoms history to conquer cities and lands, unify the realm. With abundant historical officers and scenarios, come restore the Han Dynasty!

name: It Reaches
summary: It Reaches is a first person horror game, captured through the lens of a police officer’s body cam. Trapped inside the facilities of an abandoned hospital, find a way to escape the horrors lurking underground. Uncover a dark mystery left behind and don't get caught! They will reach for you…

name: Torch of Shadows
summary: Torch of Shadows is a fast-paced roguelite where Light and Dark clash endlessly. Defend the temple, counter enemies with opposing powers, and preserve the fragile balance before the void consumes all.

name: TypeCaster
summary: A once-shameless thief, cursed with a slow, agonizing death, must now embark on a perilous journey to the top of the legendary Tower of Trials. This 2.5D action RPG challenges you to master lightning-fast reflexes and precise typing to battle hordes of fearsome monsters guarding each floor. Harness powerful spells, uncover treasures, and push yourself to the limits in your battle against the unknowns. Will you rise to the challenge and break the curse, or will you become another victim?

name: Tiny Bakery
summary: Run a tiny bakery for sweet-toothed slime customers! Bake multi-step recipes, keep track of every bowl, and adapt to changing weather as you unlock new recipes and welcome new guests. Take your time at night to prep for the next day.

name: Desktop Purrfect
summary: Your purr-fect desktop companion is here! Get adorable cats that chill at the bottom of your screen, keeping you company while you work, study, play, or relax. Collect toys & furniture to build them a cozy home. Pet, feed, play, or simply enjoy their presence.

name: Cosmos Point
summary: Control a squad of fighters in turn-based battles. The game pays great attention to the details of equipment - weapons, backpacks, a lot of grenades and other devices. More resources taken out of the mission - more improvements at the base. There are no useless items, there is a small backpack.

name: Wasteland Shop Simulator
summary: A post-apocalyptic shop management game where you build, customize, and expand your store. Hire staff, explore the wasteland for loot, deal with messy customers and thieves, and grow your retail empire in a chaotic world gone mad.

name: Basement 66
summary: The dice roguelike. You’ve been locked in Basement 66 with the Demon. Roll the death dice. Destroy cursed cards. Remember, only one of you can leave this hell alive. Will you survive? Good luck…

name: Indian Mechanic Simulator
summary: Fix punctures, repair engines, wash, paint, and restore scooters, cars, and more in Indian Mechanic Simulator. Experience authentic street-side repairs and become the most trusted mechanic in town!

name: Rustmire
summary: In this side-view pixel-art world, you captain a landship—survive by combat and scavenging, and grow your modular vessel into your own city. Among roaming cities and underground enclaves, records and wreckage hint at why people live this way… or how you become wreckage.

name: Bamorota Defense
summary: Defend the sealstones in a fantasy world! Place towers and cast spells to stop endless waves of monsters in this casual tower defense game.

name: Bouncemasters 2: Pengu Throw
summary: Bouncemasters 2: Pengu Throw is a sequel to the 300-million-downloads fun arcade hit and a successor of the legendary Yetisports! Grab your bat, line up the perfect swing and bounce your way around Levels Map. Chase glory while branching biomes packed with hazards, boosters and memes!

name: The Day of Salvation
summary: "The Day of Salvation" is a horror game in which players must escape from giant humanoid creatures by hiding in the fog and discovering their true identities.

name: Death Flags
summary: Death Flags: The Beginning of the End is a rail shooter in VR packed with action and an epic story. Survive relentless waves of cursed pirates, upgrade your weapons with special ammo, and uncover the hidden secrets within this incredible shooter.

name: Bharat Police
summary: Lead a police force in noir India. Manage officers, respond to emergencies, and upgrade your team. Navigate crime, corruption, and deep-rooted social tensions. Every decision has consequences.

name: Object Impermanence
summary: A first person puzzle game where your vision defines reality, and only the things you can see exist. Learn and master the strange behaviours of objects outside your vision. Traverse the ancient structures of a world forgotten by the universe.

name: Eldritch Horror: Digital Edition
summary: Uncover ancient cults, battle horrific monsters and thwart the rise of unfathomable Ancient Ones in a 1920s-themed adventure. In this faithful adaptation of the classic board game, you must race against time to save humanity from ancient powers and dark secrets before all is lost.

name: Espectro the Fighters Focus
summary: Espectro - The Fighter's Focus is a beat 'em up action game with retro visuals and exuberant pixel art. Espectro and his allies, Sayuri and Iron Crusher, face hordes of enemies and powerful bosses in their quest for justice.

name: Lexispell
summary: Strategy meets physics, in this roguelike word game, where you combine spelling with cool upgrades to score high.

name: Augmented Fear
summary:
Augmented Fear is a horror puzzle game set in a dark and oppressive cyberpunk universe.
Trapped in a mysterious district, you must find a way out and survive against aggressive creatures.
Use augmented reality to uncover the secrets hidden within.

name: Mini Shopkeeper
summary: Run your cozy little shop from the bottom of your screen, decorate to attract unique customers, hire assistants, and send adventurers for rare treasures - all in a lively, charming management sim!

name: Starbump
summary: Starbump combines fast-paced action, Third Person platforming and competitive modes in vibrants worlds. It’s designed for party nights where you and your friends battle it out for hours, packed into colorful arenas and quick-fire game modes. It's a pure cozy brawl !

name: Dumpling
summary: DUMPLing is a fast-paced top-down survival shooter with a metroidvania twist. Pulled into the strange land of DUMPL, you’ll explore tunnels in platformer perspective, fight dumpling-like enemies in top down perspective, and uncover a bizarre story about food, friendship, and survival.

name: Escape From Ruin: Greymart Simulator
summary: A post-apocalyptic loot-fight-extract survival game with escape-style raids by day and black-market shop management by night. Fans of Tarkov-like gameplay — and players who love running management sims — will feel right at home.

name: Drillbound
summary: Drillbound is a short incremental game about mining your way to the planet’s core. Crush layers of rock, gather resources, upgrade your drill, and unlock powerful technologies as you descend into the depths.

name: The Doodle Palette
summary: A cozy sandbox for building and painting miniature worlds. Place, paint, and decorate while tiny people and birds bring your dioramas to life.

name: MOLE
summary: Voices of the dead are calling you from deep below the earth. Pilot the Mole, a Soviet drilling vessel, in this PSX-style simulator-horror game set during the waning days of the cold war.

name: Daughter of the Rift
summary: Daughter of the Rift is story-rich card-battling adventure with a unique deck-building progression system.

name: Midnight Scenes: Among Graves
summary: When the graves stop whispering in your ear, it’s time for you to surrender to eternal silence. So says the Agreement, and so it must be fulfilled. Welcome to a new dimension of horror. Welcome to Midnight Scenes.

name: Vena
summary: Roguelike deckbuilder meets hex-tile city builder! Build a resource engine to survive the center’s rising demands. Place producers, converters, and combo-rich tiles. Roll dice to shop, pick perks, and chase wildly different builds every run.

name: Vytal Tactics
summary: A real-time top down tactics game that rewards spacing, clever item use and team building. Vytal needs help, so form a strong team, level up your heroes and choose powerful artifacts to take out rounds of enemies.

name: StarAbyss Heroes
summary: Torn by an ancient cataclysm, the world lies in ruins. In this ARPG, play a hero exploring relics, looting treasures, forging weapons, and mastering skills on a decaying yet fantastical journey.

name: Paparazzi
summary: Take sneaky pictures of the Stars, or find and eliminate the Paparazzis in this chaotic multiplayer game of stealth and social deduction.

name: Overtrick
summary: A trick-taking roguelike with style! Outplay your rivals, purchase special abilities, and dazzle 1920s high society with your unstoppable cardplay. Call your contract, follow suit, flush trumps, and claim the hand. This isn't your grandma's bridge club... this is Overtrick!

name: Everhome
summary:
Become a sky architect in this relaxing, cozy, building and management sim. Meet charming characters and design unique houses just for them! Go shopping for new decorations, renovate their homes and discover the keys to their hearts.

Coming to steam in Q1 2026 -

name: Pixplorer
summary: Pixplorer is a top-down sandbox action-RPG. Explore biomes, conquer dungeons, craft, build, fight, mine, farm, catch fish and insects! Enjoy the game's atmosphere and complete freedom to shape your own adventure.

name: Intervoid
summary: INTERVOID is a tense co-op horror game with resource management elements. Delve into the dark depths of an abandoned subway, avoid dangerous anomalies, out-of-control trains, and manage your oxygen supply. Reach the heart of this oppressive place.

name: Data Center
summary: Build, cable, and automate. Assemble racks, servers, and switches, connect enough capacity for each app, earn money from processed data, and unlock gear and bigger customers with XP and reputation. Follow colored data packets as your center comes to life.

name: Dragon Gate: Tournament
summary: Compete in short, deadly sprints full of power-ups, dangers and fierce rivalries where only speed and skill mean survival. Are you ready to take the crown?

name: EXD: Extra Dimensional
summary: A delivery guy. A dimensional rift. A quest across another world. Master telekinesis and elemental magic in Erath, where everyday objects become legendary weapons. Battle mythical creatures. Solve ancient puzzles. Uncover dark truths. Advanced VR physics meet epic fantasy adventure.

name: Alliance Tales: Battle for the Frontier
summary: Alliance Tales is a linear, story-driven space combat sim inspired by 90s classics like Wing Commander and Tie Fighter. Take part in fast-paced space battles in a campaign takes you on the search for a missing friend while foiling a plot to take over the Frontier Colonies.

name: Lost in Cheese
summary: Lost in Cheese is a brand new puzzle game. Play as Mewton, a cube shaped cat who travels to Roll island. Embark on a cozy adventure filled with cheese. Lots of cheese. Your mission? Push, strategize, and clear the path to the big red button!

name: Line Up!
summary: Line Up! is a chaotic, couch multiplayer game where you take on the role of a caring Mama trying to guide your adorable, easily confused little babies lined up through the bustling world. Other critters are doing the same, and they won’t hesitate to defend their little ones with everything they’ve got!

name: Pripyat 0
summary: Chernobyl has broken down. As radiation rains down upon you, the world starts rapidly mutating. You've gotten stuck in a nightmarish loop. Can you correctly spot the anomalies on time and get to safety? Or will you become one with the zone?

name: Maze Creep!!
summary: A satire co-op horror game where players aim to reach the end of an infinite series of mazes, evading the all-hearing Maze Creep and various other threats.

name: Factory 95
summary: Factory 95 is a retro Windows inspired puzzle-automation game about making a slide show factory… in a slide show! Manage your space, make increasingly complex slides and worry about Y2K in this minimalistic factory builder.

name: Broken Arrow: Baltic Battalion
summary: The first specialization DLC for Broken Arrow introduces the Baltic Battalion, a brand-new army specialization accessible to the U.S. faction.

name: Without a Hitch
summary: Without a Hitch is a co-op delivery game where you collect and transport cargo across a chaotic and perilous landscape. Whether traveling solo or in a convoy of 2 to 4 players, the package must arrive before the sun sets, and THEY come for it. Can you make it Without a Hitch?

name: Bag of Dreams
summary: Bag of dreams is the cozy card-based Roguelike Dreambuilder you didn't know you needed. Can you piece together the perfect sleep, one fragment at a time?

name: Paddlenoid
summary: Paddlenoid is a fun brick breaker you can play solo or with a friend. There’s nothing out of the ordinary and absolutely no reason to suspect a deeper purpose. Just have a good time and remember to ignore the crystals!

name: D.A.D.S.
summary: Use your special ops units to construct base facilities and towers to protect them from the ever-increasing threat of alien invaders in this Tower Defense game with a city-building element! Research their weaknesses and develop defenses before mankind runs out of time.

name: Highway Noir
summary: You are an underground driver for hire, fired from the Major Crimes Agency. Rush through a busy city at night as you take on high speed getaways, dangerous street races, white knuckle pursuits and more. Don't stop until you reveal the truth about who wanted you gone

name: Rearranged
summary: A phenomenon called The Rearranging shuffles the rooms in your house and traps you inside with a monster. You have to explore the shifting layout, gather the right items, and solve one big puzzle to survive. Use the map from your tablet to avoid the monster and survive.

name: Hangar 51: Classified Investigation
summary: A first-person investigation and detective game. Explore a sealed 1980s bunker, solve puzzles, collect evidence, take photos, and piece together what really happened. Your final report determines the outcome. Follow the protocol. Question everything.

name: Collapse Zone
summary: Survive the unstable Collapse Zones and crush your enemies! Loot, upgrade your character and abilities, and unleash your own unique brand of violent chaos! Find and enter the mutated Magic Zones—giant claw machines, colossal pinball tables, and more—to reap even greater rewards!

name: Kosmosis
summary: Two xenobiologists find themselves stranded on a mysterious planet that appears intent on their anihilation.

name: It's Fine
summary: It’s Fine is an active incremental/upgrade clicker game about releasing v1.0 of your game on time.

name: Dino Party
summary: a chaotic multiplayer brawler packed with silly physics, unpredictable minigames, and over-the-top dino action.

name: Orbital Overdrive
summary: Orbital Overdrive is a high-octane roguelite twin-stick arena shooter where you are pitted against hordes of relentless enemies on an orbit of a planet. Choose from hundreds of different abilities and weapons to create the deadliest build and smash the resistance!

name: Silent Spirits
summary: Operate a secret speakeasy in 1920s America during Prohibition. Craft illicit alcohol, serve demanding customers, avoid police raids, smuggle shipments to the mob, and expand your empire across 15 years of escalating danger, pressure, and underground opportunity.

name: Exone Rift
summary: Take direct control of your hero on a hostile planet. Build your base, gather resources, expand your territory your way, and survive against the planet’s deadly wildlife.

name: Shuwa Shuwa Guin!
summary: Shuwa Shuwa Guin is a time management game set in a charming world of penguins, where you must wash, dry, and iron clothes to keep your grandfather's laundry business open! Use the money you earn to buy items that will make your job easier!

name: Seeing Double
summary: In this puzzle platformer, your screen is split down the middle. Control Pitter and Patter simultaneously as you jump, dash, and climb through two parallel realities in this atmospheric adventure on your quest to reunite them.

name: Witchling Grove
summary: Witchling Grove is an action-rpg, arena-shooting roguelike.

name: Gun X Gunner
summary: Gun X Gunner is a free-to-play, round-based first-person-shooter where up to eight players face off in fast-paced free-for-alls. Choose new equipment, weapons, and powerful, game-altering augments between rounds in an ever-evolving competition. It’s time to get good, get lucky, and GUN X GUNNER.

name: Terrafactory: Idle Planet
summary: A planet building idle game that sits anywhere on your desktop while you do other things.

name: DeGen Rivals
summary: The ultimate Kart-based Battle Royale. Smash your Rivals in free-to-play, 8-player online chaos across a variety of wild levels and arcade game modes.

name: Shape Swarm
summary:
Shape Swarm is a top-down action arcade game where players survive increasingly dense waves of geometric enemies in fast, session-based matches. Players automatically attack while maneuvering through enemy patterns, collecting upgrades that modify weapon behavior, movement, and survivability.
The game features short, score-driven runs, escalating difficulty, and a variety of enemy shapes with distinct movement and attack patterns. Progression is contained within individual sessions, emphasizing positioning, build choices, and moment-to-moment decision-making.

name: Tanks: Total Destruction
summary: TANKS Total Destruction is a tribute to a cult classic, reimagined for modern action gaming. A top-down view, movement limited to four directions, and intense, tactical gameplay come together with modern visuals, spectacular explosion effects, and smooth animations powered by Unreal Engine 5.

name: Agrivore
summary: Agrivore is an incremental farming roguelike where you equip magical farming gear, harvest crops, unlock new equipment, and create hyper combos in your skill tree.

name: Chop Chains
summary: Chop Chains is a relaxing incremental game where you chop, gather, and upgrade to become the ultimate lumberjack through trees, axes, and skills.

name: Bluegrass
summary:
A spatial audio ASMR-narrative rhythm life-sim. Laid off, Linda is seeking peace on the Appalachian Trail. Guide her pulse as she unveils her Granny’s old hand-drawn illustrations and makes new memories in this relaxing spatial audio journey to Mt. Katahdin.

Bluegrass is an experiential episodic interactive audio narrative through the soundscape of Appalachia. In a linear adventure to Mt. Katahdin, tune your ears into the relaxing audio cues. Allow yourself to be guided by Linda's inner Conscience as you keep the heart pace steady by regulating her breathwork. Influence Linda's behavior via feedback at critical moments in this interactive theatrical.

name: Gravity's Edge
summary: Begin an epic space journey filled with strange worlds, engaging puzzles, and a dense Afro-punk theme. Another challenge also awaits you in 'Survival'. There you will face off against oncoming hordes while searching for the Ability Anvils. Are you ready to become a Kassler?

name: Alonitaire
summary: Break the rules of solitaire in this atmospheric roguelike deckbuilder. Unleash forbidden sigils while the Jack of Spades begs for your help in secret. Forge game-breaking combos under the Joker’s watchful eye and uncover the truth behind the deck. Don’t investigate… just play.

name: Chance
summary: The property-trading deckbuilder. Chance is strange, dusty board game where you steal land from the bourgeoisie, bankrupt the proletariat, break the rules with unfair chance cards, and discover strategies worthy of an antitrust lawsuit.

name: 6-7 Nights At Vicente's
summary: 6-7 Nights at Vicente’s is a horror and strategy game in the style of Five Nights at Freddy’s. On Morcilla Island, Detective Rubevids investigates Vicente’s house, where he must keep watch, manage resources, and survive threats to uncover the truth before it’s too late.

name: Seraphine's Skyward Journey
summary: This game is an adventure game where you explore a steampunk-inspired world with 2.5D hand-drawn graphics aboard an airship. Manage resources like coal, food, and water while operating your airship, defeat sky pirates, engage in trade, and handle cargo transport as you venture into uncharted skies.

name: Bufo Jump
summary: Bufo Jump is a 3D platformer where you hop, climb, and glide through colorful worlds, mysterious caves, and a menacing industrial site. Play as Bufo, a brave frog on a mission to save his pond from a greedy corporation polluting the land. Leap your way to the company's core and take back your pond.

name: Fortune Teller Simulator
summary: Step behind the curtain of an occult salon on a Victorian street of London. Play as a Fortune-teller who decides fates with Tarot readings.

name: Fearwoods
summary:
Fearwoods is a cooperative survival horror game for up to three players, set in a cursed and hostile forest environment. Players explore a dense wilderness filled with supernatural threats while searching for a way to escape.

The gameplay focuses on exploration, survival mechanics, and cooperative decision-making. Players must locate GPS fragments, journal entries, environmental clues, and other objects that help them navigate through the forest and progress toward escape. Light and noise play a critical role in gameplay, as visibility can improve navigation but also increases the risk of attracting hostile entities.

Throughout the game, players are pursued by a supernatural demon that reacts to movement, sound, and player behavior. Survival often requires stealth, teamwork, and resource management rather than direct combat. Environmental storytelling, puzzles, and dynamic encounters shape the experience as players move deeper into the forest.

The primary objective is to escape the forest by collecting GPS components and restoring navigation systems. While progressing, players can uncover the story of Aveline, whose disappearance is connected to the events within the forest. By discovering her journals and hidden clues, players may attempt to free her soul, which can influence the outcome of the game.

name: Malware Tycoon
summary: Step back to the era of dial-up and WinGoals SP. As a black-hat developer, manage the delicate balance of detection probability versus payout potential. Will you build a silent botnet for profit or a worm designed to destroy? Avoid the feds and conquer the web in this nostalgic management sim.

name: CD-ROM
summary: 10 CDs, 10 passwords. Find hidden messages, text, numbers to unlock next CD to continue your steganography puzzle journey.

name: Purrfect Ascent
summary: A brutal ascent to the top to rescue your frightened kitty. Missed jumps might be punished severely. Do you have what it takes to overcome the challenge? Meow.

name: Content King
summary: Streaming simulator roleplaying game featuring voices from Twitch streamers

name: Edge Of Dread
summary: A simple job at the mayor’s mansion turns deadly. Plan an escape attempt through shifting puzzles and locked corridors. Collect tools, create distractions and hide from the relentless monster. Uncover the truth and find one of multiple exits before a mistake foils your plan.

name: Clicky Islands
summary: Clicky Islands is a unique blend of incremental gameplay, clicker mechanics, city-builder elements, and resource management. You play as a governor appointed by the king to discover and develop a new island for his future kingdom.

name: Pecado: SD Card
summary: Pecado is a first-person folkloric horror experience set in the “España profunda”. Listen to the word of God.

name: The Brewline
summary: The Brewline is an open world bootlegging simulation. Players build their own alcohol empire through production, trade, and NPC interactions while competing against rival gangs. Manage your resources and navigate a dangerous landscape to expand your illegal operations.

name: Legacy of Kain: Ascendance
summary: Enter the dark world of Nosgoth – Ascendance is a fast paced, 2D action platformer built around fluid combat, vertical movement, vampiric powers, and skill-driven play.

name: Feed the Demon Incremental
summary: Unleash carnage in this dark incremental clicker. Sacrifice humans to fuel your demonic evolution and explode your wealth.

name: Hyphae
summary: A rogue like tower defense. How far will you stretch your network? And can you fend of ancient powers? Defend your core on this alien planet, and uncover all ancient artifacts!

name: Mystery at the Gas Station
summary: You accepted a simple job: working the graveyard shift at a roadside gas station. Low traffic. Few deliveries. Strange rules. But nobody works here for very long.

name: Wrong Answer
summary: A deadly quiz show where knowledge decides who gets shot. Answer correctly — you pull the trigger. Answer wrong — the gun is aimed at you.

name: Renascor
summary: The spine of time has shattered. With your team of 1–4 experts, investigate divine anomalies, gather evidence, and seal reality itself. Following the lost teams, infiltrate history as Renascor’s final hope.

name: Billiard Rampage
summary: Billiard Rampage is a Roguelike-like game in the form of snooker billiards, blending deck-building with physics simulation. You play as a billiard ball that refuses to be struck, rolling toward victory by building your deck, collecting stickers, and using chalk in ever-changing rules.

name: VacBot Simulator
summary: Have you ever wondered what your robotic vacuum feels when it's wandering through your house? Picking up your messes, leaving your floors pristine again. Wonder no more! Experience the joys of cleaning various houses through the LIDARs of several judgemental robotic vacuums.

name: Alpha Ceti TD
summary: Classic Tower Defense meets space exploration. Build turrets on mining platforms, harvest enemies to build more defenses, and mine Dark Energy to travel the stars. As a sentient AI, you must upgrade your tech, scan planets, and find a new home for humanity before Earth fades away.

name: Satan's Ball
summary: Summon the sinful to Satan’s…no, to your Ball in Hell. In a social simulation where society gravitates towards chaos, you will manage, promote, and punish, all to discover the knowledge the Satan’s Bible holds. How many will you sacrifice before the chaos erupts?

name: Pound for Pound
summary: A sports management simulation where you build an MMA promotion from the ground up by signing fighters, running events, and expanding your reach in a living competitive world.

name: Intergalactic Juice Bar
summary: Slice fruits with a physics-based knife on a rope. Upgrade your factory to slice fruit into smaller pieces. Buy advanced slicing technology. Maximize profits and quench thirst across the universe!

name: Weapon Master
summary: Dash! Combo! Strike into throw, throw into dodge, dodge into strike! WEAPON MASTER is an action game built around fast, fluid combo-driven combat. By combining main-hand weapons, off-hand weapons, equipment, and talents, you can create a combat style that is truly your own.

name: Bulgasari: Consume·Evolve·Survive
summary: Amidst the ruins of a crashed starship, you inject the mysterious ampoule BGS-01 and awaken an insatiable hunger for steel. Devour steel to evolve, and trade with the Space Stagecoach to secure vital supplies. Slaughter the swarms of alien monsters hunting you down and survive!

name: Hell Storage
summary: A first-person psychological horror game about an ex-con working nights at a self-storage facility, where an old mirror reveals the spirits stalking him.

name: Smart Lab
summary: Smart Lab: Build your lab from the ground up, research new recipes, optimize production chains, and craft valuable products. Produce in batches, improve quality, and sell your results to keep expanding.

name: Mono
summary: 『Mono』 is a 2D action game set in a monochrome world. Explore the land to enhance your abilities, defeat the formidable foes standing in your way, and resolve the crisis befalling this black-and-white realm.

name: Retired
summary: RETRO HYPER TIRE RACING! Cruise down hills through 5 different developer created worlds competing for the best track time, or race through a nearly infinite supply of User created levels through the steam workshop!

name: A Little Physics Roguelike
summary: In A Little Physics Roguelike aim to grab the best equipment, then build your unique board with a variety of item to defeat cute enemies.

name: The Hopeless Few
summary: Third-person survival roguelite shooter, where you've got 20 minutes before the infection takes over. Use that time to salvage valuable loot & secure the survival of others.

name: Odds at Oddity
summary: Odds At Oddity is a blackjack based roguelike deck builder. Manage your power betting deck, create diverse combinations and scale your points as far as you can go!

name: Find Cats 6
summary: Pixel World's Hide-and-Seek Cat Challenge! Eight magical realms hide cute fluffy kittens. Solve interactive puzzles, unlock hidden maps, use your wisdom to bring all the furry little rascals home, and enjoy a healing and stress-relieving cat-hunting experience.

name: Bartender Life Simulator
summary: What is a bar owner to you? A manager? A bartender? An interior designer? A psychologist? And what if you had to take on all these roles? Interact with customers, manage supplies, craft cocktails, and redesign the interior to earn the title of the best bar.

name: Smart Farm
summary: In Smart Farm you take over an abandoned farm bought at auction and rebuild it with hard work, smart planning and modern agriculture. Restore fields and buildings, care for animals, process your harvest and turn ruins into a profitable farm.

name: Point Zero: Victoria
summary: A multi-perspective narrative game where near-death flashbacks unravel the truth. Return to 1990s Hong Kong and uncover four competing versions of the truth through combat and investigation. Spine-tingling twists! A bloodstained mystery spanning thirty years, waiting to be uncovered…

name: A Wild Heist
summary: A Wild Heist is a game where you and up to 3 friends rob banks as raccoons to pay off a gambling debt to the mob. The game includes fully destructible environments, online multiplayer, procedurally generated maps and more...

name: Slay All Bosses: Idle
summary: Slay All Bosses: Idle, is a short incremental RPG. Cut down waves of enemies, defeat powerful bosses, and rapidly grow stronger through character skill trees, weapon and skill upgrades, and equipped passive abilities, all on your path to becoming the ultimate hero.

name: Hotshots
summary: HOTSHOTS — is a dynamic, 2D adventure where the price of error is the complete loss of progress. There is no place for saving here: every run is an intense, separate battle. Your only reward for victory is taking valuable weapons with you to start the next, even more dangerous run...

name: Just a Simple Turn-based RPG
summary: A short and straightforward turn-based RPG where every action matters. Explore, cast spells through quirky enchantments, help the townsfolk, and hunt for treasure, without endless grinding or overcomplicated stories.

name: The Corner Cafe
summary: The Corner Cafe is a cozy(ish) cafe simulator set in a retro futuristic mythical Ireland in the year 2160. Play as Dan, the new owner of The Corner Cafe, the last independent cafe in Galway City. It is up to you to create an oasis of community in this dystopia...

name: Vault Vandals
summary: Chaotic local multiplayer roguelite for 2-4 players. Command robots through deadly dungeons - but don't control them directly. Issue AI directives, grab cursed treasures, steal from friends, and escape before the Wall of Doom rises.

name: Hero Link
