summary: Recruit heroes and build your formation! Harness the unique "Master-Follower Link" system to craft action sequences and coordinate targets, unleashing synergies where 1 + 1 >> 2. Every link is a tactical choice, every formation has its own unique growth path!

name: Petal by Petal
summary: Petal by Petal is a relaxing incremental gardening game where mindful movements are rewarded. Water seeds, grow flowers, sell your harvest, and unlock permanent upgrades across a sprawling skill tree.

name: Football Survivors
summary: THE FOOTBALL WAR HAS STARTED! Thousands of raging fans are storming the field. Defend against the fan invasion! 50+ unique heroes and abilities, 50+ upgrade items, position your heroes strategically, crush the waves of fans!

name: Capsulitas
summary: A physics-based gacha meets inventory management roguelike. Insert a coin, organize your backpack, and sell for profit! Multiply items with hammers, upgrade your machine, and survive the inflation.

name: Viral Hunters
summary: You are trapped in the same facility, aiming to find a way out through the scattered "Vaccine Injectors". The game's core revolves around the crucial vaccines.

name: Blackjack Roulette
summary: Blackjack meets roulette in a deadly duel. Lose a hand, pull the trigger. Use powerful cards to outsmart opponents in 1v1 battles, or defeat the Clown to escape. Win or die.

name: Hilarious Delivery
summary: Take orders, fire up the stoves! Hilarious Delivery is a single-player and co-op restaurant sim where you run a frantic takeout shop against the clock. Cook dishes, then pull off the perfect handoff to your delivery rider.

name: Gift Drop Machine: Life Simulator
summary: Survive with surprise gifts dropping from the machine! Sell or use them. Maintain the balance between hunger and energy, manage your bank, grow with your credit card, and buy homes and cars. Every choice changes your fate. Survive the roguelike challenge by combining luck and strategy.

name: Goob Wants an Android Girlfriend
summary: A cute puzzle game about fixing up android girls! Grow your collection of girlfriends and prove your wits by solving clever yet intuitive puzzles!

name: Cosmic Rays
summary: Jump and shoot in this 2D platformer to destroy the hivemind controlling the aliens that are attacking Earth. Hopefully nothing goes wrong on this mission...

name: WonderLang English
summary: Learn English through immersive quests, interactive dialogues, and spaced repetition combat challenges. Help a young hero lift a magical curse by mastering English. Customize your learning experience and explore a vibrant world filled with unique characters. Start your journey in English today!

name: Legend of Asha
summary: Enter the Kingdom of Ngoma in the Legend of Asha, a Top-Down adventure set in a unique and vibrant Afro-Fantasy setting. Explore unique and beautiful landscapes, use and upgrade powerful elemental abilities, fight off enemies and defeat Thonarka the Ravager to restore balance to the land.

name: Pachincro
summary: An action-packed pachinko–plinko incremental game with a massive skill tree and tons of upgrades. Drop balls, stack multipliers, unlock new abilities, watch the chaos scale into pure satisfaction, all while trying to defeat the boss and staying alive

name: Asterobits
summary: You've escaped from the galaxy's most secure space prison, and now there's a bunch of angry lawless chasing you. You must survive, fight for your freedom, and outrun these grumpy pursuers. Asterobits delivers a relentless (and slightly absurd) escape in an arcade-style roguelike space shooter.

name: Bang Pass Duel
summary: Pass the bomb. Unleash terror. Bang Pass Duel — a 2-player deathmatch where countdowns turn arenas into explosive rings. Hunter or hunted? Only those who master explosive art, push limits, and trust survival instinct become Bomb Master.

name: In Trusted Hands
summary: Dive into the daily work of a cozy workshop in a big city, accompanied by relaxing atmospheric music. Manage client data, balance energy and stress, and make choices that shape the story and its outcome.

name: The Bold Club
summary: A totally chaotic card game for up to 6 players where you must cheat to win. Match shapes and colors, use special cards, cheat to secretly get rid of your cards and report other players before they do the same.

name: Break Shoot
summary: Break Shoot blends the precision of billiards with roguelike builds. Combine unique ball abilities and a variety of accessories to unleash explosive scores and push past each round’s target!

name: The Dame
summary: A first-person psychological horror where a harmless camp ritual awakens The Dame: a presence bound to mirrors and silence. Break the mirrors before she reaches you.

name: Peace Dice
summary: The post-apocalypse. When some are trying to survive in a new world, others join the detective agency "Peace Dice", which searches for evidence of mutants. Go on a raid and don't come back empty-handed!

name: Oh Puck!
summary: Compete in the first ever curling party game! Slide, punch, and sabotage your friends in chaotic matches filled with special items. Outplay, outsmart, and out-slide your rivals in the ultimate frozen showdown!

name: Daemon: The Wolf, the Witch, and the Labyrinth
summary: Daemon is a third-person action RPG where you explore a shifting spirit realm as a cursed wolf—then instantly transform into a werewolf for ferocious, skill-based combat against corrupted guardians.

name: Particulitix
summary: Pure 2D chaos made of particles. Fight relentless waves, exploit key positioning, do a clever build, and unlock permanent upgrades. ℙarticuliti𝕏 is a survivor action roguelite from a parallel timeline where 2D arcade games never stopped evolving.

name: Corner Clash
summary: Idle auto‑battle game running quietly in your screen’s corner. Upgrade, unlock weapons, and face endless waves of stronger enemies.

name: Homura: The Crimson Warriors - Deluxe Edition
summary:
The Deluxe Edition includes:
・Digital Standard Edition
・Digital Short Stories (20 Pages)
・Digital Soundtrack (26 Tracks)

name: The Gallery: VR Secrets
summary: Step Into The Gallery: VR Secrets - Immerse yourself in a VR art gallery where every painting holds a hidden puzzle.

name: WishPot
summary: Korean folklore comes to life in a strategic board game where you chase your wishes! Combine number-and-ability cards to battle, upgrade your deck, and claim territory. Every match feels fresh—and tense—thanks to missions, talismans, sponsorships, and the Read system!

name: Nights of Nil
summary: Control your villagers one by one in this action-RTS survival game. Build, defend, and survive night after night across procedural islands. Assign tasks, fight off waves, and settle each island to win the run.

name: Fearmates
summary: Fearmates is a 1–4 player co-op psychological horror game. As a group of friends, you explore locations with paranormal activity and uncover the truth behind the events using your own equipment.

name: Sunsave
summary: Sunsave is a relaxing incremental game with a vaporwave and minimalist vibe. Destroy meteors, collect resources, and evolve the Sun with upgrades that unlock new mechanics!

name: Pal Pachinko
summary: Your job is boring. Pal Pachinko isn't. Park this idle game in the corner of your screen and watch your balls drop along with your productivity. It's the most efficient way to waste your time. Why focus on one thing when you can fail at two? It's small enough that your boss won't notice (probably).

name: Fantasy Wars: Endless Heroes
summary: Fantasy Wars: Endless Heroes is a turn-based tactical strategy game. You lead a team of mercenaries from different races, each with unique skills. Explore a randomly generated fantasy world, recruit defeated enemies, capture pets, challenge demon lords, or conquer the world step by step.

name: Jargon
summary: A word-puzzle roguelite where classic word games meet wild, rule-breaking builds.

name: Gardener Simulator
summary: Start your own gardening business. Mow lawns, Trim hedges, blow leaves. Upgrade tools and become the ultimate gardener.

name: Pharmacy 24
summary: Pharmacy 24 is a horror simulator game where you take on the role of a pharmacist, serving customers and taking care of the Pharmacy... Who knows, maybe one day it will accept you.

name: Farmch Revolution
summary: A piglet kidnapped by a vile butcher. Dive into a gory field of vengeance, rescue the piglet, and bring it home!

name: Shell Increment
summary: An active incremental were You Command your Skeleton Pirate crew. Destroy and Loot ships of their precious shells, Buy and Upgrade cannons. Unlock new abilities and Face Powerful Admirals and become the Richest Pirate there is.

name: SCP: The Beginning
summary: A first-person survival horror game set inside a collapsing containment facility. Explore restricted sectors, read unreliable reports, and survive hostile entities where following procedures can be just as deadly as breaking them.

name: Oceanside Whispers
summary: In Oceanside Whispers, the ocean is your canvas. Build and decorate spaces above or beneath the waves. Arrange rooms, add light, furniture, and cozy details to create calm retreats.

name: Gal Vs Village
summary: GAL VS VILLAGE is an GAL like old-school FPS. You play as Kessenji “Blood-sucker” Yui, infiltrate the village, and must bring the situation under control. Move at high speed, swing your knife, blast away with the shotgun, and drive away the supernatural!!!!!!

name: Star Apoligce: Survivors
summary: Deep in the vast galaxy, you are the last survivor. Waves of enemies keep coming, and the universe is filled with unknown dangers. Your only mission is to survive within the limited time. Pilot your spaceship to fight, gather resources, and upgrade your weapons and abilities.

name: Cat Adoption Tales
summary: Foster and care for adorable hand drawn cats in this cozy 2D sim set to original Lo-Fi music.

name: Panic Protocol
summary: A 1-4 player co-op horror game, where you guide your friends through a dangerous research facility. Use the CCTV system to observe enemies, set traps and interact with the environment. Extract with the research materials before time runs out.

name: Streetlight Syndicate
summary: A casual, story-driven incremental game set in 1920s New York. Build your criminal empire from speakeasies to protection rackets, fight rival hitmen, meet colorful characters, and become the city's most powerful crime lord.

name: Scale2fit
summary: A simple puzzle game about scaling blocks to fit them together.

name: EpiDexa Racing
summary: EpiDexa Racing is an arcade racing game focused on time trials and online multiplayer. Play with keyboard or controller, climb the leaderboards, and prove your skills against friends or players from around the world.

name: Chicks in Trouble
summary: A peaceful farm is thrown into chaos when a mother hen's chicks mysteriously vanish! Team up with the brave father rooster and embark on a quirky, obstacle-filled adventure to bring them home. Grab your mouse or gamepad—it's time to save the flock!

name: Colornova
summary: A color matching space shooter about saving your home planet from total destruction!

name: Eternal Dreams: Poker RPG
summary: A Rogue AI and alien virus have trapped humanity in a dream-sim. - Craft Poker combos in this Roguelite JRPG; build and BREAK your deck to shatter the illusion. In this Deckbuilder, every hand doesn’t just change fate, it rewrites reality.

name: Nyanjet
summary: "nyanjet" is a precision platformer where the only way is up. Be cautious, be bold, and never fear the fall. Master the simple yet challenging controls of a cat-piloted jetpack.

name: Rosepine Hotel
summary: I thought that hand was pulling me out of a nightmare and back into reality. Soon, I’ll realize—it only dragged me into another nightmare: “Rosepine Hotel”

name: Trailmarks
summary: Inspired by Carmen Sandiego, Trailmarks is a globe-spanning strategy adventure where you circumnavigate the planet as a travel guide fact-checker. Plan routes across 1,200 cities, answer 120,000+ trivia questions, trade souvenirs, and prove your expertise to unlock new countries.

name: Beltlife: Prospector
summary: Beltlife: Prospector is a GUI-based "hard" sci-fi business/work sim with economy simulation and RPG elements. Your focus is on maintaining your ship's systems and your health while prospecting for asteroid claims to auction on simulated markets.

name: Hyper Euphoria
summary: The command-selection adventure game that flourished back when PCs were still called microcomputers makes a comeback. Can you withstand the nonstop MAX 264km/h action that comes at you wave after wave!?

name: Dealmaster
summary: DealMaster is a board game where every property is won through auctions. Time your action cards, invest smartly in stocks, build or destroy houses, and strike trades. Master it all across 6 unique roles to outwit your rivals.

name: Give Me Back!
summary: 《Give Me Back!》 is a barrage avoidance adventure game. It will take you into a fantasy world. During the adventure, you only need to avoid snowflakes, cross the waves, and overcome many difficulties to survive until the end. Here, reaction speed and calm judgment are the only rules of survival!

name: Experiment 404
summary: Room 404 repeats. Identify anomalies, file reports, and stay alive—some anomalies might hurt you. Nurture the plants, listen to the overlord, end the loop, and unlock multiple unique endings.

name: Shadows of War 2
summary: Command one of four armies in Shadows of War II, a side-scrolling RTS with destructible terrain, procedural maps, and four tug-of-war modes. Build armies, call in strikes, and outwit foes in tense 1v1 multiplayer battles.

name: Politiks
summary: Political Roguelite Deck-builder with a twist. A card game where your worst build might actually work.

name: Clay Puzzle
summary: "Clay Puzzle" is a falling-block puzzle game where you target and break apart falling blocks! As the blocks fall, aim and shoot away the unwanted parts to shape them into a better form! Get ready for a falling block puzzle game that puts your aim and judgment to the test!

name: Link Penguins
summary: 【max 8P】The title is A life-threatening bridge-building begins.Due to the effects of global warming, Antarctica has been shattered into pieces. Your mission is to LINK the fragmented continents by building bridges between them! Play solo or team up in multiplayer to unite Antarctica once again!

name: Rite or Ruin
summary: Summon eldritch gods and outwit rival cultists in this online multiplayer game of deception. Shape the Rite, make dangerous bets, and unleash your Patron's wrath. Only one cultist leaves alive.

name: Celestial Drift
summary: Celestial Drift is a space-action sandbox game. Play solo or online. Shoot down various enemies to obtain rare and valuable materials. Sell what you find to buy better equipment and ships. Explore sectors to discover hidden paths, and dare to roam places you shouldn't visit.

name: Electio
summary: Five live rounds, a blank, and a choice. Electio is a short narrative horror game where death carries permanent consequences.

name: Remote Life Simulator
summary: Work remotely, build skills, earn money, and upgrade your life. Become a professional remote worker in this life simulation game!

name: House Cleaner Simulator
summary: Build your own cleaning empire! Unlock tools, take on bigger jobs, and clean your way to fame and fortune in this unique cleaning simulator.

name: Axonaut
summary: In the final stage of the interstellar war, the Alliance established the secret organization AXONAUT, primarily responsible for handling anomalous zones across post-war regions. As a member, unleash the power of the Alliance to your heart's content.

name: Spori
summary: Spori is a short story-driven psychological horror game, where you play as a janitor in the early 2000s.

name: Discarded
summary: Discarded is action rougelike, arena shooter where you face waves of relentless enemies. You’re alone and outgunned - move fast, shoot faster, dodge the bullets and upgrade on the fly. Keep up with the pressure or get shredded like the rest.

name: DeskAlchemy: Fairy Mine Tales
summary: "DeskAlchemy: Xiao Ke's Journey" is an idle to light storyline role-playing game. A young man from a small town encounters a talking mole named Xiao Ke, and embarks on a journey to dig for minerals and treasure across the country.

name: Hyperquiz
summary: Fast-paced, high quality, challenging trivia. Play your friends or compete against the world.

name: Good Things Vol 1
summary: Good Things Vol 1 is a collection of 15 wildly imaginative, weird little games ranging from evolving platformers to genre-bending adventure... but the Blue Elephant ate all the games, and if you do not help him he will DIE :(

name: Ultimate Control Machine
summary: A platformer like no other… play with 30 unique controllers! Every stage changes the controls. Master your mouse, your keyboard, and your reflexes in the ultimate test to become the world’s greatest robot pilot!

name: Anvira: Forge Defense
summary: Defend Anvilium from endless waves of goblins and monsters! A tower defense roguelite where you deploy mighty golems, unleash powerful spells, and craft crazy builds through deep customization. Adapt your strategy, grow stronger, and see how long you can survive against ever-escalating threats.

name: Playover
summary: PLAYOVER is a first-person psychological horror game set in an underground drilling facility. You are sent to investigate missing workers and continue the operation

name: Myth Requiem
summary: Myth Requiem is a mythology RPG with idle and auto-battle mechanics. Lead legendary heroes like Ulysses and Sun Wukong, explore ancient realms, and build a living bestiary by capturing, battling, and cataloging hundreds of legendary creatures in a story-driven quest for divine power.

name: Give Me a Weapon!
summary: An auto-battler roguelike where you craft weapons by combining materials. Test your luck in the auto-battler style random shop. Build a stronger army with Artifacts, Heroes, and shop editing. Last blacksmith of this world, it's time to become a legend!

name: Dice Roller Incremental
summary: Roll your dice, upgrade them, buy more dice! Dice Roller Incremental is a game where each dice roll earns you money, which you then spend on improving your dice rolls.

name: Cloudside Lane
summary: Cloudside Lane is a small casual building game. Immerse yourself in a tranquil and comfortable environment, build houses and create your own cozy streetscape. There are no scores or rules here, just follow your heart to create and feel.

name: Divineblaze: March Tactics
summary: Divineblaze : March Tactics is a roguelite tactical RPG. Assemble your expedition, battle unique foes, and forge your ultimate squad. Customize tactics with gear and skills to crush nefarious leaders.

name: Soul Balance
summary: Soul Balance is a 2D fantasy combat game that blends cuteness with distortion. Players will control different characters, enter the body of a bionic human that has awakened self-consciousness, and battle its thoughts—all to "correct" it into a normal individual.

name: Island of Ruin
summary: "Island of Ruin" is a puzzle novel game where you collect memory cores hidden across the island and uncover the truth behind a tragedy of the past. When the horrors that befell the boys and girls and the island’s strange phenomena are revealed, what final choice will you make?

name: Dungeon Directive
summary: You’ve taken over the guild hall in the center of town near a mysterious dungeon portal. With a small roster of heroes and limited resources, it’s your job to rebuild the guild, send parties into the depths, and shape a legacy that lasts for generations. What future will your choices create?

name: Cookie Flipper
summary: A casual, nostalgic puzzle game with a delicious twist! Has 72 preset levels, and near infinite custom levels. Tired of Match 3, and want a change? Try Cookie Flipper, wish list it today!

name: Swarm Survivor: Endless Siege
summary: Swarm Survivors: Endless Siege is a light roguelike bullet-hell idle shooter. You play as the last survivor of the Swarm, fighting to stay alive under the endless siege of alien fleets. Build overwhelming power and face wave after wave of relentless challenges.

name: Champions of Sparta
summary: Champions of Sparta is a brutal action RPG where elite Spartan warriors face deadly arena trials across ancient empires. Master melee, ranged, and magic combat to prove your worth and secure Sparta’s path to domination.

name: Condemned: Nightfall
summary: A survival horror PvE and PvP set in a Noir Futuristic NYC! Team up with up to two others, or go in alone, and search creature-filled semi open-world map for arcane clues that lead you to a lucrative Bounty. Featuring permadeath consequences, only the best hunters will make it out alive..

name: Witch's Apocalyptic Journey
summary: Abyss decayed, witches awaken. As their guide, you will weave their destinies. Craft unique cards, schedule their days, shape endless possibilities through deckbuilding. Each choice will lead to different Ending...

name: Fruit Box Idle
summary: Fruit in a box. Incremental fun. Setup your pegs and unlock new fruit on your way to maximum points.

name: Sanctum Mage
summary: 《Sanctum Mage》is a magic-fantasy roguelite action-adventure game. you will: forge dynamic combat strategies, combine randomly empowered arcane blessings, and pilot enchanted war machines to break through swarms of foes.

name: Don't Pop the Balloon
summary: Team up with a friend in this physics-based 2-player co-op adventure! Control a fragile balloon by managing the distance between you and navigate through challenging obstacles. Perfect synchronization is key to dodging traps. Can you finish the course without popping the balloon (or friendship)?

name: Slash Cash
summary: A turn-based simulation game, where you manage a game development company. You can choose to run the company honestly and diligently or resort to some unconventional methods.

name: Take You Home
summary: In a strange, monochrome world, swap colors and flip gravity to chase a mysterious black cat.

name: Rod of Asclepius
summary: Rod of Asclepius is a historical RPG in 4th-century Pannonia. Play a Roman medicus: investigate symptoms, gather herbs, and perform turn-based treatments. Explore researched sites and make ethical choices that shape your reputation as the empire falters.

name: Similariddle
summary: A word-guessing game in which you have to guess the word with hinted "similarity" value

name: Chinese Strange Stories
summary: Step into a living Chinese painting that blends the mystical, supernatural, and the struggles of daily life in the final years of the Ming dynasty. Experience a unique mix of classic turn-based RPG mechanics and dynamic card battling, where strategy and fate intertwine.

name: Blaze of Empires
summary: Besiege colossal creatures and invoke the favor of the gods in this unique fusion of RTS and roguelike. Build your base, gather resources, and evolve your empire through a dynamic tech tree. Survive epic waves solo or in co-op.

name: Chicken TD: Defenders of the Coop
summary: Chicken TD is a unique tower defense game where you strategically summon and upgrade creature towers to defend your coop from waves of enemies, while also engaging in Souls-like melee combat with a chosen weapon to directly hold the line and collect meta-progression currency.

name: To Heaven
summary: "I promise, I will get you to Heaven!" Earn your afterlife ticket with angel Ariel! Manage schedules and master 3 mini-games: Dog Walking (Action), Playtime (Survivor-like), and Cleaning (Tower Defense). A heartwarming multi-ending visual novel featuring a Monk, Nun, and Pastor helper trio.

name: Pixelarium: Free Lands
summary: Pixelarium is an open-world roguelike RPG with deep character building, fluid turn-based combat, rich lore, and ASCII-inspired art. Collect unique items, master powerful spells, and embark on quests as you uncover secrets in the Free Lands.

name: Annihilation Fields
summary: A minimalist physics puzzle. Manipulate electric, magnetic, and gravitational fields to guide charges, matter and anti-matter, and N/S magnetic monopoles across a grid. Collisions trigger annihilation, explosions, or fusion. Clear all particles from the fields.

name: Starship Crafter
summary: Take on the role of a starship mechanic and repay the immense debt your father left behind. Upgrade your workshop, craft components, build starships, complete contracts, follow unfolding events through the in-game newspaper, and most importantly, repay the debt before the deadline

name: Auto Chess Souls
summary: Auto Chess Souls is a casual strategy adventure game that combines auto-chess and roguelike elements. Through consecutive choices, your team grows increasingly stronger. Explore the unknown tower, collect powerful equipment, create unique powerful combinations. Embark on this exciting adventure now!

name: PsyUp
summary: An emotional breather disguised as a physics puzzle. Break blocks, solve puzzles, and explore stages inspired by psychological phenomena — each world is a dive into the human mind through the lens of a clinical psychologist.

name: The Maker Way
summary: Build creative machines, rovers, drones or robots. Use them to gather resources, discover new machine parts, source energy, construct bases and battle enemy factions in a physics-based open world.

name: Pretty Girls Don’t Want You to Die
summary: "Pretty Girls Don't Want You to Die" is a game that combines strategy tower defense, survivor-like elements, and auto-battler mechanics. you, an lone hero who, in a desperate situation, unexpectedly receives a blessing from pretty girls, narrowly escaping death.

name: Forsaker: ​Innocent Paws
summary: To find the noble's cat, you've come to the calamity-filled Witch's Forest—eerie and trap-ridden. As Divine Knight Feyz, evade dangers, befriend companions, and interact with the forest's "little cats" to solve mysteries and complete your mission!

name: Otaku and Bubbly Girl
summary: This is a short, single-route romantic comedy visual novel. It tells the story of an otaku and a bubbly girl creating a game together. The game offers a 2 to 3 hour experience and includes 7 event CGs. Game has several choices that do not affect the story. The story leads to a single happy ending.

name: Scrapborne
summary: A Helldivers-inspired desktop overlay RPG where your actions shape the universe. Gear up in your bunker and join the galactic struggle from the corner of your screen. Impact the global economy, faction wars, and story. Adapt to World Events in a living, community-driven world.

name: Forage & Brew
summary: Forage & Brew is a game where you play as a Cat witch in her potion workshop. Explore the forest, gather ingredients and brew magical potions in order to help the many clients that will come for your aid. How will you decide to live it out each passing day?

name: Endless Tactics: Trial Run
summary: Endless Tactics: Trial Run is a Turn-Based Roguelite game. Play as the commander of a high-risk planetary mining operation, defend your base from alien creatures while trying not to get overrun. Use resources to upgrade your starship, unlock new tech, powerups, and deadly new worlds to harvest.

name: Grid Tycoon
summary: Build your racing empire from the ground up. Influenced by Andatura, the first game developed by Red Shade Games, Grid Tycoon lets you manage teams, develop cutting-edge vehicles, hire talented drivers, and compete in championships around the world.

name: Static Condtion
summary: Static Condition is a psychological horror walking simulator inspired by liminal spaces and the "spot-the-difference" genre. Every run is a test of your focus and your ability to remain calm as the environment twists around you.

name: Keep on Mining!: Worlds
summary: Keep on Mining! – Worlds is an incremental mining game where you mine rocks, collect resources, and travel through many unique worlds, finding artifacts, crafting pickaxes, and purchasing many permanent upgrades!

name: Wikipedia Gacha
summary: Open packs to get 5 random Wikipedia articles as cards. Higher quality articles become higher rarity cards. You can also do daily tasks and battles.

name: Who the Fuck Ate Grandma?
summary: Time has come to celebrate Grandma's 93rd birthday. Everyone gathered for this memorable family dinner, unfortunately it seems that Grandma is going to be served for dessert ! Inspired by the 90s, discover a new retro point&click adventure game fully drawn in pixelart

name: Odyssey of Dremid'ir
summary: In the desolate realm of Dremid'ir, abandoned by god-like architects, a fragile world teeters on the edge of oblivion. Unearth secrets in ancient ruins, and navigate lost civilizations in this danger-fraught 2d RPG!

name: Fishbowl
summary: Fishbowl is a slice of life, coming of age story told over a month. Video call loved ones, work from home, sort through puzzles to rediscover childhood memories, do care tasks and get to know yourself better, one day at a time.

name: Neverending Check-in: The Hotel Stories
summary: Immerse yourself in The Neverending Check-In: The Hotel Stories, a pixel RPG filled with mystery, quests, cats, humor and life universe. Rebuild a once-glorious hotel and uncover its secret past in this captivating journey of deep plots, lively characters, and abundant quests.

name: SoulQuest
summary: Carve your path through hordes of enemies, defying the gods to seize the power of Morrigan, Goddess of Death, and retrieve the soul of your beloved! SoulQuest combines the evergreen Metroidvania gameplay with the unique Celtic mythology into one, action-packed mixture!

name: Vultures: Scavengers of Death
summary: Face zombies and fearsome monsters in this turn-based survival-horror roguelike as you seek the path to recover a valuable artifact. Unravel the history of Salento Valley and its downfall after a bioterrorist attack led by a secret cult involved with the powerful corporation Eugenesys Tech.

name: Repterra
summary: Repterra is a base-building survival game set in a world overrun by dinosaurs. Fend off massive hordes while building your colony. Manage resources and grow your army to survive in this dino-infested land.

name: Yunyun Syndrome!?: Rhythm Psychosis
summary: “Yunyun Syndrome!? Rhythm Psychosis” is a rhythm adventure game about a psychotic hikikomori girl - also an avid anonymous poster - who corrupts the world with her severe brain rot from listening to too many denpa songs. Yunyun all over this world with your degen otaku-posting.

name: Cats in Wonderland
summary: The Queen of Hearts had a fit of rage after the Cheshire Cat refused to be her pet and ordered the capture of all the cats in Wonderland. Find them before her and prevent anything bad from happening.

name: The Weeping Swan: Ten Days of the City's Fall
summary: At nightfall, the sieged city falls. Yaoguai came to massacre. You are nothing but a scholar on the brink of madness, trying to survive alongside a courtesan you met years ago. Experience two intertwined storylines in this sequel to the visual novel "The Hungry Lamb".

name: Pokémon Champions
summary: Get ready to experience everything you love about Pokémon battles all in one place—in Pokémon Champions. This new, battle-focused game will feature familiar mechanics such as Pokémon types, Abilities, and moves, creating an environment conducive to rich and varied strategies for new and experienced Trainers alike. It’s not just familiar mechanics—you’ll be able to bring in classic Pokémon from Pokémon HOME, too! Look forward to cross-platform battles alongside your favorite Pokémon on Nintendo Switch and mobile, with a variety of different modes available for your desired experience.

name: Rocket Penguin
summary: Rocket Penguin is a unique 2D flying game that may seem simple but requires master-level skills to reach outer space.

name: In a World After People
summary: A robot awakens alone in a desolate world where humanity has vanished due to a plague. In this side-scrolling pixel art adventure, the robot, having lost its memory, retraces its past interactions with humans to rediscover the meaning of "love."

name: The Greenening
summary: The Greenening is a short and wholesome incremental journey about exploring and reawakening a forgotten world. Wash away the ashes to discover the secrets hidden beneath, upgrade your versatile watering abilities, and grow your own cozy space garden.

name: Rakka: Wake 01 - Soot
summary: A visual novel paired with point-and-click elements, Rakka distinguishes itself with its breadth of hand-drawn assets, detailed backgrounds, charming character art, and unique paper-cut style. Complimented by the art is the incredible original soundtrack; spearheaded by the minds behind The PMT, it oozes indie charm. Both serve in tandem, dragging the player into the character and dialogue driven world of Rakka. Think you can make it to its thrilling conclusion?

name: Dancing Wings: The Aerobatic Simulator
summary: Team aerobatics flight simulator - do it solo. Fly, save the replay, fly in overlay mode, save the new replay, and repeat it up to six aircrafts. Realistic aerodynamics and landscape. Step-by-step training. Share your replay online.

name: Dwarven Village: Dark Siege Td
summary: Dwarven Village Dark Siege is a game that you need to defend your crystals from orcs and goblins, Place Allies on paths, Place towers to the sides and make upgrades in the village

name: Blitzpoint
summary: A minimalist modern military strategy tower defense game where you build and defend a forward operating base. Strategically place defenses, manage resources, and repel relentless waves of enemies. Build by day, defend by night, and command your forces in fast-paced, action-packed gameplay.

name: Above the Snow
summary: Join the shelter crew, and let’s create the best Alpine resort around! Enjoy rich character stories, customize your shelter, attract and rescue alpinists, dive into hotel management, and map out trails! Grab your map, zip up your jacket, fill your thermos, and brace for the worst winter of the ’60s!

name: Thumbylina
summary: Thumbylina is a fingertip-sized life simulation game device designed to be your daily companion. When you set a timer during study or exercise, your in-game character joins you in self-improvement—unlocking new outfits and hairstyles as you progress. Unlike smartphone or PC timer apps, Thumbylina is completely offline, allowing you to focus without any distracting notifications.

name: Eona
summary: Dive into Eona’s dark and strange tale. Survive the castle’s dangers—and Mélusine, the evil fairy who rules over it—for she has waited so long for a soul to torment. Escape this cursed place with your loot, hoping to save your mother.

name: The Last Transmission
summary: The Last Transmission is a short, first-person psychological horror game built around isolation, atmosphere, and slow, creeping dread.

name: Clean Up Earth
summary:
Clean Up Earth is a relaxing first-person cleaning simulator. Clean Up Earth is the first original IP from Magic Pockets studio, based in France. Clean Up Earth will be available on PC (Steam, Epic Games Store) in Q1 2026, with the console launch dates to be confirmed following the Kickstarter campaign.

Clean Up Earth invites players to restore polluted environments to their natural beauty and unwind, solo or with friends. Using the Terra Cleaner, a futuristic, customisable cleaning tool, they rejuvenate landscapes inspired by the real world, from serene mountain ranges to tropical beaches. As they progress, they unlock new modules and upgrades to take on increasingly complex challenges. The Terra Cleaner can also be used to repair damaged equipment and structures, enabling players to use them to access new zones.

The game supports solo play and cooperative multiplayer, with maps for 2 to 8 players depending on their size, as well as larger maps that accommodate 30+ players.

name: Bounty Brawl: Most Wanted
summary: Welcome to Hunter Haven! Bounty Brawl is a top-down action roguelite shooter for 1-4 players. Here, the hunt is fierce, and betrayal is inevitable. Will you form a fragile alliance with other hunters under the galaxy's most notorious bounties, or go it alone? Who will emerge as the ultimate victor?

name: Core Hustlers
summary: Core Hustlers is a single-player sci-fi extraction shooter where every run is unique. Infiltrate derelict stations, hack data cores, outthink ruthless AI, and survive shifting, deadly environments.

name: Alruna: End of History
summary: Alruna; now in wide-screen! A different kind of Metroidvania, a tour-de-force of game design, with world-class temples and dungeons. Dead men yearn for Heaven, but Elysium remains out of their grasp.

name: Night Shift Customer
summary: A night shift at a minimarket turns into a nightmare. Serve customers, tidy the store, and watch for oddities - one of them isn’t human anymore.

name: Monitor State
summary: You are an operator in a dystopia world, watch and punish citizens. Experience a deep narrative with moral dilemmas. Obey, resist or find another path.

name: Ship v Maze
summary: Fly. Crash. Repeat. Avoid the obstacles for as long as possible, then try to do better.

name: Animal Bakery
summary: Manage a cozy subway bakery in an underground animal city - run by a "retired" gangster you're secretly investigating. Serve cute locals, expand the bakery, prepare for festivals, meet strange visitors and explore the subway after hours for fun stories and special rewards!

name: An Eggstremely Hard Game
summary: Two geese. One fragile egg. Infinite chaos. Work together to carry it through unpredictable challenges without breaking it, every crack makes it harder, every mistake more hilarious. A co-op physics game about teamwork, clumsiness, and the unstoppable power of honking.

name: Flock Around
summary: Flock Around is a multiplayer bird watching game. Explore a nature sanctuary with friends, snap pictures of birds, and fill out the guide book!

name: The Melty Way
summary: You move, you melt. Play as a brave size-shifting slime in this colorful precision puzzle-platformer, dashing through handcrafted puzzles and perilous traps on your journey in The Melty Way.

name: Find Your Words
summary: Find your community at summer camp, one friendship at a time. Take a beat, enjoy a breath of fresh air - all while playing at the beach, strolling in the woods, and dancing with friends. This short cozy game was created by two dads, celebrating their kids’ journeys to find their voices.

name: Cochonnet
summary: Play Pétanque online with your friends, the traditional french ball-throwing sport where 2 teams compete to land their metal balls closest to the target.

name: Convenience Store Simulator
summary: A game about running and managing your own convenience store. Actively work the register, master stock and inventory, make and sell coffee, hire unique staff, and fully decorate your space. Strategically expand your business and play special mini-games for prizes.

name: Waddle Words
summary: Waddle, spell, and honk your way to victory in this chaotic word game for 1–4 players!

name: King's Downfall
summary: Defy the tyrant. Build your settlement, defend it from invasions, and gain enough power to overthrow the king.

name: Penniless Chef
summary: "Penniless Chef" is a game where you run and grow your own restaurant. Run and grow your restaurant, and get to know the villagers!

name: Room 713
summary:
Room 713 blends classic anomaly-spotting Exit 8-style gameplay with a murder mystery narrative. Pay close attention to your surroundings. Notice something wrong? Head left. Everything in order? Go right. With every correct choice, you climb a floor. Every mistake sends you back to the start.

The game features over 40 anomalies. Can you spot them all?

name: Just One More Link
summary: A dark arcade incremental roguelite. Invest ZEK to buy time, chain crystals for exponential value, and cash out before collapse. Welcome to Blagine Corp. No refunds.

name: Boba Buba
summary: BobaBuba Is the Boba Bubble-Pop Puzzle Adventure with story mode featuring cute beverages and an endless mode for huge replay value. With global leaderboards from launch!

name: Timber Fever
summary: Cut down an infinitely tall Tree and defeat its Protectors. Timber Fever is an action, incremental, roguelike where you create chaos by cutting down the Tree of Life using wacky tools.

name: Keine's Expanding Class!
summary: Solve and guess words one letter at a time in a brain-teasing, customizable Hangman-style challenge with Keine Kamishirasawa! Test your knowledge of English words or Touhou characters, locations and music to expand your mind! Wait... something else is expanding too!?

name: Voidloop
summary: Voidloop is a mining adventure with roguelite elements. Explore procedural caves, fight dangerous enemies, and upgrade your abilities as you race to find your way back home to the void.

name: Cult Nation
summary: An incremental game about sacrificing all your cult followers and collecting blood to awaken the devil.

name: Skatr
summary: SKATR is an inline skating game where you skate fast and do cool tricks. Do advanced tricks for more points and maintain max speed! It's also just fun 2 skate around.

name: Glass Cannon Defense
summary: A short incremental game where you defeat incoming enemies and make a glass cannon increasingly powerful.

name: Unknown Entity
summary: Step into the shoes of Unknown Entity, a strange being with no form or memories, who will fight trapped bosses in the hope of discovering where it is, who it is, and why it seems to be watched at all times, in this Free To Play game.

name: Choiceline Brawl
summary: Turn-based card game with fast runs: Choose one of many heroes with unique passive abilities, build your deck from 10 abilities, and face tactically selected opponents. Fight, unlock cards, and dominate short battles.

name: Slime City: Trials
summary: Slime City: Trials is a movement shooter where slime removes friction, and momentum is everything. Splat enemies to paint slippery paths, slide into popping slimes for speed boosts, and race the clock to earn the best medals.

name: Escape Her
summary: I'm a high school student who borrowed money from my senpai. We agreed I'd pay her back in the clubroom this afternoon, but I was late due to an unexpected situation. Now, a furious senpai is hunting me down to give me a serious beating. I must find a way to escape this building — fast!

name: 4Below
summary: A co-op extraction roguelike with active ragdoll chaos. Descend into ancient underground ruins, recover priceless relics, survive the unknown, and escape with enough to meet the quota—together.

name: Pegture
summary: Pegture is a peg solitaire-themed roguelike, deck-building game. Build your deck, enhance your pegs, perform frenetic combos, beat bosses, reach the highest score and get the best peg solitaire experience.

name: Matchward
summary: Tower defense empowered by match 3 puzzle strategy. Level up and unlock potentially game-breaking upgrades. Design your own levels and share them.

name: Homgard
summary: Homgard is a cosy, story-heavy nonogram (picross) adventure set after the end of a fading world. Solve logic puzzles with new nonogram rules, reveal the map beneath, and piece together a vast, whimsical place that refuses to be forgotten.

name: Misty Land
summary: Develop and expand your town as you fend off eerie creatures from the mist. Choose from a variety of buildings and strategies, make tactical decisions, join defensive battles personally, protect your town and fulfill your ultimate goals.

name: Messy Recipe: A Hidden Object Game
summary: Time to get cooking in a chaotic kitchen! Search for the ingredients you want, customize the recipe, then mix things together and hope for the best. Make friends with the shy ghost who hides your ingredients every night, and cook through family recipes in this cozy hidden objects game.

name: Crimson Realms: Relics of the Forgotten World
summary: Embark on a colorful adventure in Crimson Realms! Battle creatures with four unique attack styles, defeat powerful demons to claim relics, overcome perilous obstacles, and complete epic missions in a world filled with danger and wonder.

name: Dilemma
summary: You don't cure patients; you decide their fate. In this grim medical sim, review records and face impossible bioethical dilemmas. Consult the Medical Bible and choose who gets the bed. Every signature impacts your Ethics, Reputation, and Legal Risk. In a broken system, mercy is a dangerous luxury.

name: Keep It Contained
summary: You’re part of a scientific team in a sealed facility, racing against time to keep dangerous anomalies contained. One scientist handles the modules, while others guide them using manuals and procedures. This local co-op experience requires two or more players.

name: GTJ: Grand Theft Japan
summary: Grand Theft Japan is a tribute to GTA and Yakuza, set in Japan. Featuring stories inspired by real events: soaring rice prices, roaming bears, yakuza clans, otaku culture, and shocking political incidents.

name: Smol Toad
summary: A tiny toad with a big personality lives on your desktop while you work or play. Interact with him, take care of his happiness, avoid overwhelming him, and collect points to unlock hats and unique styles for your little amphibian companion.

name: Orso
summary: Orso the rabbit is looking for carrots and needs your help! Guide Orso through an isometric landscape, using perspective to solve tricky puzzles and collect carrots.

name: Godfinger
summary: "I know you've played hundreds of rogule-lite deck builder. This one is different. As a mortal with 7 years left to live, bet your life against gods in Godfinger Tavern and become immortal. This is your only chance! Play your hand smart." -- Dionysus, the bartender.

name: You All Know! Arm Tank Volley
summary: The legendary “You All Know! Arm Tank Volley” is back! Just drop the ball in the opponent’s court—yet it’s deep and addictive. Punch the net for a rocket jump, stand on it, and laugh at physics miracles. Looks dumb, plays god-tier. Can you resist?

name: Dreamstranded
summary:
Dive into a survival adventure with a cozy atmosphere! Enjoy gathering, crafting, and building — but beware, monsters lurk in the shadows, ready to challenge you!

At the beginning of the story, you awaken in a mysterious world with your memories lost, and the journey unfolds from there.

First, you must learn to survive — gathering resources, crafting items, and building a camp. You can choose to survive alone or recruit villagers to establish a thriving tribe.

As you explore the wilderness, you will encounter various monsters. Arm yourself with crafted gear, master magic, and defeat them!

Embark on a vast journey, follow clues, and unravel the mystery of why you drifted here. Or, you can simply relax and enjoy the pastoral life. The choice is entirely yours!

name: Kiosk 199X
summary: Run a tiny 90s kiosk in a chaotic Eastern country - Kolkhozland. Serve quirky customers, survive inspections, pick a side in a local power struggle, and uncover a hidden conspiracy - all in a story-driven retro management sim full of humor and choices.

name: Watt's the Limit?
summary: Click, upgrade, explode, and repeat. This is your job in an absurd incremental simulation where you stress test lightbulbs. Pull levers and push buttons to find their breaking point, then use profits to buy powerful upgrades, unlock new machinery, and automate the glorious chaos.

name: Fairy Tale TD:Hero
summary: This is a 3D pigeon tower defense game that utilizes resources to build turrets and collaborates with heroes to block enemy attacks.

name: Microwave Simulator
summary: An absurd sandbox where you put random objects in a oven and see what happens. Heat, melt, explode, or discover the unexpected.

name: Slorbis: Tower Defense
summary: Immerse yourself in the cozy, minimalist world of Slorbis: Tower Defense. Build towers with unique roles, buy modifiers of varying rarities, collect money, and face the unpredictability of procedurally generated maps as you defend the king from dark spirits.

name: Asteroid Patrol
summary: Bang bang! Shoot raining asteroids, dodge attacks of flying insects and battle against huge weird monsters! Gain exp, level up, pick perk and then rinse & repeat. Story? Nobody cares. If you are looking for a difficult and punishing game, don't leave without playing this one.

name: Lifecycles of the Traveler Spider
summary: The Traveler Spiders are a species unique to their galaxy. A galaxy that is regularly destroyed and rebuilt by the galactic seasons. Ranging from tiny specs to star sized colossi, all the spiders must do their part to restore the natural balance and survive another season.

name: Slime Buddy Time
summary: Take care of your slime pet in a cozy world! Play minigames, level up, unlock cute items, and customize your buddy and its home. Keep up to 3 fluffy companions while you work or study. Relax, decorate, and enjoy adorable company—you won’t feel alone anymore.

name: Morkull: Ascend to the Gods
summary: Play as Morkull, God of Death and Darkness. Aware that he finds himself in a video game once again, you must help him escape so he can carry out his new plan for world domination. To do so, you must defeat an entire pantheon of gods in thrilling boss battles.

name: Capyvarias
summary: Help Capyshan and Capymay rebuild the Capyvarias empire. Everything is gone. Only these two brave capybaras remain, determined to raise their community from the ashes. Can you click your way to survival, growth, and a future among the stars?

name: Linkies
summary: You find yourself all alone in the vastness of outer space! Being alone makes you slow and weak. Take your Linky with you and confront the challenges head-on! Linkies is a co-op game that creates unbreakable bonds and makes you faster and stronger! Can you make it to the end of space?

name: Zero Warning: Burnt Out
summary: In this anomaly horror game, a boy has been abandoned in a burning train car. Spot the difference, decide when to push forward, and survive long enough to complete the rescue.

name: Backpack Jianghu
summary: Backpack jianghu is a Wuxia theme, inventory management and battle royale game. Choose a starting sect, enter the world with dozens of other players, pick your path, battle and grow, and compete in the final showdown at Mount Hua's peak.

name: Rune Rhythm Realm
summary: Defend global seals in this dark fantasy rhythm-typing TD with roguelite elements, eliminating enemies via real-time letter typing while strategically deploying traps (spacebar) and activating skills (number keys) to the beat.

name: Pinfall
summary: From the center of the Earth to the outskirts of reality, overcome the impossible in Pinfall: An extremely difficult physics-based platformer where momentum is key. While talking to NPCs, collecting items, and customizing your look, keep climbing as the impending fall awaits...

name: Rope
summary: While repeating the same operation, the player's thinking deepens little by little. This is a puzzle game that values such a feeling. The rules are simple and clear. However, the accumulation of choices and results that unfold there creates a quiet tension and relaxation.

name: Next Quintillionaire
summary: Become the Next Quintillionaire in this incremental game where you sell boxes, set prices, choose opportunities, and hire employees to grow and upgrade your business. Reinvest your profits to progress faster and get richer with every cycle!

name: Corporate Hell
summary: Thank you for your application to Max Potency Inc.! After thorough consideration, we are excited to offer you the position of Junior Chemical Engineer. Master your instruments, encourage your coworkers, and make sure to hit those quotas! Max Potency: Driven by Excellence, Powered by You.

name: Herb Tea Man
summary: In a world moving too fast, your little tea shop is a quiet corner where people can slow down, sip something warm (or bitter!), and maybe heal a bit — body and soul.

name: Zombie Epoch: Deck Apocalypse
summary: Zombie Epoch: Deck Apocalypse blends dungeon crawling with strategic cardplay. Explore dangerous ruins, collect cards and items, and build deadly synergies to outlast relentless zombie hordes. Unlock new characters, upgrade your base, and fight to restore humanity！

name: Swifty
summary: A fast-paced 2D platformer where speed, precision, and perfect timing are key. Dodge traps, master challenging levels, and become the ultimate "Swifty".

name: Storytime Cats: A Twilight Tale
summary: Storytime Cats – A Twilight Tale is a hidden object game set in a magical storybook world. Search for playful cats across 7 hand-drawn levels, each brimming with charm and cozy twilight magic!

name: Kinny and the Cosmic Cauldron
summary: Cook or be cooked! In this cosmic deck-building roguelike, ingredients crash, merge, and react in chaotic ways. As the witch chef of Stewpendous Spoons, craft the perfect stew, master strategic combos, and satisfy bizarre patrons—before you end up in the cauldron yourself!

name: Stoplights
summary: Stoplights is a strategy simulation game about creating an efficient train network to support the growing needs of your cities. Make connections by building rails, control train routes with traffic signals to get essential resources where they need to be - in time.

name: Submerged Lights
summary: After traveling to a country town to move into the house he inherited, Andrew finds the town flooded. While wondering what to do, he spots a dim light coming from the flooded library, in the middle of the night. Investigating, he finds that it belongs to a small fairy, trapped inside of a lantern...

name: CityZen
summary: CityZen is a game about building small cities without stressful mechanics like confusing traffic systems, unexpected disasters or constraining resource management.

name: Matrix Mahjong
summary: A single-player card game adapted from the Chinese National Standard Mahjong, focusing on diverse winning hands and scoring with Faan combinations. Meld the tiles horizontally and vertically and utilize items of rule variations. Experience mahjong within an intricately interwoven tile space.

name: Scales
summary: Scales is a story-driven action-adventure RPG about a human-reptile hybrid. Players devour reptiles to absorb their DNA, and evolve through a corrupt world, where player choices ultimately determine the outcome of the story, blending combat with a darkly comedic narrative.

name: Gladiator Ascension
summary: Gladiator Ascension is an overpowered incremental gladiatorial experience! Prove yourself in combat and win your freedom!

name: RWS
summary: Rolling With Swords is a chaotic 2D arena brawler set in random levels. Chain attacks, roll through danger, and collect absurd power-ups in a tug-of-war system where control constantly shifts until one player claims the entire arena.

name: Hyouhon Hako de Uka wo Matsu
summary: A romance between an unidentified human-plant and an human(?) girl, both of them trapped in a cage.

name: Quick Brown
summary: Quick Brown is a cute and cozy 2d puzzle platformer about a fox trying to collect all 26 letters of the alphabet scattered across a forest. It is the first game of the "Subspace" Franchise created by Subanshh.

name: Modulus
summary: Modulus is a factory automation game where you cut, color, stamp, and assemble 3D building blocks. Design and optimize sprawling factories with creative freedom to efficiently fulfill the orders of the Grand Neural Network.

name: Darwin's Paradox!
summary: Dive into the adventure with Darwin, an octopus as endearing as he is ingenious, torn from the ocean and trapped in a vast and mysterious industrial complex. Harness his unique talents and abilities to help him overcome the many dangers and traps in this captivating platformer and adventure game.

name: Rogolf
summary:
ROGOLF is a minigolf roguelite, where each level has its own rules and each run is different.
Play mini-golf, buy equipment and score enough points to reach the top!

name: Derelict Star
summary: A precise momentum-based platformer that emphasizes exploration and navigation puzzles. Run and jump your way through a wide variety of obstacles and challenges as you explore an abandoned derelict freighter.

name: Go! Go! Mister Chickums
summary: GO! GO! MISTER CHICKUMS is a fun, classic single-screen platformer, inspired by arcade hits of the 80s. The game can be played either in single player mode, or in local couch co-op with 2 players simultaneously.

name: Switch the Darkness
summary: Memorize the room. Spot the anomaly. Flip the switch. If you miss a detail, the loop resets. A psychological horror where your attention is the only weapon against a shifting reality. Can you break the cycle?

name: Peckers
summary: A short clicker game which you can run in the corner of your screen while pretending to work. Peck into the depths for resources and craft gear adventurers probably shouldn’t trust.

name: Grimoria
summary: Grimoria is a tactical card roguelike where five races unite to save the realm from shadow creatures. Combine synergies, unlock secret powers, and face tough decisions every turn. Build your deck, defeat monsters, and command Kings, Elves, Dwarves, Mages, and Dragons.

name: A Rat's Quest: The Way Back Home
summary: Follow Mat, the Scavenger, on his long journey to find his way back home. Experience a world full of threats from a rat's unique perspective, while fighting and sneaking on a rodent's most dangerous adventure.

name: Granser
summary: A story driven rpg inspired by JRPGS like Xenogears/saga, featuring a unique turn based battle system. Follow Saragat and his dubious allies as they untangle the web of lies and attempt to dismantle the shadowy conspiracy of "The Core", as a far greater threat will reawaken.

name: All Will Fall
summary: A post-apocalyptic city builder where every structure can collapse. Master a unique physics-based 3D construction system, create a sprawling vertical settlement on water, scavenge for resources, explore the ocean, and ensure your colony's survival by making difficult yet necessary decisions.

name: Kijutsu Rider
summary: Kijutsu Rider is a fast paced third person hack and slash anime styled action game where you play as one of five unstoppable heroes, carve your way through waves of monstrous enemies, take down the black cross conglomerate and save the world.

name: Yummimons
summary: A pet game that lives at the bottom of your screen. Feed, pet, capture new companions, and engage in explosive battles — all without stopping your work, study, or browsing. Welcome to your new invisible addiction.

name: Dangerous Mountain Together
summary: Team up in this chaotic 2-4 player co-op RC car adventure! Navigate dangerous mountain roads while tethered together, pulling each other back from disaster. Climb steep hills, survive wild weather, and reach the top without tumbling into the abyss!

name: Dwarven Rampart
summary: Dwarven Rampart is a Fantasy strategy game where you build your Dwarven town, raise massive armies, and choose your enemies to fight against. How long can you survive?

name: Stiff Neck
summary: A story about the self—and about others. A toy factory, several cursed dolls, and a horror novel… This quiet seaside town throws Noele's love life into chaos and dredges up the old wounds she has tried for years to forget.

name: Urban Ascend
summary: A casual incremental city builder where growth is constant, production chains expand, citizens thrive, and upgrades push your city toward a bustling metropolis.

name: Asphalt Racing Bundle Hypercar & Speedway
summary: Enjoy 2 games in 1 with this irresistible speed games pack!

name: Candy Bandits
summary: Jump in with 4–10 friends for a bright and chaotic multiplayer party game. Grab candies, capture bandits, and battle it out across exciting environments. It’s a game night like no other!

name: DataFall
summary:
DataFall is a fast-paced cyberpunk action game built around risk, optimization and player decision-making.

While it appears to reward min-max strategies, the game dynamically reacts to over-optimization, forcing players to adapt instead of relying on static builds.

Featuring neon-styled visuals, escalating difficulty systems and reactive mechanics, DataFall challenges players to balance greed, efficiency and survival.

name: Wong
summary: Wong is a 2D platformer designed for speedrunning, where you will clear levels, learn their shortcuts, and compete for the best score in a fluid, precise, and perfection-focused gameplay experience.

name: Night Shippers
summary: You signed up to deliver food in the underworld, alone or with up to 4 friends. Take orders, dodge monsters, and survive the night - or be trapped in hell forever.

name: Vampire Hunter: Nightrise
summary: You came to hunt a vampire. Instead, you're trapped in his sprawling Gothic castle. You must hold on to your dwindling faith and dismantle his defenses before Nightrise — or become his prey in this single, story-driven experience.

name: KuloNiku: Bowl Up!
summary: Run a meatball restaurant in this high energy comedic cooking game. Meet quirky locals and cook their wild orders, upgrade and customize your restaurant, win thrilling cooking battles, and become the town’s top eatery!

name: People of Note
summary: In this turn-based RPG musical, join Cadence as she recruits an ensemble of musicians on her quest for stardom. Experience turn-based combat like never before, where each battle is a musical performance with evolving combat conditions and genre-bending mashup attacks!

name: Signal Zone
summary: Build, mine, and defend your base to survive the nights. Gather resources by day, reinforce your defenses, and survive attacks in this challenging minimalist strategy.

name: Empty Gauge
summary: VHS-style single-player horror part-time job simulator. Endure the night shift at a remote gas station/convenience store, then return home and collect hidden clues. As the days pass, nightmares bleed into reality—and depending on the clues you uncover, the ending changes.

name: ChainStaff
summary: ChainStaff is a brutal action-platformer with a transforming spear and grappling hook, blazing weapon upgrades, and a rocking soundtrack. Aliens have taken over the Earth! Swing, shoot, and spear your way through hordes of mutating monstrosities and bone-shaking boss fights.

name: The Occultist
summary: The Occultist is a first-person narrative thriller. You play as Alan Rebels, a paranormal investigator who travels to an abandoned British island after his father's disappearance. Explore GodStone island, face supernatural entities, and uncover long-buried occult rituals.

name: The House of Hikmah
summary: The House of Hikmah is a narrative-driven 3D adventure game exploring grief, legacy and the search for answers after profound loss. Solve puzzles, encounter historical scholars of the Islamic Golden Age, and uncover timeless lessons in a beautifully imagined House of Wisdom.

name: Samson
summary: Samson returns to Tyndalston, a city that shaped him hard, where every fight is close and every escape is earned. He owes dangerous people more than he can pay, and they’re using his sister to force his hand. The clock is running. The only way out is through anyone who stands in his way.

name: Wittengrad Is No More
summary: Wittengrad Is No More is a surreal, narrative walking sim with horror elements. The city's foggy streets will lead you through the story of a single evening in Barnaba’s life. You will encounter the peculiar inhabitants of Wittengrad, though… does it even matter? After all, Wittengrad is gone.

name: A Thousand Bees
summary: Spot the bees in this lovingly hand-illustrated hidden objects game. A literal thousand bees are spread out over a dozen beautiful levels. Can you find all secret levels, too? Enjoy a perfect summer day, deeply inspired by the cozy honeycore aesthetic.

name: Lost Little Things
summary: Embark on a whimsical hidden-object adventure with Lost Little Things! Hunt lost treasures, complete missions, explore ancient temples, and visit moonlit festivals. Alongside your wise cat sensei, meet quirky yokai, uncover hidden secrets, and immerse yourself in a relaxing, magical adventure!

name: Hexa's Gone
summary: The Secret Hexa has vanished. Ask the right questions, stay strategic in your answers. Your goal will be to gather the clues from each player. By combining them, you will likely be the first to find the Hexa.

name: Hexical
summary: Hexical is a retro twin stick action rogue-lite. Install modifications that change how you play. Fight through hordes of viruses to deliver components safely. Make your way through an evolving digital world. Can you defeat all the 3 viral aspects and bring order to the system?

name: Knockout 2: Wrath of the Karen
summary:
In Knockout 2: Wrath of the Karen, a puzzle-boxing spectacle fighting game, take the role of an FBI agent (the bureau of Federal Boxing Investigations) tasked with uncovering the sinister secret behind a rise in wanton entitled law-breaking worldwide.

Knockout 2 pits you against the worst of society and the only way out is with your fists. The cable company stops giving you the discounted rate? That's a boxing match. Someone yields at an empty roundabout? That's a boxing match, too. In fact, all laws, court cases, and skimping out on sandwich toppings are resolved through combat in a world where the legal system has been replaced with boxing. The road to victory might not be easy, but it will be hilarious.

name: Arcadia Fallen II
summary: In this sequel to the award-winning roleplay visual novel, Arcadia Fallen, you play as a senior student at Seven Wind’s Academy. Choose from three different magical disciplines, and let your choices shape the personality of your character as they navigate school life during a time of great change.

name: DarkSwitch
summary:
The Tree provides, the Tree protects, the Tree Prevails!

Dark Switch is a vertical city builder set in the boughs of a gigantic tree. Defend your leafy home against the perils of the creeping fog by managing light and flame.

Gather resources, research technologies, and send pioneers to explore the ruins of those who came before: discover their secrets and doom.

Set in a world of folk horror and creeping dread, DarkSwitch blends vertical city-building, tower defense, and exploration into a unique strategic experience.

Navigate a stunning, dangerous, dark fantasy world enriched by cinematic cutscenes and an atmospheric soundtrack from Silent Hill composer Akira Yamaoka!

name: Memories Off Sousou: Break Out of My Shell
summary: Memories Off Sousou's fandisc.

name: Powerwash Simulator 2: Adventure Time Pack
summary: What time is it?! The new Adventure Time Pack is set to bring the Ooo to PowerWash Simulator TwOoo. Grab your friends and blast away grime from distant lands or clean up the wreckage of the world as a solo adventurer in five jobs from the world of Adventure Time the fun will never end!

name: Hidden Tails
summary: Hidden Tails is a cozy hidden object game where every squeak tells a story.

name: Brave Rounds
summary: Shoot, punch and get closer through bullets towards enemies in this close range-heavy arcade bullet hell shoot 'em up. A mysterious cult is going to make Mt. Krakatoa explode! By yourself or with a friend, stand your ground; the fate of the world is in your hands...!

name: Whisker Wanderlust: Unwritten Chapter
summary: Wait... WHAT?! My human just vanished into a magic portal! The 3rd Whisker Wanderlust adventure begins! Explore a whimsical fantasy world, meet quirky new friends, and follow the clues to bring your owner home. May every kitty be loved! ♥♥♥

name: SCP-9779-JP
summary: A psychological horror about survival in a cursed Japanese mansion and underground SCP laboratories. Hide, survive, and return SCP-9779-JP to its containment chamber before it destroys you.

name: Seth
summary: Become Seth, god of storms, and crush Apophis’s legions in a fast-paced roguelite FPS blending Egyptian mythology with science fiction. Fast combat, random challenges, and divine power in every run.

name: Arcane Merchant
summary: Open your own shop in the heart of a Medieval Fantasy realm! Stock your shelves with everything from potions and swords to mysterious crystals and legendary artifacts. Set your prices, earn your customers' trust and become the richest merchant in town!

name: Portal Guardian
summary: You are a Portal Guardian. It is your job to help protect the secret gateways to the Realm. Your people have been kept safe and unaware for centuries, but something dark and relentless has been stirring... Unleash the fury of your towers and magic to defend the portal and the realm or all is lost!

name: Please Don't Shoot the Humans
summary: Click with laser-focus to blast zombies while civilians wander in like they missed every safety memo. Stack upgrades, unleash turrets, and watch the numbers explode. See how long you can keep pretending everything is under control.

name: We Need a Doorman.
summary: You are the hotel doorman and a demon hunter. Observe the guests, and if you detect an anomaly, exorcise without hesitation.

name: Days With Girlfriends Ⅲ
summary: During the game, you mainly match a certain amount of identical game elements, such as fruits, gems, building blocks, etc., so that they are adjacent to each other to eliminate them to win. Match three or more identical elements to eliminate them, complete the set goals.

name: DeadZone: Survival Ops Zombie Shooter & WW2 Soldiers of Honor - Warzone Assault
summary: Survival Has Many Faces. Face Them All.

name: Wukong Survivors
summary: A pixel-art roguelite survivors game inspired by Eastern mythology. Play as Sun Wukong and other legendary heroes, battle endless waves of enemies, craft powerful builds from weapons, relics, and skill trees, and survive the chaos.

name: Nimillion: The Last Expedition
summary: Metroidvania Spaceship adventure with physics-based rocket ship controls. Retro-inspired Thruster-only flight, unlock and upgrade abilities, solve physics puzzles, battle tough bosses, conquer brutal terrain. Easy to learn, hard to master old-school thrills!

name: Gunboat God
summary: Become the all-powerful Gunboat God in this fluid shoot 'em up. Carve the waves as you stylishly fight hordes of monsters in hundreds of quick-fire missions. Transform your Gunboat and upgrade your weapons, skills and abilities to take on giant, challenging, multi-stage bosses!

name: Replaced
summary: Replaced is a 2.5D sci-fi retro-futuristic action platformer where you play as R.E.A.C.H. - an artificial intelligence trapped in a human body against its own will. Replaced combines cinematic platforming, pixel art and free-flow action combat set in an alternative 1980's.

name: Regions of Ruin: Runegate
summary: Explore a rich and unique open world in this Adventure RPG. Uncover lost dwarven ruins, build a new society and re-establish dwarven kind.

name: Moses & Plato: Last Train to Clawville
summary: A murder mystery where you are the main suspect! An ambassador on a peace mission has been killed on board the Clawville Express. Time progresses as you sniff out clues, eavesdrop on conversations, and interrogate passengers. Can you solve the case before the train reaches the last station? Or else.

name: Dosa Divas
summary: Platform through a vibrant world in an upgradeable mech and cook delicious meals. Fight off corpos in turn based combat, discover new recipes, build up your reputation with local communities, and bond with friends and family on a journey to taste everything life has to offer.

name: Last Flag
summary: Hide your flag. Find the enemy flag. Run it back, then defend for a minute to win it. Welcome to Last Flag: a fast-paced 5v5 shooter with showstopping contestants, set in a televised competition where strategy, teamwork, and chaos blend in the ultimate game of Capture the Flag.

name: A Storied Life: Tabitha
summary: A wholesome narrative puzzle game about the objects we leave behind and the stories they tell. Complete a loved one's damaged memoirs by exploring their home and packing away their things.

name: Hordekill
summary: In an unknown realm, you slay hordes of nightmarish swamp monsters.

name: BaseStar
summary: Dive into a classic grid-based dungeon crawler RPG in a sci-fi setting with unique classes, each offering a distinct playstyle. Immerse yourself in a fully voiced sci-fi story brought to life by two main characters, guiding you through a narrative full of twists and turns with real-time combat.

name: Artifact Hunt: Yao
summary: Artifact Hunt: Yao is a roguelike deck-building game. Collect various Yao souls, seek out different artifacts, combine diverse inscriptions, and create your unique build to experience this adventure full of possibilities.

name: Fishing Inc
summary: Fishing Inc is an addictive incremental fishing game! Catch fish, earn cash, and unlock powerful skills. Master new ponds, fill your Fish Log with Legendary catches, and become the ultimate angler.

name: MechsNBugs
summary: Two Mechs. One player. And an arena filled with alien bugs. Survive five rounds in the arena to become the new champion.

name: Trapped in the Omniverse
summary: FPS single-player de ciencia ficción con supervivencia y exploración interdimensional, donde combatís criaturas anómalas y luchás por sobrevivir en entornos distorsionados.

name: Anime Minesweeper
summary: Anime Minesweeper with stories and secrets. Solve puzzles, meet girls, and unlock new modes. Squares, triangles, hexagons—the mines are waiting!

name: Spaceman Memories
summary: Spaceman Memories is a retro JRPG that takes place in a distant future but draws inspiration from ancient Japanese folktales. A story full of wonder and nostalgia as you take on the role of Ichiro 94, an astronaut who wakes up from hypersleep to go on a journey to find the remnants of his past.

name: Cleaning Up!
summary: Turn huge messes into sparkling spaces! Feel the satisfaction of restoring them to order with your super-powered cleaning tools. The quick, cozy joy of tidying up!

name: Rebeloid
summary: A non-VR release of a an arcade brick-breaker.

name: Command Thousands Troops
summary: This is a squad-building game set in a medieval fantasy world, blending turn-based development with real-time combat. As the commander of a small team, you will recruit soldiers, acquire skills, strengthen your army, and repel invaders. Write your own legendary story.

name: Gecko Gods
summary: Explore a mysterious island as a tiny lizard. Complete ancient puzzles, effortlessly climb cliffs, and eat bugs as you make your way across an island civilization lost to time.

name: Opus: Prism Peak
summary: Opus: Prism Peak is a narrative adventure where your choices lead to divergent endings. Play as a photographer lost in an ethereal realm, and unveil its mysteries with your camera to find a way home.

name: Mouse: P.I. For Hire
summary: Join private investigator Jack Pepper on a guns blazing, jazz-fueled adventure in MOUSE: P.I. For Hire. MOUSE combines the charm of hand-drawn rubber hose animation inspired by the classic cartoons of the 1930’s with the adrenaline and action of an explosive first person shooter.

name: Under Par Golf Architect
summary: Step into the shoes of a golf architect as you build and manage your own golfing paradise! Sharpen your strategy by designing incredible courses to challenge the most demanding golfers and watch your club flourish as you attract VIP players, hire quirky staff and hold prestigious tournaments.

name: Cthulhu: The Cosmic Abyss
summary: A mining station in the Pacific abyss is no longer responding. As an investigator of the occult, unravel the mysteries of the deep. Test your wits and sanity in this thriller inspired by the master of Providence.

name: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream
summary: Create Mii characters based on family and friends, someone you admire, or something completely original—there are plenty of personality traits, little quirks, and physical traits to choose from—including some face customization options you haven’t seen before! Go deep into getting every detail just right, or create Miis quickly and easily by answering some simple questions, and then help them explore their likes and dislikes, find relationships, and get up to all sorts of fun. Your Miis are bound to surprise you as they take on a life of their own!

name: Cozy Sanctuary
summary: Cozy Sanctuary is a relaxing pet simulation game where you care for adorable animals living at the bottom of your screen. Grow their food, and keep them happy and fed to attract even more furry friends! They'll stay out of your way while you work or study, but don't forget to give them attention!

name: Kitty Finder
summary: Find the adorable kitties hiding in every corner of a huge mansion! Discover the little friends hiding behind the sofas, bookshelves, and attic. A peaceful adventure experience awaits you in a relaxing atmosphere!

name: Anomaly Directive
summary: Anomaly Directive is a first-person surveillance horror game. Monitor live camera feeds, detect and report supernatural anomalies, and survive an escalating threat from a malevolent entity.

name: Pragmata
summary:
An all-new Science Fiction action adventure with its own unique hacking twist!
It is the near future, and protagonists Hugh and his android companion Diana, must work together as they make their way through the cold lunar research station.

name: Night of the Living Bubble
summary: NOT YOUR AVERAGE NIGHT SHIFT... When clocking into work, you find that your business has been overrun by monsters borne from the products on the shelves. Constructed by a mad scientist bent on world domination, only YOU can stop them and save the world by shooting monsters with your Nailgun.

name: Beta Kafe: Write Your Love Story
summary: A man with a broken heart, trying to love and be loved—though it’s hard. In this dating simulation, you’ll be facing some of the most terrible first date experiences. It’s cinematic, funny, and brutally honest!

name: Beta Kafe: Write Your Love Story
summary:
Beta Kafe centres on the chaotic nature of modern dating culture in the digital age.
The scenario was created based on observations gathered from over 1,000 real
dates. Players must strike a balance between honesty, manipulation and emotional
strategy. Every decision directly affects the course of the story

name: Jay and Silent Bob: Chronic Blunt Punch
summary:
Jump in the shoes of Lunch Box and Mr. Snoogans in a colorful Side-scrolling 2.5D over-the-top multiplayer brawler! Play as the dynamic duo alone or with a friend in a tag team combo fight fest. Destroy your enemies with fists, feet, and the magic of self-esteem destroying shit talk while you embark on a mission to find your long lost pot customers trapped in an Orwellian shopping center.

Jay and Silent Bob: Chronic Blunt Punch is a colorful side-scrolling tag-team beat-em-up where players swap back and forth between our heroes on the fly or perform special moves simultaneously with a friend. Our heroes embark on an epic adventure from the humble corners where they ply their trade to the gates of hell itself.

name: Saint Slayer: Spear of Sacrilege
