summary: Saint Slayer is an NES-style 2D action game, featuring loads of stages, enemies, and gore set against the backdrop of late-17th century Europe. Play as the ex-soldier Rudiger and wield the Spear of Sacrilege as you save the Holy Roman Empire from the corrupt Catholic priest Father Pacer.

name: Iron Colony
summary: After crash-landing on a mysterious island, confront hostile robotic creatures in intense combat and strategic duels. Explore forgotten ruins, uncover secrets, and fight for survival in a world where corrupted technology dominates every corner.

name: Tessel Run
summary: A physics-based puzzle platformer featuring hand-drawn tangram tessels, layered parallax worlds, and color that changes the rules of physics.

name: MMO98
summary: An incremental game where you go from small-scale MMO development studio up to global market domination. Improve your server infrastructure, address the technical challenges of running an MMO, release new games, and become the world's #1 MMO game studio.

name: Clockwork Ambrosia
summary: Clockwork Ambrosia is a compelling steampunk fusion of metroidvania and a 2D shooter. Players pull on the boots of an airship pilot to combat an army of deadly robots and monsters. Experiment with a range of rule-breaking weapons modifications and armors to prevail through this wild adventure!

name: Tides of Tomorrow
summary: From the makers of Road 96, Tides of Tomorrow challenges you to survive the troubled ocean planet of Elynd, as well as the choices made by your friends and favourite streamers.

name: Masters of Albion
summary: Build by day, fight by night in an epic story of power and consequence. Design, build and customise your world, from the food your people eat to the clothes they wear, the weapons they wield to the homes they live in. Possess characters at will in this unique God Game – Masters of Albion!

name: Captured 2
summary: You're trapped in an apartment with ever-changing rooms. Capture anomalies on camera, survive deadly entities and escape an endless nightmare.

name: Kumitantei: Old-School Slaughter
summary: Kill each other...for science! The class of '89 is trapped in an elite school killing game. Investigate, solve, and expose your classmates in Kumitantei: Old-School Slaughter, an episodic murder-mystery ADV card-battler inspired by retro anime.

name: Outbound
summary: Build your own home on wheels and live sustainably off-grid. Craft workstations and power supplies, source energy from the sun, wind, or water, upgrade and customize your vehicle, grow crops, automate your production, and explore a colorful world.

name: Kingdom's Return: Time-Eating Fruit and the Ancient Monster
summary: A kingdom-rebuilding adventure filled with action and strategy! Kingdom's Return is an action RPG where you'll adventure to restore your fallen kingdom. Collect materials in 2D side-scrolling adventure stages, then use them in the strategy part to rebuild your kingdom and power up your characters!

name: Luminex Quartet
summary: A JRPG featuring music. The curious boy Pato sets out on a journey with his childhood friend Belffie in search of legendary instruments. Eventually, they are bound to a great destiny. An adventure story with full Japanese voice acting for the main story.

name: Food Truck Chef: Full Course Edition
summary: In Food Truck Chef: Full Course Edition, you explore vibrant locations and unlock fresh levels, each introducing a brand-new lineup of special dishes to perfect. Packed with delicious recipes from around the world, this is a true culinary journey. From the lively sights of Oriental Street and the smoky goodness of BBQ Street to the sugary treats of Donut and Waffle Street, tackle every challenge and complete each cooking mission. Simple to pick up but tough to perfect, this high-speed cooking game features some mechanics that keep you on your toes.

name: Kazuma Kaneko's Tsukuyomi
summary: Ancient myths awaken in a modern-day Babel. A tactical deck-building tower dungeon RPG from the legendary Demon Artist, Kazuma Kaneko.

name: Witches of Element
summary: In Witches of Element, you command Fire, Wind, and Thunder to craft unique spells from three elemental orbs. Merge identical elements to summon powerful pets. After each battle, upgrade elements, unlock items, and shape your own playstyle as you face new adventures.

name: My Summer Love
summary: Kang Yuna is a student at the University of Arts in Korea. She is someone very intelligent and charming. In a nineties summer you're a new student in her class. Could love develop between the two?

name: Anemoi
summary: An upcoming visual novel from Key.

name: Grandpa's Bee Haven
summary: Grandpa's Bee Haven is a desktop-idler and a beekeeping sim that sits at the bottom of your screen letting you to do other things while managing your bee haven.

name: Saint George's Tavern
summary:
Hilarious tavern simulator set in the early 1800's. Take food and drinks orders, catch and cook the food, pour ales and serve. A cozy game that occasionally ramps up the pace for a short while with tavern fights, drinking games, arm wrestling, happy slaps and many more.
Decorate your tavern ready for Christmas and watch as a choir of chickens sing Christmas carols to entertain your customers.
Earn money, buy new items, hire a worker, and increase your tavern rating. The tavern with the highest rating in London will be hosting King George III for Christmas dinner - guaranteed to be an absolute spectacle!!

name: Moomintroll: Winter's Warmth
summary: From the creators of Snufkin: Melody of Moominvalley comes a heartwarming new adventure inspired by the beloved Moomin stories by Tove Jansson. This time, join Moomintroll himself on a charming but cold winter journey.

name: He-Man and the Masters of the Universe: Dragon Pearl of Destruction
summary: Eternia’s favorite heroes including He-Man, Teela, Man-At-Arms and more in a two-player, retro-inspired 2D magic-brawler, drawn in beautiful pixel-art and featuring huge, highly-detailed sprites, designed to do justice to Eternia’s favorite peace-keepers.

name: Diablo IV: Lord of Hatred
summary: Sanctuary reaches its breaking point. In Diablo IV: Lord of Hatred, Mephisto’s dark crusade threatens the heart of Sanctuary. Rise as new heroes, uncover the fate of old allies, and forge your legend in the next chapter of the critically acclaimed action-RPG.

name: Diablo IV: Age of Hatred Collection
summary:
The Diablo IV: Age of Hatred Collection includes:

- Diablo IV Base Game
- Diablo IV: Vessel of Hatred
- Diablo IV: Lord of Hatred Standard Edition

The Age of Hatred Collection is the best way to begin your journey in Diablo IV. This bundle instantly unlocks the Diablo IV base game and Vessel of Hatred expansion, and includes the Lord of Hatred expansion.

name: Animal Style
summary: You're a cat running your own hotdog shop! Use realistic fluid physics to sauce a huge variety of foods. Each food is a puzzle. Manage your shop, unlock upgrades, save the furry residents of Pawston, and make sure not to lose your balance....

name: Bobo Bay
summary: Bobo Bay is a pet simulation game where you collect, mash(breed), accessorize, and train little creatures to compete in races and other competitions. You are able to feed your Bobo an old shoe which is kinda funny.

name: Gretel's Honesty
summary: A comic-like visual novel, expressing a new story based on the fairy tale “Hansel and Gretel”.

name: Demon Lord: Just a Block
summary: Reborn as a Demon Lord, seek revenge on the heroes! This fantasy roguelite game features grid-based combat controlled using four directional inputs. The world only moves when you do: you attack when you collide with enemies. Plan your moves step by step or play swiftly with dodges and parries!

name: It Lives in the Woods
summary: It Lives in the Woods is a first-person psychological horror set in the forests of Canada. You are Ibrahim, a father who has recently lost his daughter whilst on a hiking trip in the forest last winter. You hope to find what happened to your daughter and whether you can reunite with her.

name: Rogue Night
summary: Fight through hordes undead, and collect their heads to unlock permanent upgrades while you gather resources to build your base. Choose your class, and preferred weapons. Explore dungeons to find rings, tools, and blueprints, and rescue NPCs who unlock new structures and provide various resources.

name: Inkonbini
summary: inKONBINI: One Store. Many Stories is a slice-of-life narrative-driven simulation game centered around a small-town convenience store in the early 1990s. Shelve goods, engage in meaningful conversations with your customers, and explore the ways you can impact their lives with your decisions.

name: Zombiehood
summary: Zombiehood is a quirky yet brutal run-and-gun roguelite: scavenge, upgrade, and blast through procedurally generated biomes in a sandbox looter-shooter packed with witty dialogue and explosively satisfying combat.

name: Saros
summary:
Beneath the shadow of an ominous eclipse, Arjun Devraj (Rahul Kohli) is a Soltari enforcer who will stop at nothing to pursue answers on the shape-shifting Carcosa, a world of dark secrets and hostile inhabitants.

This planet is home to the corrupting influence of the Eclipse – a sinister force that awakens pure madness in everyone and everything. Throughout the surface of this troubled world, nothing remains untouched; it reaches every crevice of every biome.

name: Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu
summary: This game tells a story of heart-to-heart connections and salvation surrounding Mono, a girl who visits the medical facility “Ishokan” in hopes of saving her older sister, who has been afflicted by the terrifying “Shinigami Disease”; Melhendia, a goat-like creature who seeks to exploit her; and the girls who the disease have transformed into strange creatures.

name: Gray Planet
summary: Explore a open world set in a post-apocalyptic background, gather resources to craft various equipment and build your base. Defeat different types of monsters while investigating what happened on this planet.

name: Invincible Vs.
summary: Invincible VS is a brutal superhero 3v3 tag fighting game set in the Invincible universe, where you can battle to the death as a team of fan-favorite characters in iconic locations.

name: Winx Club: The Magic Is Back
summary: Winx Club: The Magic is Back captures the essence of the Winx universe, delivering an enchanting experience with a mix of magical combat and puzzle-solving. Play as all six members of the Winx Club, each with their own magical abilities.

name: Mythic Love: Iberian Legends
summary: Think you can handle a little romance with creatures from Spanish folklore? Careful: your love life isn’t the only thing at stake at Mythic Love: Iberian Legends.

name: Kiborg: Descent
summary: Descend into the tower's forbidden depths. Unravel the Substance's secret, forge uneasy alliances, and escape Omega-201. New floors, bosses, weapons, and a chance to settle the score with Volkov.

name: Mars Tactics
summary: Classic turn-based tactical combat with some modern twists. Use stress to manage RNG. Master advanced suppression mechanics. Grow troops who develop abilities, personalities & relationships based on what happens in battle. Procedural, destructible maps. Realistic bullet physics.

name: Project Faith
summary: You are cast in the role of a young boy who starts his adventure on a mysterious and vast green landscape. You know that your destination is straight ahead. You know what that destination is. But not much else...

name: Lunarium
summary: Lunarium is an atmospheric fantasy A-RPG. Play as Ave, a light-armored knight, who teams up with Lune, a mysterious Starfarer. Together, they journey to save a dying world, engaging in challenging battles to retrieve the lost glow of the stars and forsaken memories, unveiling cosmic secrets.

name: Rancher: A New Life
summary: Start a new life as a Rancher. Travel the forest paths by quad bike, raise cattle, build, repair, and improve your farm. Take care of animals, go fishing, cook, grow vegetables, practice your accuracy on shooting range, take photos, and much more. Relax away from the hustle and bustle of the city!

name: Toward The Ice
summary: Toward The Ice is a classic first-person party-based dungeon crawler RPG with grid-based movement and turn-based combat. Venture into the frozen north and help a fair princess rescue her idiot brother from Troll kidnappers.

name: Gambonanza
summary: Gambonanza is a mind-bending roguelike where every move counts. Unlock over 100 innovative Gambits and harness powerful synergy with your chess pieces to transform your board into a festival of explosive combos and tactical twists!

name: The Bunker Notes
summary: "The Bunker Notes" is a visual novel about a concrete trap where the past whispers through the cracks of rusted doors. In this world, survival is everything; meeting another person might be your last mistake.

name: Letter Lost
summary: Play out your wildest dreams of being a postal worker, stamping and sorting mail for residents of the mysterious island of Kharnym. Perform your duties, keep the mail running on time, and this could be the last job you'll ever need to work.

name: Time Jump
summary:
A casual 3rd person action-adventure

Play as William Roger in this 3rd person comedy adventure. It's 1994. You're late for school! No sleep. No Breakfast. You "accidentally" activate your professors “Camera” and get sucked into the past.

Lost and alone in this strange place with your wits and no knowledge of where to go next, uncover the many mysteries of why you are here and at all costs, find your way back home before time runs out.

name: Derail: Sacrifice
summary: Derail is a story-driven puzzle game similar to Rusty Lake. The once peaceful town was thrown into chaos when a coffin falls from the sky. The villagers vanished all of sudden. Only things left are embryos scattered on the empty streets. When you opened the coffin, a living person walked out.

name: Solis
summary:
Solis is a hand-drawn adventure about technology and deception in a city at night.
During a company trip you explore the city of Solis from dusk till dawn, talking with its inhabitants and meeting colleagues. This night you learn the painful truth about the company you work for. Will you remain loyal?
In the game you explore an atmospheric and compact open world. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text adjusts to reflect your choices.

In Solis you explore the city, investigate your surroundings and talk with the inhabitants and colleagues you meet. Decisions within the game carry weight, influencing subsequent events, while the in-game text dynamically adjusts to reflect your choices. Interactions are streamlined to utilize a single button, aided by context-sensitive interaction icons. The GUI is a sparse as possible. Solis offers multiple endings and is crafted to be concise and compact. The complete game is estimated to run for approximately 2,5 hours.

name: Lunar Strike
summary: Lunar Strike blends speculative fiction with a game world grounded in hard science. The game focuses on compelling survival and character-driven storytelling over combat. A race against time to preserve the evidence of humanity’s presence on the Moon before its inevitable collapse and destruction.

name: Cat Girl Survivor 2: Beyond the Veil
summary: Demon invasion has shattered the dimensions, filling the world with corrupted souls. Cat girls with unique stories unite through friendship to restore balance by purifying souls and facing fierce bosses. An exciting and adorable side-scrolling action adventure!

name: Chess 2048
summary: Chess 2048 – Classic chess moves meet fresh puzzle-strategy twists: watch the board reshape, adapt on the fly, and master piece combos. Then escape poison gas, jump between water tiles, use portals, and pull off clever tricks.

name: Koloboke: Sickness Simulator
summary: This is a difficult game that takes the best from Dark Souls - the rolls Combined with a first-person camera, it turns into a truly butt-blasting mix

name: Slot or Not
summary: Deck-building turn-based slot machine battling adventure. Fight evil fruits aside your battle buddy slot machine to save your village. Spin your destiny and grab the precious loot in a fast paced colorful adventure.

name: Retronaut
summary: A rogue star pilot lost between galaxies—upgrade your ship, harness ancient artifacts, and survive relentless alien hordes in this cosmic action roguelite.

name: Bourbon Risky
summary: Bourbon Risky is a simple but deep boss rush action game with retro style graphics. Smash all enemies in your way with your eternal companion that blasting bullets and lasers!

name: Agebringer
summary: The Crimson Core has been stolen. The end of the world draws near. The thief hides high atop the Infinity Tower. Gather your courage, take up your weapons... The Red Crusade has begun.
